 \* Strong JavaScript/TypeScript fundamentals
 



 \* Experience working within cloud-native environments
 



 \* Ability to contribute to architecture and system design discussions
 



 \* Engineers comfortable operating in modern AI-assisted development environments
 



  





 Nice to Have
 



  





 \* Experience within high-traffic product businesses
 



 \* Experience with distributed systems or microservices
 



 \* Strong product mindset
 



 \* Experience optimising frontend performance and developer experience
 



  





 What’s On Offer
 



  





 \* Remote-first setup
 



 \* Only 2 onsite days per month
 



 \* Flexible salary depending on level
 



 \* Highly technical engineering environment
 



 \* Modern product-led culture
 



 \* Opportunity to work at scale with modern AI-driven engineering practices
 



 \* Strong ownership and autonomy across engineering decisions

title: Fullstack Developer to Ahlsell
description:
**About The Role**
 Ahlsell is looking for a Fullstack Developer to join our e-commerce team — a key role in the continued modernization of our e-commerce platform. You'll work close to both technology and business in a team that takes shared ownership of the platform powering Ahlsell's websites and mobile applications.
   

  

 In this role, you'll help develop, maintain and evolve full-stack solutions that deliver an excellent experience for customers and internal users. You'll be part of Ahlsell Group's ongoing journey to modernize the tech stack — building cloud-ready, scalable solutions with a strong focus on quality, reliability and performance. We're building this step by step, and you'll help shape how we get there.
   

  

**Where you'll work**
 This is a remote-first role. The team works distributed across Sweden, and you can be based anywhere in the country. If you'd prefer to spend some or all of your time at an office, you're welcome to work from any of Ahlsell's locations across Sweden — whichever suits you best. We collaborate primarily online and meet up in person when it adds value. Team gatherings are usually held at our HQ in Stockholm.
   

  

**What You'll Work On**
* Develop and maintain full-stack solutions across React, .NET/C# and databases, contributing to performance and scalability in distributed systems.
* Contribute to architecture and modernization initiatives, including microservices, event-driven patterns, modern integrations and cloud-ready solutions.
* Improve reliability, observability and testability through tools such as Grafana and OpenTelemetry, automated testing and CI/CD pipelines.
* Collaborate closely with developers, UX, product and business stakeholders to make decisions together.


**What We're Looking For**
 We're looking for a developer who enjoys taking responsibility and contributing to technical decisions in a collaborative environment. You're curious, proactive, and comfortable when not everything is predefined — and you value working things out together with your team. You're interested in the business context, not just the code, and you bring strong communication skills to the table.
   

  

**Required Experience**
* A few years of professional experience in backend development with C# / .NET
* A few years of professional experience in frontend development with React
* Comfortable working in environments where priorities evolve and where the team has real influence over how work gets done


**Nice to have (any of these are a plus — you don't need all of them)**
* Experience in e-commerce
* Interest in architecture and platform-oriented development
* Experience with cloud and infrastructure (Azure, Kubernetes, Terraform)
* Knowledge of CI/CD, monitoring and observability
* Experience with CMS and search solutions (e.g. Optimizely/EPiServer, Voyado Elevate)
* Experience using AI tools in development, such as GitHub Copilot and Claude Code


**A note on applying**
*We know that no one ticks every box — and research shows that strong candidates often hold back from applying unless they meet every requirement. If you have solid experience in full-stack development and you're excited about the role, we'd love to hear from you.*
**About Working At Ahlsell**
 We strive to create an environment where different perspectives are valued and where people feelsafe to contribute, ask questions, and grow.
   

  

 Ahlsell is the Nordic region's leading distributor of installation products, tools and supplies. The Grouphas a turnover of approximately SEK 40 billion and around 6,000 employees in six countries. Our values — accountability, openness and simplicity — guide how we work, and we place great focus on inclusion, diversity and openness to innovation.
   

  

**Application**
 In this recruitment, Ahlsell collaborates with Wise. We do not accept applications by email — instead, apply easily with your CV or LinkedIn profile at wise.se. We use competency-based recruitment to enable a more potential-driven match, and we welcome candidates with diverse backgrounds, ages and experiences.
   

  

 If you have questions about the role or the process, please contact recruitment consultant Jacob Elmeljung at jacob.elmeljung@wise.se.

title: Software Engineer
description:
Bed bugs are a fast-growing global problem across hotels and real estate - yet the industry is stuck with outdated, chemical-heavy methods. We’re changing that.
 



 We’ve built patented technology that detects and treats bed bugs without chemicals or “human bait”. Demand is strong and we’re now scaling from early production into full-scale manufacturing. We are looking for someone to own our entire software stack.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Build and maintain our software that gives customers real-time insight into their machines and infestations
* Own the software stack end-to-end, architecture, reliability, scalability and new features
* Train and fine-tune the AI/ML models that power detection and decision-making in our machines
* Design and maintain databases and data pipelines
* Set up and maintain CI/CD pipelines and deployment infrastructure
* Monitor system performance and handle incidents when things break
* Work closely with the hardware team to make sure software and machines play nicely together



  





**Qualifications** 



* 3+ years of software development experience, ideally at a startup
* Comfortable owning a full-stack codebase end-to-end (frontend, backend, or both)
* Hands-on experience training or fine-tuning ML models, you don't need to be a data scientist, but you need to be comfortable getting into it
* Experience building web or mobile apps, bonus if they talk to hardware
* You move fast and don't wait for perfect requirements
* Experience with React/TypeScript and REST API design
* Comfortable with wearing multiple hats
* Based in Stockholm or willing to relocate
* English fluency

title: Frontend Developer
description:
The role of the Frontend Developer is to design, develop and maintain the frontend part of our network management system – the SoSmart software suite.
 



  





**Introduction** 




 Smartoptics provides innovative optical networking solutions for a new era of open networking. We focus on solving network challenges and increasing the competitiveness of our customers. Our customer base includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments and thousands of enterprises.
 



 The candidate will be part of the R&D team. The R&D team develops complete systems including both hardware and software.
 



  





**Position summary** 




 We are looking for a frontend developer for the
 
 SoSmart software suite
 
 . The team is multinational, but this position is seated in our Stockholm office. We are working agile according to the SAFe methodology. Some possibility for work from home, but most days we try to meet in our office in Kista, Stockholm.
 



  





**Requirements:** 



* Based in the Stockholm area
* Office-first policy
* University degree in relevant field, e.g. MSc in Electrical Engineering or Computer Science
* Strong foundation in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, as well as experience with at least one modern framework such as React, Vue.js, or Angular
* Understanding of REST APIs
* Good communication skills in English; Swedish proficiency is a plus



  





**Desired skills:** 



* Experience with testing frameworks (e.g. Playwright, Jest, or Cypress)
* Any exposure to MapLibre GL (or similar web-mapping libs)
* Interest in design systems, accessibility, and user experience
* Basic understanding of WebSockets or real-time data handling
* Understanding of microservice architectures and containerization (e.g. Docker)
* Development experience in a Linux environment
* Strong collaboration, problem-solving, and debugging skills
* Familiarity with agile development practices



  





 Smartoptics R&D team is located in Kista with head office in Oslo, Norway. Benefits include pension, health insurance, bonus scheme, 6 weeks’ vacation and flexible working hours. For more information about Smartoptics, please see
 
 smartoptics.com/about
 
 .
 



  





 Furthermore, note that you must have a Swedish/EU work permit. No relocation assistance or visa support provided. No recruiters or agencies, please.
 



  





**About Smartoptics** 




 Smartoptics is a Scandinavian company founded in 2006. We provide innovative optical networking solutions for the new era of open networking. Our focus is on solving network challenges and enhancing the competitiveness of our customers. Our clientele includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments, and thousands of enterprises.
 



  





 At Smartoptics, we value inclusivity and prioritize the well-being of our employees. We foster a positive company culture and provide a supportive work environment.

title: Software Developer
description:
As a Software Engineer reporting to an Engineering Manager, you'll play a critical role in maintaining and evolving Nasdaq's Clearing technology platform, supporting some of the world's largest clearing houses with mission-critical systems that operate 24/7.
   

  

 You'll thrive in this position if you're driven by innovation, comfortable diving into established production systems and large legacy codebases, and bring a genuine passion for building high-quality technology solutions across a broad technology stack—including Java backend services, front-end interfaces, DevOps tooling, and cloud infrastructure.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own the analysis, troubleshooting, and enhancement of production systems powering critical clearing and settlement functions, ensuring system stability while making thoughtful improvements to legacy codebases.
* Shape and improve the next-generation Clearing System through full lifecycle participation—from design and implementation to testing and deployment—delivering systems that meet the highest quality standards.
* Collaborate in agile ceremonies and maintain clear, up-to-date technical documentation to support team alignment and knowledge sharing.
* Conduct code and design reviews with the team to continuously improve system quality, architectural decisions, and engineering best practices.
* Participate in 24/7 on-call support rotations to ensure high availability and rapid incident resolution for mission-critical clearing services.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 1 - 3 years of experience in Java backend development.
* Genuine interest in learning and working with existing production systems, including large legacy codebases—comfortable understanding existing architectures and making improvements while maintaining stability.
* Self-driven with a sense of structure and creativity, able to balance innovation with operational excellence.
* Experience working effectively in agile teams with strong collaboration and communication skills.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with tools or platforms such as Gradle, Git, GitLab, Jenkins, AWS, or Kubernetes.
* Familiarity with capital markets domains such as clearing, settlement, trading, financial instruments, or corporate actions.
* Exposure to global teams and cultural nuances in cross-border collaboration.


 This position will be located in Stockholm and offers the opportunity for a hybrid work environment at least 3 days a week in-office, subject to change, providing flexibility and accessibility for qualified candidates.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and identities.
   

  

 We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where diverse perspectives, experiences, and identities are valued and celebrated.
   

  

 We ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided with reasonable accommodation throughout the hiring process.
   

  

**Benefits & Rewards**
 We offer a competitive, holistic total rewards package designed to support the financial, physical, and emotional well-being of our employees and their families.
   

  

 In addition to base salary, Nasdaq provides a generous annual bonus/commission (short-term incentive), equity (long-term incentive), comprehensive benefits, and opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We utilize a structured job architecture and career framework to ensure growth opportunities are transparent, fair, and accessible to all employees. The pay range you see reflects the full salary band for this job level, including room for progression over time. The actual offer will depend on factors like your skills, experience, qualifications, and location, and will fall within a portion of the posted range that's appropriate for this role.
   

  

 For more information, visit Nasdaq Benefits & Rewards Career Page.
   

  

**Come as You Are**
 Nasdaq is an equal opportunity employer. We positively encourage applications from suitably qualified and eligible candidates regardless of age, color, disability, national origin, ancestry, race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable law.
   

  

 We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request an accommodation.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**.NET Full-stack Developer** 




 The role of the .NET Full-stack Developer is to design and implement high-quality solutions that power the future of Smartoptics’ products, while representing our core values of innovation, reliability, and openness.
 



  





**Introduction** 




 Smartoptics provides innovative optical networking solutions for a new era of open networking. We focus on solving network challenges and increasing the competitiveness of our customers. Our customer base includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments, and thousands of enterprises.
 



 The candidate will be part of the agile R&D team developing application software for internal and external use.
 



  





**Position summary** 




 For our Kista office, we are looking for a Software Engineer to join our R&D team. You will work with full-stack solutions to build robust and scalable systems. To succeed in this role, you should have experience in C# .NET software development across multiple layers of the stack, and be passionate about building reliable, secure, and observable systems.
 



 We are working in agile teams of 5–8 people consisting of software developers, system testers, and Scrum Masters. Some possibility for work from home is available, but most days we work in our office in Kista, Stockholm.
 



  





**Requirements:** 



* Based in the Stockholm area.
* Office-first policy.
* Exam in relevant field, e.g. software development.
* Good communication skills in English and Swedish.



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Architect and build
 **desktop and web applications** 
 using modern frameworks (e.g., React + Next.js, Avalonia or similar).
* Ensure applications are optimized for
 **cross-platform use** 
 (mobile, macOS, Windows, Linux).
* Work closely with hardware and firmware team as well as product line management to deliver end-to-end solutions.
* Drive best practices in coding, testing, and DevOps to ensure quality and scalability.
* Mentor junior developers and contribute to building a high-performing engineering culture. For the right candidate, take on product owner responsibilities.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* 5+ years of professional experience as a Full-Stack Engineer.
* Strong proficiency in modern .NET (preferably .NET 8 or newer).
* Strong experience building web apps from scratch with modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks.
* Experience with cross-platform development (responsive design, hybrid/native mobile-friendly solutions).
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms (preferably Azure), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently on complex challenges.
* Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.



  





**Nice-to-Have** 



* Experience with
 **mobile app development** 
 (React Native, Flutter, or similar).
* Understanding of
 **back-end technologies** 
 (Node.js, Python, Go, or similar).
* Knowledge of
 **hardware communication protocols** 
 (SPI, I2C, UART, etc.).
* Experience with development of
 **embedded software** 
 that interfaces with hardware systems (e.g. C/C++, embedded Linux, RTOS).
* Familiarity with
 **performance optimization** 
 for both embedded and web systems.



  





 Smartoptics R&D team is located in Kista with head office in Oslo, Norway. Benefits include pension, health insurance, bonus scheme, 6 weeks’ vacation and flexible working hours. For more information about Smartoptics, please see
 **smartoptics.com/about**
 .
 



  





 Furthermore, note that you must have a Swedish/EU work permit. No relocation assistance or visa support provided. No recruiters or agencies, please.
 



  





**About Smartoptics** 




 Smartoptics is a Scandinavian company founded in 2006. We provide innovative optical networking solutions for the new era of open networking. Our focus is on solving network challenges and enhancing the competitiveness of our customers. Our clientele includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments, and thousands of enterprises. At Smartoptics, we value inclusivity and prioritize the well-being of our employees. We foster a positive company culture and provide a supportive work environment.

title: Senior Developer
description:
Description
 



 Interview Format: Online
 



 Scope: 100%
 



 Duration: One year
 



 Maximum allowed notice period for selected candidate: ASAP
 



 Location: Södertälje (Hybrid – 2–3 days on-site per week)
 



 Language: English
 







 Assignment Overview:
 



 As an Embedded Software Developer, you will play a key role in developing safety-critical, real-time transmission management systems within a modern automotive environment supporting both ICE and BEV products.
 



 You will be involved across the full development lifecycle, from concept and requirements to implementation, testing, and verification -contributing to innovative and high-quality technical solutions.
 







 Responsibilities:
 







 -Development and maintenance of control strategies and functions for transmission management systems
 



 -Implementation of gear shifting functions for ICE and BEV applications
 



 -Writing requirements, implementation, testing, verification, and documentation
 



 -Software development primarily in C, with additional work in Matlab/Simulink
 



 -Performing testing through unit tests, SIL (Software-in-the-Loop), and vehicle-level testing
 



 -Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver robust and safe solutions
 







 Education:
 







 -Master’s degree in relevant field (Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or similar)
 







 Experience:
 







 Must Have (Non-negotiable):
 







 -Transmission management software development experience
 



 -Strong experience in C
 



 -Experience with Matlab/Simulink
 







 Nice To Have:
 







 -Experience with Python
 



 -Experience in embedded software development, control systems, or vehicle development
 



 -Knowledge of automotive communication protocols (CAN, CAN FD, Ethernet)
 



 -Experience with testing methodologies (unit testing, integration, SIL, vehicle testing)
 



 -Familiarity with TRATON in-house systems
 



 -Experience working with functional safety (ISO 26262)
 







 Personal / Soft Skills:
 







 -Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
 



 -Ability to work independently and in a team
 



 -Structured and quality-focused mindset
 



 -Good communication skills
 



 -Proactive and adaptable approach

title: Embedded Software Developer
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* You have a Master’s degree in relevant field (Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or similar)
* You have transmission management software development experience
* You have strong experience in C
* You have experience with Matlab/Simulink


**Meritorious**
* Experience with Python
* Experience in embedded software development, control systems, or vehicle development
* Knowledge of automotive communication protocols (CAN, CAN FD, Ethernet)
* Experience with testing methodologies (unit testing, integration, SIL, vehicle testing)
* Experience working with functional safety (ISO 26262)


**Application deadline:** 
 21-05-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.
   

  

 🌴 Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?
   

  

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: System Developer
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone’s contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimize our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As a System Developer in our Stockholm headquarters, you’ll join a skilled development team working at the intersection of fashion, retail, and technology. This role is ideal for someone with 1-2 years of experience in Dynamics 365 F&O and Azure integrations who is ready to take the next step and deepen their expertise in a dynamic, global environment.
   

  

 You’ll collaborate closely with senior developers, testers, IT Business Partners, and teams across the company. Together, you’ll design, build, and maintain solutions that support our global operations - from purchasing and logistics to retail and finance. Our tech stack includes Dynamics 365 F&O, Azure integration services, and Azure DevOps.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

 WHAT YOU WILL DO
   

  

 As System Developer your main contribution will be to build and maintain solutions that support our global operations. You will report to the Head of System Development & Business Relations. You will play a vital role in the development team where you will:
   

  

* Develop, test, deploy, and maintain software solutions and integrations that align with our architectural and coding standards
* Grow your craft with coaching from experienced senior developers
* Contribute to solution design and take an active role in technical discussions
* Write clean, structured, and well‑documented code
* Participate in code reviews and offer constructive, thoughtful feedback
* Troubleshoot and resolve defects, performance challenges, and technical debt
* Partner with IT Business Partners to assess needs and estimate development efforts
* Provide third‑line support and help diagnose production issues
* Collaborate closely with QA to refine testing practices and shape effective test strategies
* Highlight risks, gaps, and potential business impact throughout development
* Continuously seek ways to improve our tools, processes, and systems
* Share knowledge generously and contribute to a collaborative, learning‑focused culture


 WHO YOU ARE
   

  

 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

 Specific personal qualities for this role:
   

  

* You enjoy solving problems and understanding how systems support business processes
* You’re driven by improving how things work and creating clarity in complexity
* You feel comfortable asking questions, sharing ideas, and collaborating closely with others
* You’re eager to grow your skills - and you value a workplace where clarity, simplicity, and quality truly matter


 Specific experience and knowledge for this role:
   

  

* 1-2 years of hands‑on experience with Dynamics 365 F&O development (X++)
* Experience with Azure integrations is a strong plus
* A solid understanding of software development principles and coding standards
* Experience working in - or supporting - processes within retail is an advantage
* A structured, solution‑oriented approach to work
* Curiosity and an interest in AI, automation, and innovation
* A collaborative mindset and a genuine interest in learning and contributing
* Fluency in English


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.

title: Forward Deployed Engineer | Saab
description:
*Do you want to help bridge the gap between today and the future - and play a key role in driving Saab's digital transformation? This is not a traditional developer role. It's a role for curious minds who enjoy variety, creativity and deep technical thinking.* 




  





**Your role** 




 As a Forward Deployed Engineer, you'll work close to our internal product teams, understand their challenges, and turn them into smart, scalable technical solutions. You'll explore new technologies, learn fast and help shape the foundations of future Saab systems.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Work hands-on with complex technical problems across different product areas
* Build and improve shared platforms and components used throughout Saab
* Explore and apply technologies like AI, cloud, edge computing and real-time systems
* Collaborate with engineers, architects and domain experts
* Turn ambiguous challenges into clear, elegant solutions
* Influence technical direction and long-term platform strategy



  





**About you** 




 You're someone who enjoys understanding how things work - and how they could work better. You learn quickly, think in systems and like solving problems that don't have obvious answers. Your background might be in software development, systems engineering, data engineering, research engineering or something else entirely. What matters is how you think.
 



  





**You bring** 



* Strong programming ability (language doesn't matter - thinking does)
* Hands-on use of AI to solve technical problems
* Curiosity and a desire to explore new technologies
* Ability to break down complex problems
* A collaborative mindset and willingness to share knowledge
* Experience from building or working with technical systems



  





**Bonus if you have** 



* Experience with AI/ML, cloud, edge or distributed systems
* Interest in platform engineering or architecture
* Experience from real-time or safety-critical environments



  





*Some of our roles require security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation. For roles where Saab has requirements for security classification, this may in some cases entail requirements for a certain citizenship.* 




  





**What you become part of** 




**Common Tech** 
 's mission is to create shared technical capabilities for all of Saab. By developing and managing shared platforms, technical frameworks and ways of working, Common Tech enables efficient, consistent and long-term technology development across the entire organisation. The goal is to give Saab's teams the right technical foundation to develop advanced products with high quality, safety and reliability.
 



  





**Product Tech** 
 is one of several departments within Common Tech and focuses on developing and evolving technical solutions used across multiple products and systems. Here, reusable components, shared functionality and technical solutions are built that help product teams work faster and more structured, while maintaining high standards for stability and quality.
 



  





**Saab** 
 is a leading defence and security company with a clear mission: to help protect people and societies. With around 20,000 employees worldwide, Saab develops advanced technology through close collaboration between people, competencies and disciplines. The company is characterised by an inclusive culture where collaboration, learning and long-term development are central.
 



  





*These positions require approved security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation.* 




  





**Application** 




 This recruitment process is managed by Jefferson Wells on behalf of Saab, meaning you will be directly employed by Saab. For questions about the position, please contact recruiter Mark Ferrer.
 



  





 We do not accept applications by email due to GDPR.
 



  





**Selection and interviews are ongoing. We warmly welcome your application!**

title: Unreal Engine Developer (Gameplay)
description:
*Do you want to work at the intersection of Unreal Engine, AI, real-time animation and cutting-edge streaming technology? At Avanti Studios, you will be part of building next-generation live casino experiences that blur the line between reality and gameplay. By combining motion capture, advanced gameplay systems and photorealistic real-time rendering, the team is pushing the boundaries of what interactive entertainment can look and feel like.* 




  





**About the role** 




 As an Unreal Engine Developer at Avanti Studios, you will architect and implement core gameplay systems for a new generation of interactive live casino experiences. You will work in a highly technical environment where gameplay programming, multiplayer functionality, motion capture and real-time rendering come together to create photorealistic digital human experiences. You will collaborate closely with animators and technical disciplines in a team with strong focus on innovation, performance and R&D.
 



  





 The role is based in Stockholm and the team primarily works from the office.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 




 You will play a central role in developing Avanti’s platform and gameplay systems. Your responsibilities will include:
 


* Design and implement gameplay systems for live casino games using Unreal Engine
* Integrate WebRTC streaming technology with gameplay mechanics
* Work with Metahuman characters and live capture data integration
* Develop player interaction systems that combine responsive gameplay with real-time character behaviour that works seamlessly with live dealer streams
* Create robust, scalable multiplayer game logic and networking solutions
* Optimize performance for web-based streaming environments with real-time Metahuman rendering
* Collaborate closely with animators and artists to integrate motion capture data into Metahuman characters
* Implement UI/UX systems for player interaction and game controls
* Contribute to gameplay architecture, technical tooling and long-term platform development



  





**Your profile** 




 We believe you have several years of hands-on experience working in Unreal Engine within gaming or other technically advanced real-time environments. You likely have experience developing gameplay systems, multiplayer functionality and/or interactive experiences where responsiveness and performance are critical.
 



  





 To succeed in the role, we also see that you have:
 


* Strong experience with Unreal Engine, preferably UE5.5 or UE5.6 as well as strong proficiency in C++
* Experience with Blueprint visual scripting
* Solid understanding of gameplay programming patterns and architecture
* Knowledge of networking and multiplayer game development
* Familiarity with WebRTC or streaming technologies (preferred)
* Experience optimizing for performance and memory constraints
* Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
* Portfolio demonstrating gameplay development work
* Fluent in English, written and spoken



  





 Experience with Human Behaviour AI, real-time streaming or video integration, as well as familiarity with Metahuman and live capture systems, is considered meritorious. Experience optimizing Metahuman performance for streaming environments is also highly relevant for the role. In addition, experience from the gaming or gambling industry, including understanding of casino game mechanics and player behaviour, is seen as a strong advantage.
 



  





**About Avanti Studios** 




 Avanti Studios is an innovative technology company at the forefront of next-generation live casino solutions within the iGaming industry. By combining Unreal Engine, motion capture, AI-generated characters, 3D animation, and cloud-based real-time streaming, the company creates scalable and immersive gaming experiences for leading operators such as LeoVegas and Svenska Spel. Powered by Google Cloud, Avanti’s platform is built for continuous deployment and delivers highly realistic, fully customizable multiplayer experiences at scale. The company is in an exciting growth phase, offering an international and technically driven environment with strong startup energy, solid backing, and ambitious expansion plans for the future.
 



  





**Your application** 




 Avanti Studios is partnering with Academic Search International in this recruitment process. Please apply via the “Apply now” button below where you can submit your CV and application. All information is handled confidentially in accordance with Academic Search’s Privacy Policy and GDPR regulations.
 



  





 For more information about the position, please contact Researcher Amelia Kämpeberg at amelia.kampeberg@academicsearch.se
 



  





 We look forward to receiving your application as soon as possible as interviews are conducted continuously.
 



  





 Academic Search International is one of Scandinavia’s leading Executive Search and Interim Management firms. We specialize in recruiting managers and specialists and collaborate closely with both national and international companies across a wide range of industries.

title: Forward-Deployed Software Engineer
description:
**About KLAR Partners** 




 KLAR is a Northern European private equity firm (~€2bn AUM) investing in business services and industrial technology across the Nordics, DACH, Benelux, and the UK. We own and operate 10+ portfolio companies with over 10,000 employees combined.
 



  





 Each runs on its own combination of ERPs, CRMs, field-service tools, and accounting systems, and each has workflows where the right piece of software would meaningfully impact how the business operates and how it performs financially. This role exists to find those workflows and build for them – backend, integrations, and AI, where it earns its place.
 



  





**The role** 




 This is a key technical hire into KLAR's Catalyst Team (KCT), KLAR’s value-creation team working hands-on inside portfolio companies on 4-8 week implementation sprints. As such, you will play a key role in defining the technical foundation: the stack, architecture, and engineering patterns that future deployments will build on.
 



  





**What you will do** 




 You will work hands-on inside portfolio companies with existing infrastructure, such as ERPs, CRMs, field service tools, and accounting systems, and build production software on top of them. The work spans backend development, systems integration, AI/LLM deployment, workflow automation, and cloud infrastructure.
 



  





 You will work in focused 4-8 week sprints, shipping real software into production at the end of each engagement. This is a hands-on role with regular on-site work alongside teams across Northern Europe.
 



  





**Day to day, this means:** 



* Work inside portfolio companies to understand workflows, then ship software that improves them
* Architect and build APIs and backend services that can integrate AI models to business systems
* Integrate with enterprise software such as SAP, Dynamics, Salesforce, and custom or legacy tools.
* Deploy LLM-based applications into production, such as RAG pipelines, agents, and copilots
* Automate manual workflows end-to-end, including document processing, classification, and elimination of data entry
* Set up and manage cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, and containerisation
* Turn prototypes into reliable production systems with proper error handling, logging, and monitoring
* Build internal tools and interfaces



  





**What we are looking for** 




 You have 5+ years of experience building and shipping production software, and a track record of delivering AI-powered features or products in real-world environments. Above all, you've owned production software end-to-end: built it, shipped it, and operated it long enough to know what production actually demands.
 



  





 You've worked at the intersection of AI capabilities and business needs, and you're comfortable being the only technical person in a room of non-technical operators. You can navigate imperfect systems and undocumented APIs, push back when the requirement is wrong, and ship pragmatically when it is right. You know how to turn messy problems into software that actually gets used. You find lifting performance in a real operating business as interesting as the technology that does it.
 



  





 Python is the primary language, but strong engineering judgement and a pragmatic approach to problem-solving matter more than stack preferences. You're comfortable across cloud environments like AWS or Azure, and you adapt your architecture and tooling to fit the situation.
 



  





**Technical requirements** 



* Strong Python skills and comfort with at least one other backend language
* Experience designing, building, and deploying production APIs
* Solid SQL and database design skills
* Experience integrating with enterprise systems (ERPs, CRMs, or similar)
* Cloud infrastructure, CI/CD, Docker, and IaC fundamentals
* Working knowledge of networking fundamentals (VPNs, firewalls, on-prem to cloud connectivity)
* Experience with LLMs and AI tooling, including prompt engineering, RAG, and agents



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Background in forward-deployed engineering, technical consulting, or early-stage B2B startups
* Experience in the PE/VC industry, or a strong interest in applying AI to private equity and business development
* Exposure to industrial, field services, or business services environments
* TypeScript/frontend basics
* Experience working directly with non-technical end-users



  





**What we offer** 



* Shape a new function from the ground up inside a fast-growing PE firm with ~€2bn AUM
* Direct, measurable impact: the things you build show up in financial results
* Variety: no two portfolio companies are the same – field services, industrial technology, and business services, across different countries and systems
* A small, senior, and agile team with no bureaucratic overhead and big ambitions
* Competitive compensation with upside tied to portfolio value creation



  





 KLAR Partners is collaborating with Safemind as a recruitment partner on this recruitment.

title: Senior developer Dynamics 365 CE Stockholm
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Med över 50 000 experter globalt och som certifierad och managerad Microsoft Cloud Partner på högsta nivån, har vi kompetensen och specialiseringar att leverera hållbara, smarta lösningar som gör verklig skillnad. På Sopra Steria förenar vi teknik och syfte för att driva digital transformation med Azure OpenAI, Copilot, BI, Dynamics 365 och Power Platform. Tillsammans med våra kunder förenklar vi processer, stärker kundrelationer och skapar värde för både verksamhet och samhälle. Genom att tillämpa AI där det ger störst effekt hjälper vi organisationer att ta nästa steg i sin digitala resa.
   

  

 Hos oss på Sopra Steria arbetar du med alla delar av utvecklingsprocessen, från koncept till implementation och förvaltning. Du får bryta ner komplexa problem och skapa anpassade lösningar till kunder med den allra senaste tekniken, med grund i Microsofts hela portfölj av tjänster. Som utvecklare rör vi oss över hela stacken, vilket gör att arbetsuppgifterna under en vecka kan variera. Att arbeta med Microsofts paraply av molntjänster, som dessutom ständigt utökas, gör att du kan bli specialist inom ditt kompetensområde, men ändå alltid ha mer att lära.
   

  

 Vi söker en person som vill vara med och driva den egna och andras utveckling, som vill agera mentor åt juniora, men också leda utvecklingsteam och vara ytterst ansvarig för den tekniska implementationen. Som utvecklare samarbetar man nära med den tekniska arkitekten för att säkerställa leveransens kvalitet.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifterna som utvecklare hos oss kan t.ex. innebära att:
   

  

* Anpassa funktionaliteten i Dynamics CE genom utveckling av tillägg i C# och klientanpassningar i JavaScript/TypeScript
* Skapa .NET Core-applikationer för att integrera till och från Dynamics CE
* Skapa low code-lösningar baserat på Power Apps och Power Automate
* Skapa förutsägbara och stabila releaser med verktyg som Azure DevOps, TeamCity, Octopus Deploy m.fl.


**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har tidigare erfarenhet av .NET-utveckling inom Dynamics CE:
   

  

* 3 års erfarenhet som utvecklare backend, C# .NET
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse, Azure eller andra kringliggande tjänster inom området
* God kommunikativ förmåga i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift


 Det är även meriterande att ha erfarenhet och/eller intresse av Copilot studio och generativ AI.
   

  

**Varför välja Sopra Steria**
 Hos oss får du ett stabilt bolag med stora kunder och resurser, i kombination med entreprenörsanda och stark teamkänsla. Vi erbjuder utmanande uppdrag där du kan bidra tekniskt för att göra skillnad i samhället. Med kollektivavtal, marknadsmässiga löner, flexibilitet och en kultur präglad av kunskapsdelning och samarbete vill vi ge dig riktigt bra förutsättningar för att lyckas. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss här.
   

  

**Några av våra förmåner:**
* 5 000 kr i friskvård samt hälsostöd för dig och din familj
* 30 dagars semester samt två extra lediga dagar per år
* Certifieringsbonus och aktiv kompetensutveckling
* Initiativ för träning och gemenskap
* Stark föräldralön, tjänstepension och försäkringar
* Bidrag till hemmakontor och arbetsutrustning


**Ansök nu – vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!**
 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

 Rekryteringsprocessen består av tre intervjuer, personlighet- och logiktest, referenstagning och bakgrundskontroll. Denna kombination av urvalsmetoder ger oss en bredare och mer rättvis bild av dig som kandidat, samtidigt som det säkerställer att både dina tekniska och personliga styrkor kommer till sin rätt. För dig som kandidat innebär det en möjlighet att visa din kompetens och potential från flera perspektiv.
   

  

 Om du har frågor om tjänsten eller oss som bolag är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryterare, Theresia, på theresia.wiclander@soprasteria.com

title: Operations Coordinator
description:
*The world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service is looking for a* 
***Platform/Operations Coordinator***
*to join the band in a consultant assignment. The client has transformed music listening forever when launched in 2008.* 




  





***Period:***
*ASAP to 2026-12-31 (full-time), with a possibility of extension.* 




  





**About the role** 




 As part of our clients mission to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the opportunity to enjoy and be inspired by these creators, they are providing a variety of products that enable developers all over the world to build outstanding experiences for consumers - search for and interact with content, create and manage playlists or play music or podcasts.
 



  





 To support our clients efforts to create the best possible experience for our users and partners while maintaining a safe and secure platform, they are now looking for help reviewing requests for access and ensuring that any integration follows their Terms of Service. This will include the manual handling of cases based on existing guidelines, optimization of processes together with the Product teams, and interaction with other parts of the company like Legal, Business Development, and Licensing.
 



  





 While the team have made progress in automating parts of the process using AI, manual reviews are still required for more complex cases, and they've a legal requirement to keep a human in the loop.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




 This is a cross-organizational coordination role that will manage the operational aspects of keeping the platform up and running and in a good state. This person will be responsible for the manual review process, run the exemption process, coordinate mission ownership mapping, and escalate enforcement decisions.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Proactively review and investigate the usage of the Developer Platform.
* Handle requests for platform access and take decisions based on existing guidelines – covering the complex cases which the AI automation can’t take a decision on.
* Detects patterns and common themes in those requests and other data points.
* Continue to develop and optimize processes for the existing review and investigation workflows.
* Ensure consistent and efficient handling of exemptions.
* Coordinate mission ownership across teams to avoid gaps and ambiguity.
* Manage the appeals process.



  





**Who you are** 



* You have some technical background, e.g., studies in Information Technology or Information Systems or have had relevant work experience.
* You have experience with proactive investigation and research, categorizing data, and handling requests with limited guidelines.
* You have preferably worked in some sort of administrative or support role.
* You have some experience with data research, for example using SQL.
* You have an excellent command of the English language and good communication skills.
* You are self-driven and can navigate through ambiguity. You’re comfortable balancing multiple concurrent projects in an agile and fast-paced environment.
* You are truly a “do-er”, willing to get hands-on, solving any problems needed to help projects move forward.
* You are flexible, collaborative, and open-minded and thrive in a fast-changing environment.
* Should you have experience with legal or compliance matters this is a bonus.



  





**We are Market Partner** 




*Market Partner is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome to our community regardless of who you are, no matter where you come from, or what you look like. We apply ongoing selection and may fill the position as soon as we find the right candidate.*

title: AI Enablement Lead
description:
**About the Company** 




  





 FDJ UNITED operates in igaming under strict regulatory oversight. Security and governance are not optional extras here — they are the baseline.
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 We are looking for an AI Enablement Lead who can make teams self-sufficient in building and deploying AI solutions— not someone who builds for them. This is a coaching and upskilling role with genuine technical depth. You need to know how production AI systems work so you can credibly train others to build, test, document, and govern their own. You will work across OBG's Technology function, driving adoption of our internal AI platform (KAIT) from early-adopter usage into mainstream, habitual practice. That means running workshops where people leave having built working solutions themselves, coaching product and engineering teams through scoping and delivering their own AI use cases, and ensuring that security, data governance, and release processes are embedded from the very first conversation — not bolted on at the end. Today, roughly 20% of employees generate 80% of AI platform activity. Your job is to close that gap within Tech — upskilling teams so they move from occasional use to confident, governed, daily AI-assisted working. Where you spot gaps in process, documentation, or governance, you flag them and work with the relevant owners to close them.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  





**Technical Coaching & Upskilling** 



* Design and deliver hands-on technical workshops for Tech teams — the kind where participants build and ship working AI agents themselves, not watch someone else do it.
* Coach engineers and domain experts through identifying real use cases in their function, scoping them rigorously, and building their first working solutions on KAIT. Your success is measured by what they can do independently after you've worked with them.
* Run structured AI opportunity audits within Tech teams: helping teams assess which use cases are quick wins they can deliver themselves, which need Architect-level guidance, and which are not worth pursuing.
* Create technical training content covering topics such as RAG (connecting AI to internal knowledge bases), AI agent design, prompt engineering, and API integration — written for a Tech audience, grounded in real OBG scenarios.
* Provide floor support during workshop sessions, including live debugging and troubleshooting — guiding participants through solving problems, not solving for them.



**Governance, Security & Process** 



* Ensure security, data governance, and compliance are embedded into every use case from the start — not treated as a gate at the end. Train teams to think about data classification, human oversight, and audit requirements as part of their design process.
* Upskill teams on OBG's Technology Release Process so they can self-serve: preparing documentation, completing governance checklists, and meeting production standards without needing hand-holding.
* Identify gaps in existing processes, documentation, or governance frameworks and flag them to the relevant owners. Where guidance is missing or unclear, work with A&I and platform teams to close those gaps through training and upskilling.



**Use Case Pipeline & Enablement at Scale** 



* Coach Tech Innovators (domain experts building use cases) through the full lifecycle: from identifying where AI adds genuine value, through scoping and prototyping, to handing off complex builds for Architect-level support where needed.
* For high-complexity use cases (multi-system integrations, MCP connectors, RAG pipelines), guide and upskill the teams responsible for delivery rather than owning the build yourself. Your role is to transfer capability, not accumulate it.
* Assess incoming use cases and route them correctly: straightforward agent builds that teams can own, strategic projects needing deeper technical support, and cases that belong in data science or other disciplines rather than KAIT.



**Developer Productivity (Secondary — ~20% of Time)** 



* Deliver structured workshops and a best-practice guide for coding assistant adoption (e.g. GitHub Copilot, Cursor) across engineering teams. Engineering team leads retain accountability for sustained adoption in their teams.
* This is a secondary workstream. If the main AI enablement pipeline requires full capacity, developer productivity work is deprioritised.



  





**Qualifications** 




  





**Required Skills & Qualifications** 



* 4–7 years in a hands-on technical role — data engineering, AI/ML engineering, solutions architecture, or DevOps — with a subsequent move into enablement, consultancy, or internal transformation.
* Proven experience coaching technical teams to build and deploy AI agents or RAG pipelines in production — not just building them yourself.
* Hands-on with at least one low-code/no-code automation platform (e.g. n8n) — enough to credibly train others.
* Strong prompt engineering knowledge: system-level prompts, structured output, chain-of-thought, evaluation techniques — and the ability to teach these to others.
* Solid understanding of enterprise integration patterns: REST APIs, OAuth/SSO authentication, rate limiting, data flow between systems.
* Demonstrable commitment to governance and process: you embed security, data classification, and compliance into how teams work, and you flag gaps when processes are missing or unclear.
* Track record of delivering technical workshops where participants built tangible solutions themselves — not lecture-based training.
* Ability to translate complex technical concepts clearly for non-technical audiences and present credibly to senior stakeholders.



**Highly Desirable** 



* Experience in a regulated industry: igaming, fintech, or financial services.
* Hands-on n8n experience for production workflow automation.
* Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or similar frameworks for connecting AI agents to enterprise systems.
* Experience with LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) for inference and evaluation.
* Working knowledge of vector databases, embedding models, and semantic search.
* Experience with coding assistants (GitHub Copilot, Cursor) in a developer productivity context.
* Multi-site or international delivery experience.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Senior Data Engineer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 As a
 **Senior Data Engineer** 
 , you will be a technical leader in our growing data team. You'll work closely with product, analytics, and commercial teams to shape our data architecture and drive the evolution of our platform. Our stack is built on
 **Databricks** 
 running on
 **AWS** 
 , supporting both
 **batch and real-time** 
 data pipelines. You'll design
 **scalable systems** 
 using
 **PySpark** 
 and modern lakehouse patterns, and help define what excellent data engineering looks like across the company.
   

  

 You'll own and evolve our
 **Unity Catalog** 
 setup, ensuring robust data governance, lineage, and access control as the platform scales. In addition, you'll play a central role in
 **mentoring** 
 , influencing
 **technical direction** 
 , and supporting a modern data-driven culture at Viaplay.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Design and build robust, scalable batch and streaming data pipelines on Databricks
* Own and develop our Unity Catalog implementation - governance, lineage, and access policies
* Help shape our long-term data platform strategy and tooling
* Ensure the quality, performance, and reliability of our data products
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet business and analytics needs
* Champion engineering best practices: clean code, testing, observability, peer reviews
* Mentor and guide other engineers through technical leadership and knowledge sharing


**What We’re Looking For**
 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* 5+ years of experience in data engineering, with a proven track record in a senior or lead capacity
* Strong hands-on experience with Databricks and PySpark
* Solid understanding of Unity Catalog, data governance, and access control patterns
* Deep knowledge of AWS Cloud services and infrastructure
* Hands-on experience with streaming frameworks
* Strong programming skills in Python (Scala/Java is a plus)
* Familiarity with data modeling, versioning, and orchestration tools


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Infrastructure as code and CI/CD experience
* Focus on developer experience and platform scalability
* Contributions to open-source or internal engineering communities


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Senior Backend Developer – Token Services
description:
*Vill du arbeta med en av ATG:s mest affärskritiska plattformar och vara med och säkerställa trygg, stabil och säker identitetshantering för miljontals kunder? Trivs du i en tekniskt avancerad miljö där höga krav på tillgänglighet, säkerhet och kvalitet går hand i hand med samarbete och lärande? Då kan det här vara rollen för dig.* 




  





**I rollen får du:** 




 • Vidareutveckla, förvalta och kvalitetssäkra ATG:s Token Services‑plattform för autentisering och inloggning
 



 • Arbeta med backendutveckling, integrationer, felsökning och prestandaoptimering i en affärskritisk miljö
 



 • Säkerställa hög tillgänglighet, stabilitet och säkerhet i lösningar som används av miljoner kunde
 



 • Utveckla och förvalta tjänster baserade på OAuth2 och OpenID i en modern mikrotjänstarkitektur
 



 • Samarbeta med samtliga produktvertikaler inom Häst, Sport och Casino
 



 • Arbeta med containerbaserade lösningar och drift i Kubernetes‑miljöer
 



 • Bidra till god kodkvalitet genom testning, kodgranskning och gemensamma tekniska principer
 



 • Vara en aktiv del i teamets tekniska beslut, förbättringsarbete och lärande kultur
 



  





 Som Senior Backend Developer inom Token Services hos Cyber Engineering blir du en nyckelperson i teamet Miami, som ansvarar för ATG:s centrala plattform för inloggning och autentisering. Plattformen hanterar transaktioner och inloggning för hundratusentals samtidiga användare, särskilt under högbelastade perioder, vilket ställer mycket höga krav på stabilitet, tillgänglighet och säkerhet. Token Services är en central del av ATG:s mikrotjänstarkitektur och bygger på tokenbaserad autentisering med OAuth2 och OpenID. Här arbetar du nära både produktteam och plattformsfunktioner med stort eget ansvar, korta beslutsvägar och fokus på robust leverans även under extrem belastning. Du arbetar i ett engagerat och erfaret team inom Cyber Engineering med starkt fokus på IT‑säkerhet, identitetshantering och motståndskraft i en allt mer komplex hotbild.
 



  





**Är det här du?** 




 Vi söker dig som är en trygg och erfaren backendutvecklare med ett genuint intresse för säkerhet, identitet och hur tekniska plattformar samverkar i stor skala. Du är analytisk, strukturerad och delar gärna med dig av din kunskap till andra.
 



  





 Vi ser att du har:
 



 • Flera års erfarenhet av backendutveckling i Java, gärna i säkerhets‑ eller plattformsnära miljöer
 



 • Erfarenhet av OAuth2, OpenID och tokenbaserad autentisering
 



 • God vana av Java, Spring och Spring Boot
 



 • Erfarenhet av arbete i container‑ och molnbaserade miljöer (Docker, Kubernetes)
 



 • Vana att arbeta med Git/GitHub i teambaserad utveckling
 



 • God kommunikativ förmåga och är bekväm med att arbet på engelsk
 



 • Ett pragmatiskt och lösningsorienterat arbetssätt i samarbete med andra team
 



  





 Meriterande:
 



 • Erfarenhet av agila utvecklingsmetoder
 



 • OpenShift
 



 • AWS, exempelvis EKS
 



  





 Som person är du prestigelös, driven och samarbetsorienterad. Du trivs i team, tar ansvar för helheten och bidrar aktivt till en lärande och inkluderande kultur.
 



  





**"När medarbetaren växer och utvecklas, så utvecklas jag och företaget, därför baseras mitt ledarskap på öppenhet, engagemang och tillit."** 
 Samarbete, transparens och inkluderande är även viktiga ledord för mig. Jag har arbetat många år inom IT, där erfarenheter från att vara produktägare, lösningsarkitekt, scrum master och utvecklare är något som jag tar med mig i min roll som ledare. Jag eftersträvar engagerade och motiverade medarbetare, där jag med glimten i ögat försöker kratta vägen för framgång. ATG har ett unikt hållbarhetsfokus, både ur ett kund-, miljö- och medarbetarperspektiv vilket är något som jag tilltalas mycket av. Som del av Cyber Engineering hos Cyber Security kommer du få en central roll i att förbättra vår motståndskraft kring identitetshantering och IT-säkerhet i en värld där cyber blir ett mer intensivt slagfält och en nyckel till framgång. På min fritid så gillar jag att hålla i gång, jag tränar och åker skidor, snickrar på huset och umgås gärna med familj och vänner.
 



 Jag ser fram emot att dela min fortsatta resa på ATG tillsammans med dig!
 



**- Rekryterande chef, Fredric Larsson, IT Manager – Cyber Engineering** 




  





**We are the game** 




 I mer än 50 år har vi på ATG levererat spänning och underhållning till svenska folket. Vi drivs av att trygga den svenska hästnäringen och att fortsatt vara ett ansvarsfullt spelbolag i framkant. Vår vision är att leverera världens bästa spelupplevelse. Hos oss är du en del av en innovativ miljö – med hjälp av den senaste tekniken utvecklar vi spelupplevelser i världsklass. Självledarskap och kompetensutveckling är viktiga delar för oss. Sedan starten 1974 har vi byggt och förvaltat systemen för våra produkter som hanterar 4 500 000 transaktioner per dag.
 



  





**Join the game!** 




 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan via vår rekryteringsportal antingen med ditt cv eller din LinkedIn-profil – det som är enklast och smidigast för dig. Läs gärna mer om oss på vår karriärsida och tveka inte att höra av dig om du har frågor om tjänsten.
 



  





 Vi tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning och kommer att göra en bakgrundskontroll för denna roll. Tjänsten är på heltid och utgår från vårt kontor vid Solvalla, alldeles intill travbanan. Vi har ett flexibelt arbetssätt vilket innebär att du har möjlighet att kombinera distansarbete med arbete från kontoret. Var med och bygg världens bästa spelupplevelse tillsammans med oss!

title: Diagnostic and Troubleshooting Method Engineer
description:
TRATON is a group of strong brands with a shared mission: transforming transportation together to create the future of sustainable transport solutions. Within TRATON, we include MAN, Scania, Volkswagen Truck & Bus, and International. As part of a global team of industry experts, you get to think bigger, experience more, and reach further. Together, we have the power to transform transportation - Let´s make a difference together. Find out more: www.traton.com
   

  

  

  

 Our values – customer first, respect, team spirit, responsibility, and elimination of waste – are at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

**Role Summary**
*This role is a part of TRATON Group R&D, located in Södertälje, Sweden*
 Are you an engineer with a strong interest in programming and vehicles? Then you might be the one we’re looking for!
   

  

 We are looking for someone who is service-oriented and enjoys combining theory, practice, and problem-solving. As a developer here, or as we call them: Method Engineer, you will be responsible for diagnostic and troubleshooting support for TRATON’s products, with a primary focus on one or more areas such as electrified vehicles or cab systems including autonomous solutions. TRATON includes Scania, MAN, International, and Volkswagen Truck & Bus.
   

  

**Job Responsibilities**
 To make our workshop tool usable across all TRATON brands, we are expanding one of our teams – Powertrain Diagnostic, TGROSVP:
   

  

  

* Your role involves developing diagnostic and troubleshooting support in close collaboration with system and function owners. As a diagnostic method engineer, you are the voice of the mechanics in development projects, and your deliveries have a direct impact on their daily work, which is crucial for the profitability of both TRATON and our customers.
* You will develop diagnostic methods, implement and test them on rigs and in vehicles. You will operate at the intersection of mechatronics, software development, and business decisions.
* Our new cloud-based troubleshooting tool, the Workshop Suite, presents great opportunities to work with system developers to improve the mechanics’ daily work. You will help take troubleshooting support on this new platform to the next level!


**Who You Are**
 To succeed in this role, you need to be driven, curious, proactive, and quality-conscious. Since the role involves many interfaces, you should be good at networking and building relationships, be attentive, and understand what is important to the customer. You are structured and good at prioritizing and planning your work.
   

  

 We hire for attitude and train for competence!
   

  

 Requirements for this role:
   

  

  

* A bachelor’s or master’s degree in mechatronics, mechanical engineering, or a similar field, or experience working with system development, vehicle systems, or programming.
* Strong interest in or curiosity about programming.
* Minimum category B driver’s license.
* Fluent in English, both written and spoken.
* Fluent in Swedish is a merit.
* Since we are working with the powertrain mainly, knowledge about fuel system, aftertreatment systems or brake system is valuable.
* Hands-on experience with vehicles or previous work at TRATON or Scania or other brands is a plus.


*We welcome applicants from all backgrounds – your unique experience and perspectives is valuable to us.*
**This Is Us**
 We offer a diverse and inclusive workplace with varied and challenging tasks in a hybrid work format, meaning you can work from home or from our remote office at Scania Sergel a few days a week, depending on the job. Of course, we will provide you with a development plan so you can reach your goals and receive the right support along the way. TRATON offers many opportunities to grow your career both nationally and internationally. Professional development is a priority for us, and training through internal and external courses is encouraged and supported. We offer a varied position where theory is combined with hands-on work, and you are involved in all phases of the project.
   

  

*Within TRATON Group R&D, you are an important part of something bigger. Joining us means gaining access to the ins and outs of the entire transportation industry.*
**TRATON Offers**
 We offer a dynamic, flexible workplace with hybrid work options, including Scania Sergel and Midway hubs. With a structured development plan and courses, TRATON Group R&D supports your career growth both locally and internationally.
   

  

 Benefits include wellness allowance, bonus, flexible hours, and company car leasing. We also host events for employees and their families, and Stockholm residents enjoy direct access to Södertälje via Scania Job express buses for an easy commute to Södertälje.
   

  

**Application**
 We look forward to receiving your application, consisting of your CV and kindly ask you not to share a cover letter to ensure an efficient and unbiased recruitment process for all parties.
   

  

 Apply as soon as possible, no later than 2026-06-01
 **.** 
 Screening will take place on an ongoing basis during the application period. Logical and personality tests may be used as part of the selection process, and a background check may be required for this role.
   

  

**If you have questions or would like more information, please contact:**
 Johan Collberg Unit Head Powertrain Diagnostics, johan.collberg@scania.com
   

  

**We look forward to your application!**
***This recruitment process is handled by Scania for TRATON Group R&D.***

title: Tracking Implementation Specialist
description:
Digital Customer Offering (DCO) is a business function within Fortum Consumer Solutions, where business and technology come together. At DCO, we create superior digital offerings and experiences for our 2,4 million consumer and enterprise customers. We innovate and find new ways to digitalize our offerings and processes. We collaborate closely with our stakeholders and external partners. Through cross-functional collaboration, agility and sustainability focus, we strive to make our customers’ increasingly digital lives easier with our services. We serve clients in the Nordics as well as Poland and Spain.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are now looking for a Tracking Implementation Specialist to join our Martech team in DCO.
   

  

 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Manage and develop tracking and data collection across Google Tag Manager. You will implement and maintain pixels, events, and conversion tracking across platforms (e.g. Meta, Google Ads, TikTok). You will also define and align the dataLayer structure to ensure accurate and consistent event tracking.
* Translate business needs into technical tracking specifications for developers and stakeholders.
* Conduct QA and debugging to ensure data accuracy and tracking quality.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to ensure seamless governance model across platforms.
* Be responsible for insuring that our data collection is compliant with GDPR regulatory rules and legislations, as well as insurance privacy compliance. You will also manage cookie consent frameworks.
* The role may also include other coding tasks in Fortum’s own systems in the MarTech area.


**About You**
 To succeed and thrive in this role, we see that you have:
   

  

* 5+ years’ experience as a Technical Web Analyst, Measurement Specialist, Front end developer with dataLayer experience or similar.
* Experience with server-side tracking setup, including container configuration and data flows.
* Deep expertise in GTM (client & server-side), dataLayer planning, and tag architecture.
* Solid knowledge of JavaScript for building dataLayer pushes, HTML and CSS as well as building custom tags and triggers.
* Strong skills in documentation and the ability to create actionable technical guidelines.
* Proven experience managing tracking across one or more e-commerce platforms.
* Excellent stakeholder management-, presentation- and communication skills.
* Confidence in coding across different MarTech systems, as the role also involves working with Fortum’s own communication platforms.
* Experience with BigQuery and BI tools such as PowerBI, Data Studio etc, will be considered an advantage.
* Fluent skills in English is required for the role. Proficiency in one of the Nordic languages is beneficial.


**We offer you**
 At Fortum, we believe in a better future and want to be involved in shaping it. Our workplace is a safe place, both physically and mentally. You will grow with professional colleagues, being trusted and free to challenge yourself. We offer comprehensive benefits, flexible working hours, and hybrid work model to support your productivity, development and wellbeing. We are committed to build diverse teams where everyone feels included and is treated equally.
   

  

 More information about our culture and benefits can be found here.
   

  

**Interested?**
 Submit your application in English latest on
 **1st of June** 
 . We start contacting suitable candidates already during the application period, and the job ad can be closed earlier if the right candidate is found. If you have direct questions about the position, please contact hiring manager Guillaume Vicidomini via email guillaume.vicidomini@fortum.com.
   

  

 To be selected for the position, the applicant must go through background clearance and a health examination including drug testing.
   

  

**We are Fortum**
 Fortum is a Nordic energy company. We generate and deliver reliable energy to our customers and the Nordic energy system while at the same time helping industries decarbonise their processes and grow. Our core operations comprise efficient and best-in-class low-carbon power generation, customer services, and heating and cooling. Fortum’s power generation is already 99% from renewable or nuclear sources with one of the lowest specific CO2-emissions in Europe. We are guided by our ambitious SBTi-validated emission reduction targets on our way towards net-zero by 2040. For our :4,500 employees, we commit to be a safe and inspiring workplace. Fortum's share is listed on Nasdaq Helsinki. fortum.com

title: Södersjukhuset söker BI-Utvecklare
description:
**Tjänsten som BI-utvecklare är placerad på Produktionsenheten är en stabsfunktion inom Produktion och Utveckling och gruppen består idag av 6 personer som arbetar nära vårdverksamheter och vårdstödjande funktioner.**




**Vi söker dig som vill vara med och driva BI-utvecklingen vid Södersjukhuset!**




 - Arbetar du idag som Dataanalytiker/Data Analyst, BI-utvecklare eller inom en liknande roll och söker nya utmaningar? Då kan denna tjänst vara något för dig!
   

  





****Arbetsbeskrivning****




 Enhetens uppdrag är att utveckla och förvalta modeller för produktion- och kapacitetsplanering, uppföljning och informationsförsörjning inom sjukvårdsproduktion. Vi arbetar både med strategiska, taktiska och operativa frågor på sjukhusövergripande nivå – både genom att driva och utveckla datadrivna processer och som stöd i större projekt. Enheten ansvarar för förvaltning och utveckling av sjukhusets BI-stöd för ekonomi, HR-data och sjukvårdsproduktion. Idag har sjukhuset ett flertal BI system där framför allt QlikSense används i hög utsträckning.
   

  





 I rollen som BI-utvecklare ingår bland annat följande arbetsuppgifter:
 


* Hämta in, förbättra och göra data tillgänglig från olika källsystem, till exempel journalsystem, ekonomisystem och personaldatasystem
* Utveckla rapporter, visualiseringar och andra beslutsstöd som används både strategiskt av ledning och operativt av vårdpersonal
* Arbeta med informations- och begreppsmodellering, med fokus på utveckling i SQL Server och Qlik Sense



 Arbetet innebär både utveckling, analys och dialog med verksamheten, där du blir en viktig länk mellan data, teknik och verksamhetsbehov.
   

  





****Kvalifikationer****




 För att lyckas och trivas i rollen har du ett analytiskt och proaktivt tillvägagångssätt. Du är van att ta egna initiativ, där du drivs av nyfikenhet samt kan agera självständigt och affärsmässigt. Du utvecklas av att utforska, visualisera samt förstå samband i data.
