title: Product Designer
description:
About us
  
We are a fully remote company building an automated AI search engine that truly understands who you are looking for. Built specifically for recruiters, our platform revolutionizes talent discovery by combining advanced AI with intuitive design to make hiring faster and smarter.
  
  

Responsibilities
  
* Lead the end-to-end product design process for our AI search platform tailored to recruiters.
* Collaborate closely with product and engineering teams in a fully remote environment.
* Translate complex AI functionalities into simple, elegant, and user-friendly interfaces.
* Conduct user research and usability testing to continuously improve the recruiter experience.


Qualifications
  
* The candidate has held the job title product designer or its equivalent.
* The candidate must hold a Master's degree.
* The candidate must be located in or within a 20 km range of Stockholm.
* The candidate should have strong proficiency in UI/UX design tools such as Figma, Sketch, or Adobe Creative Suite.
* The candidate should have a minimum of 3 years of experience in product design.
* The candidate should have a strong portfolio demonstrating user-centered design solutions.

title: UX Designer With Some Frontend
description:
Our client is one of Sweden’s fastest-growing companies.
 



  





 They are now entering a major growth phase and building a new team focused on trust & safety systems, user engagement features, and scalable digital experiences.
 



  





 We’re looking for a Senior Product Designer who wants to own the entire experience from idea → prototype → shipped product.
 



  





 Not just pretty screens. Real product ownership.
 



  





 You will work in a fast-moving team designing highly interactive experiences used by players worldwide, collaborating closely with engineers and jumping into frontend code when needed.
 



  





 You don’t need deep software experience. Just strong design instincts and a real desire to learn by shipping
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Drive product design across the full lifecycle
* Create intuitive user flows, interactions, prototypes, and refined UI
* Collaborate tightly with engineering to move quickly from concept to release
* Contribute to frontend development using modern JavaScript frameworks
* Develop reusable patterns, components, and scalable design foundations
* Iterate using user insights, testing, and product data



  





**Ideal Background** 



* Strong visual and product design instincts backed by a solid portfolio
* Ability to think holistically about systems and user experience
* Comfortable operating across both design and frontend implementation
* Experience with component-based frontend development
* Strong attention to usability, responsiveness, and interface quality
* Enjoys autonomy, speed, and high-impact product work



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Interactive product experience
* Animation/motion work
* Modern frontend frameworks
* Experimentation workflows
* Analytics familiarity.



  





 If you enjoy building ambitious digital products with high ownership and rapid execution, you’ll fit right in.

title: Creative Designer
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger—and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018—and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco—we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Creative Designer at Air Apps, you will play a crucial role in shaping our brand identity and delivering visually engaging designs across multiple platforms. You will collaborate with various teams to ensure a cohesive and compelling user experience, working on digital ads, social media content, landing pages, email campaigns, and print materials.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**Responsibilities**
* Develop and maintain a consistent visual identity that aligns with Air Apps’ brand guidelines.
* Create engaging graphics, illustrations, infographics, and layouts for web, social media, email campaigns, and print materials.
* Collaborate with Marketing, Product, and Content teams to translate requirements into compelling visual solutions.
* Iterate on designs based on feedback from stakeholders and refine assets using user insights and performance metrics.
* Ensure high-quality output and conduct design quality assurance across various channels.
* Utilize industry-standard design software (e.g., Adobe Creative Suite, Figma) to create and deliver assets in multiple formats.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Fine Arts, or a related field.
* Around 3 years of experience creating assets for digital marketing campaigns, social media, and web.
* Strong portfolio showcasing a range of design projects and styles.
* Knowledge of typography, color theory, layout, and design best practices.
* Proficiency in industry-standard design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) and Figma.
* Strong communication, time-management, and attention-to-detail skills.
* Ability to work in a fast-paced, remote environment and collaborate effectively across teams.


**What benefits are we offering?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.
   

  

 Compensation Range: €44K - €55K

title: Head of Product, AI & Conversation Intelligence
description:
🚀
 **Head of Product at Meetric** 




 Do you want to help build the next generation AI platform for how companies understand, analyze, and optimize conversations and communication?
 



  





 Meetric is looking for a Head of Product to take strategic and commercial ownership of our product journey from vision and roadmap to user experience, adoption, and growth.
 



  





 We are building an AI-driven Conversation Intelligence platform that consolidates and analyzes data from calls, meetings, chats, emails, and CRM systems to help companies make smarter decisions, automate workflows, and create alignment across teams.
 



  





 🧠
 **About Meetric** 




 Meetric is a fast-growing SaaS company within AI and Conversation Intelligence, headquartered in Stockholm. Our platform helps organizations transform conversations into actionable insights, automation, and measurable business value through AI-powered analytics, summaries, dashboards, and workflows.
 



  





 We work across video meetings, phone calls, CRM data, email, and internal communication flows, all within one unified intelligence platform.
 



  





 We are now looking for a Head of Product who can take ownership of our product strategy and help scale the platform, user experience, and business internationally.
 



  





 🎯
 **The Role** 




 As Head of Product at Meetric, you will play a key role in the company with significant influence over product, strategy, and growth.
 



  





 You will:
 


* Own and drive the product vision, roadmap, and prioritization
* Work closely with leadership, engineering, customers, and commercial teams
* Ensure the product delivers clear business value and strong user adoption
* Drive product strategy based on data, customer insights, and market understanding
* Identify opportunities within AI, automation, and user behavior
* Build scalable processes for product discovery and prioritization
* Act as the bridge between technology, users, and business
* This role requires someone who can think strategically while also being hands-on when needed.



  





 👤
 **Who You Are** 



* You have at least 6 to 7 years of experience within Product Management
* You have previously worked as a Product Owner or in a similar product-focused role
* You have experience from SaaS companies where the product is actively used by end users
* You are highly analytical and data-driven
* You have a strong commercial mindset and understand how product impacts growth, retention, and customer value
* You have experience prioritizing roadmaps, features, and business initiatives
* You are strategic but operational when required
* You understand the importance of UX, product adoption, and customer journeys
* You thrive in fast-paced and entrepreneurial environments



  





 ✨
 **Nice to Have** 



* Experience within AI, automation, or Conversation Intelligence
* Experience scaling international SaaS products
* Experience from B2B SaaS with complex user flows
* Previous responsibility for product teams or cross-functional leadership



  





 💡
 **We Offer** 



* A key leadership role in a fast-growing AI company
* The opportunity to influence both product and company strategy
* Work with modern AI technology and advanced data environments
* An entrepreneurial culture with short decision-making paths
* Competitive compensation
* Opportunity for stock options



  





 📍
 **Location** 




 Stockholm / Hybrid
 



  





 📊
 **Reporting Line** 




 This role reports directly to the CEO
 



  





 ✉️
 **Apply** 




 Ready to be part of the journey?
 



 Submit your application today as we interview and evaluate candidates on an ongoing basis.

title: Senior Product Manager - Sharing & Social
description:
In the Experience Mission, we design Spotify’s consumer experience—end to end, moment to moment, across every screen, platform, and partner integration. On this team, our mission is to show up wherever people are being social — across the platforms, surfaces, and moments where they're already expressing themselves and connecting with others — and make it effortless to bring audio into those moments. That means being present in the feeds, messages, and communities where culture moves, giving listeners the tools to express who they are through what they hear, and creating the loops that turn shared content into a new connection, a new fan, or a new Spotify user.
   

  

**About The Team**
 The team sits within PPX and owns Spotify's sharing surfaces and off-platform social presence: from the core share sheet to partner integrations, social formats, and the growth loops that bring new listeners in. You'll work closely with platform partners, business development, feature-owning teams and cross-functional engineering and design teams. In this role, you’ll shape how Spotify shows up across the social platforms of today and the future. You’ll be the face of product across our social strategic partners, while owning end-to-end product execution.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Own the end-to-end vision and roadmap for how Spotify content is shared, discovered, and amplified across platforms
* Shape the strategy for sharing, from core sharing functionality to new social formats, collaborative features, and growth loops
* Explore how emerging platforms and evolving user behaviors influence sharing, especially across Gen Z and global audiences
* Identify opportunities to position Spotify at the intersection of audio and social culture through new product bets
* Define clear success metrics to understand how sharing drives acquisition, engagement, and retention
* Build strong relationships with external platform partners to unlock new integrations and experiences
* Collaborate with Business Development and cross-functional teams to translate partnerships into meaningful product outcomes
* Lead cross-functional teams across engineering, design, data, and research, creating clarity and momentum
* Bring forward new ideas on how AI can enhance sharing experiences, from personalization to content creation


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 5+ years of product management experience working on consumer-facing products at scale
* You understand how content spreads online and have a strong perspective on social platforms and digital culture
* You’ve worked with external partners or platform ecosystems and can translate those relationships into product impact
* You build trust across teams and bring people together to move complex work forward
* You’re comfortable using data to inform decisions, including experimentation and user behavior analysis
* You communicate clearly and adapt your message depending on the audience
* You have experience building or contributing to growth loops, sharing features, or social-driven products
* You’re curious about how AI can shape future user experiences and are eager to explore its potential


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location (excluding France due to on-call restrictions).
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Chief Technology Officer
description:
**Chief Technology & Product Officer (CTO / CPO) – Stockholm**




  





 We are partnered with a venture-backed, high-growth AI company redefining how modern commerce operates. The business is building a next-generation intelligence platform for enterprise customers, leveraging applied AI to transform how digital products are discovered, optimised, and monetised at scale. Already operating at significant volume with global customers, the company is now entering a critical phase of growth under new executive leadership with a proven track record of scaling and exiting high-growth businesses.
 



  





 This is not a typical leadership hire. This is a foundational, company-shaping role.
 



  





 We are looking for a rare hybrid leader – a CTO/CPO who combines:
 


* Deep technical expertise
* Strong product instinct
* Clear commercial thinking



  





 You will own the entire product and technology function, from vision through execution, and play a central role in shaping the company’s next stage of growth. This is a high-impact, high-autonomy position where you will operate as a true partner to the CEO and leadership team.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Responsible For** 




**1. Define & Drive Product + Technology Vision** 



* Set a clear, opinionated product strategy and roadmap
* Ensure all development aligns to commercial outcomes and customer value
* Bridge the gap between AI capability and real-world SaaS impact



  





**2. Build & Scale the Organisation** 



* Lead and develop engineering, product, and data teams
* Introduce clear structure, accountability, and high-performance culture
* Hire, retain, and elevate top-tier talent



  





**3. Own Technical Direction** 



* Oversee platform architecture, scalability, and performance
* Make key decisions across infrastructure, AI, and product systems
* Ensure the platform can scale to meet enterprise demand and growth



  





**4. Drive Execution & Delivery** 



* Increase velocity and quality of delivery
* Implement scalable processes and workflows
* Ensure the team is consistently shipping high-impact features



  





**5. Align Technology with Revenue** 



* Work closely with Sales, Customer Success, and leadership



  





 This role is aimed at high-calibre, entrepreneurial technology leaders who have operated in fast-scaling environments. You will likely bring:
 


* Proven experience as a CTO, CPO, VP Engineering, or VP Product in a high-growth SaaS company
* Track record of scaling a business from early stage (Seed/Series A) to growth stage (Series B/C)
* Experience working in AI-driven or data-intensive products
* Strong background in B2B SaaS environments
* Strong technical foundation (you’ve been hands-on earlier in your career)
* Comfortable going deep when needed (architecture, trade-offs, scaling challenges)
* Highly opinionated on product, UX, and system design
* Clear perspective on how AI should be leveraged commercially
* Founder mentality - ownership, urgency, and accountability
* Proven ability to build, scale, and lead high-performing teams
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity and high-growth environments
* Willing to challenge, iterate, and drive change quickly
* Strong understanding of SaaS metrics (ARR, retention, growth), Customer value creation and Product-market fit dynamics



  





  





 Role Profile
 



 ~80% strategic / leadership / execution
 



 ~0–20% hands-on technical involvement (as needed)
 



 ~Highly cross-functional across product, engineering, and go-to-market
 



  





 Why This Role
 


* Foundational leadership hire at a pivotal stage of growth
* Opportunity to shape the future direction of a high-potential AI business
* Operate as a true partner to the CEO
* Build and scale a world-class product and engineering organisation
* Work on a product with genuine technical depth and global relevance



  





 Package
 


* Competitive base salary
* Performance bonus + meaningful equity (founder-level mindset encouraged)
* Long-term upside tied directly to company success



  





 Location
 


* Stockholm (hybrid – strong preference for in-office collaboration)



  





 Who Thrives Here
 


* Builders, not maintainers
* Leaders who combine technical depth + product intuition
* Individuals who want to leave a lasting mark on a company and category
* People who are comfortable being both strategic and execution-focused

title: Customer Activation Manager - Lifeplan
description:
**Who are Lifeplan?**
 Want to make a real difference to people’s future? At Lifeplan, Sweden’s largest digital pension advisor, we help individuals make smarter decisions about one of their most important investments - their pension. Through a unique combination of advanced technology, research-driven analysis and fully independent advice, we provide tailored pension advice based on each individual’s life situation and goals. Our ambition is simple: to make it easy to do the right thing, and help people maximise the value of their pension savings over time.
   

  

 Lifeplan is a sister company to Benifex, a global SaaS company within employee benefits and total rewards. We share offices and work closely together, giving you the opportunity to be part of a smaller, specialist company while also benefiting from the expertise, network and development opportunities of an international tech organisation.
   

  

**Why should you apply? 🌟**
* Play a key role in shaping how employees in Sweden experience and engage with Lifeplan, directly influencing activation, usage and perceived value of a growing digital service.
* Take on a highly hands-on role with real ownership, autonomy and the opportunity to build and refine activation journeys end to end.
* Work in a fast-moving, cross-functional environment where your ideas, insights and execution genuinely make an impact.
* Join a team that values data-driven decision-making, creativity and pragmatic problem-solving in equal measure.
* Help people make smarter decisions about their pension - fully independent.


**Great Benefits**
 ⚖️ Guaranteed work-life balance with a hybrid working model.
   

  

 🧠 ITP1 pension.
   

  

 ❤️ Lifeplan.
   

  

 💸 Access to the Benifex benefits portal.
   

  

 🤸 Generous wellness allowance.
   

  

 ✈️ 30 vacation days / year.
   

  

 💰 Referral bonuses.
   

  

 🌟 Enhanced parental pay.
   

  

 🙂 Volunteer Days – two paid days annually to give back to the community.
   

  

**Role Overview 🚀**
 As a Customer Activation Manager within Lifeplan, you will own and develop how the Lifeplan service communicates with and activates end users – employees of our customer companies. Your mission is to increase activation, engagement and long-term usage through relevant, measurable and engaging communication across the entire user journey. This role is highly operational and hands-on, with a strong focus on behavioural change, from first exposure to recurring use. You will work closely with commercial, product, customer success and marketing teams in a cross-functional and fast-paced environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities 🤘**
* Own and continuously develop all end-user communication for the Lifeplan service across channels.
* Plan, produce and execute communication and activation initiatives.
* Own and optimise the end-user journey from an activation and communication perspective.
* Work hands-on with key channels, including the benefits portal, email communication, Lifeplan.se, webinars and information campaigns.
* Create engaging communication assets, including copy and simpler visual materials, or brief and quality-assure work produced by others.
* Generate insights from user data and translate them into concrete improvements and actions.
* Monitor, analyse and optimise performance using tools such as Google Analytics and Hotjar.
* Support Account Managers and Customer Success in client dialogues related to employee activation..
* Test, evaluate and help establish new activation and communication channels.


**What are we looking for? 🔎**
* Around 2–5+ years of experience working with activation, user journeys and conversion within B2C, e-commerce, product marketing or digital marketing.
* Hands-on experience with funnels, user behaviour analysis and performance follow-up.
* Proven ability to create content independently, including copy and basic visual materials.
* High digital proficiency and the ability to quickly learn new tools, systems and platforms.
* A hands-on, proactive approach with a strong sense of ownership from idea to delivery.
* Creative judgement combined with resilience and the ability to navigate ambiguity in a fast-changing environment.
* Fluency in Swedish and English.


**Bonus Points For**
* Knowledge of UX/UI principles or web analytics.
* Experience with WordPress and/or Elementor.
* Basic skills in design tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator or similar.
* Experience working with financial products or services.


**Our interview process**
**✌** 
 We understand the need to have a fast and efficient process, the below will all be completed in the shortest time possible.
   

  

 📞 Initial call with the Talent team.
   

  

 ⏳ Interview with a peer.
   

  

 🤩 Final interview with the hiring manager.
   

  

 ⏳References.
   

  

 We want to make the application process as simple and fair as possible. That’s why we don’t ask for a cover letter for this role. Instead, you’ll find a few short questions in the application form. Your answers will help us understand your experience and skills in a more direct and relevant way.
   

  

*Please let us know if you need any reasonable adjustments for interviews by replying to the email you will receive after you apply.*

title: Senior Product Manager – Partner Growth
description:
Delivering the best Spotify experience, everywhere and every time. As AI assistants, widgets, and mobile surfaces evolve, Spotify must meet users wherever they are. Partner Growth leads this work, building Spotify’s AI-driven experiences with major partners like Anthropic, Meta, OpenAI, Google, and Samsung, and delivering high-impact mobile ubiquity features such as homescreen widgets, lockscreen surfaces, and navigation integrations.
   

  

 As Senior Product Manager for Partner Growth, you will shape Spotify’s experience layer across partner ecosystems and mobile platforms. You'll define the product strategy for some of our most important partnerships, advocate for the right outcomes across the organization, and take hands-on accountability for delivering the features that bring that strategy to life. This role blends strategic partnership leadership with end-to-end product execution.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Define Strategy: Set the vision for Spotify’s AI-driven experiences across partner agents and mobile surfaces, ensuring alignment with company priorities and user needs.
* Lead Experience Development: Translate our foundational capabilities into compelling experiences across partner AI and agentic surfaces.
* Drive Ubiquity: Own the roadmap for mobile ubiquity features including widgets, lockscreen experiences, navigation surfaces, and other integrations that deliver everyday value.
* Partner with External Teams: Work directly with major technology partners to co-develop and launch integrated experiences, influencing partner roadmaps while ensuring high-quality execution.
* Collaborate Across Spotify: Partner closely with Design, Engineering, BD, and more to deliver cohesive, scalable experiences built on shared patterns and reliable platform capabilities.


 Who You Are
   

  

* An experienced Product Manager with a track record of building consumer-facing experiences, especially those involving AI, mobile, or partner integrations.
* Skilled in navigating external partnerships and representing product needs clearly to cross-functional teams inside and outside Spotify.
* Comfortable making decisions in ambiguous, fast-evolving spaces where interaction models and partner capabilities shift quickly.
* Experienced collaborating with engineering and design to turn complex constraints into simple, polished user experiences.
* A strong communicator and relationship builder who thrives in multi-team, multi-partner environments and can align collaborators toward a shared vision.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location (excluding France due to on-call restrictions).


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Senior Product manager
description:
The Sharing & Social team as an interim Senior Product Manager and help shape how our client shows up across the platforms where culture actually moves. We're a cross-functional team working at the intersection of product, partnerships, and social — and we're looking for someone who can hit the ground running, build trust fast, and make a real impact in a defined window of time.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 Drive the strategy and execution for how the content is shared and experienced across third-party social platforms — including off-platform integrations, share formats, and partner-facing surfaces.
   

  

 Lead scoping on new platform integration opportunities, working closely with Business Development to evaluate and define what they builds with external partners.
   

  

 Build and maintain strong cross-functional relationships with Engineering, Design, Data, Legal, Trust & Safety, and CoreX to move work forward in a complex, matrixed environment.
   

  

 Own the definition of done for key initiatives — translating ambiguous strategic opportunities into clear, scoped, deliverable product work.
   

  

 Represent the team in partner-facing conversations, bringing product depth to commercial and integration discussions with external platforms.
   

  

 Synthesise signals from data, partners, and users to sharpen the team's point of view on where the biggest opportunities lie in the social sharing space.
   

  

 Who You Are
   

  

**You have a strong background in platform integrations, partnerships product, or social product — ideally with direct experience building features that live on or connect to third-party surfaces.**
 You're as comfortable in a partner meeting as you are in a sprint planning session — you understand how external businesses think and can find the integration opportunity that works for both sides.
   

  

 You move fast without losing rigour. As a contractor, you know how to get up to speed quickly, establish trust, and contribute meaningfully from week one.
   

  

 You're a clear, confident communicator who can translate product thinking into compelling narratives for executives, partners, and engineering teams alike.
   

  

 You're comfortable with ambiguity — in scope, in structure, and in strategy — and you help bring clarity rather than waiting for it.
   

  

 You have a genuine point of view on what's possible in the social and sharing space, and you're not shy about advocating for it.
   

  

 Experience working within large, cross-functional organisations where influencing without authority is the norm would be a bonus!
   

  

 Start/End: 2026-06-01 to 2026-11-30 with possible extension
   

  

 Workplace: Sweden

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description:
Full-Stack Software Engineer
  
**Location:** Stockholm (Hybrid) · Type: Full-Time · Engineering
  
What we should tell you about the role
  
We're looking for full-stack engineers who move fast and thrive in high-velocity environments. You're the kind of person who sees a broken carrier integration, traces the root cause inside an hour, and ships the fix before the standup ends. You love turning messy, real-world logistics data (carrier APIs that lie, warehouse webhooks that fire out of order, return flows that nobody documented) into systems that just work, and you don't wait for perfect specs to get started.
  
You're a builder who's just as comfortable shipping a new React surface in the merchant dashboard as you are debugging a Pub/Sub backlog, tuning a Solr index, or rewriting a Laravel job that's silently dropping shipments. You think in terms of latency, reliability, and iteration, always asking: how do we get this in front of merchants faster, and how do we know it actually moved the needle?
  
As one of our next core engineering hires, you'll help shape how Pango orchestrates shipping, tracking, and returns end to end. You'll work closely with product, our co-founders, and our merchants directly, to rethink how AI agents can do real, accountable operational work in a space stuck on legacy SaaS for a decade.
  
Here's why this is a terrible job
  
This is not a job for someone who likes to move slow.
  
We operate week to week with ruthless speed. Sometimes we're going in the wrong direction. More often we're going in the right one, but you won't always know which until after you ship.
  
If you need a few extra days to perfect a pipeline, chances are there's already a handful of teammates and merchants blocked behind you.
  
**We use a deliberately tight stack:** PHP/Laravel, MySQL, Google Cloud Functions, React, Terraform, Pub/Sub, Redis, Solr. We've made these choices on purpose, and we expect you to make them work, not relitigate them on day three.
  
You'll operate at the intersection of AI agents, e-commerce logistics, and the kind of accuracy requirements that come with real customers shipping real packages to real people. A bug here doesn't ruin a sprint, it ruins someone's birthday gift.
  
There are no clear answers. Just judgment calls, ambiguity, and constant input from every direction. You'll ask yourself, is this really the work? It is. And it's not for everyone.
  
Here's why it's the best career choice you'll make
  
We're building what every incumbent said couldn't be built. A platform that behaves like a back-office teammate, not just another SaaS tool bolted onto Shopify.
  
We operate with total transparency around pay, performance, and progress. Reviews are frequent, structured, and based on output and ownership, not tenure.
  
You'll be paid competitively. You'll earn meaningful equity. And you'll have full autonomy to make high-impact technical decisions.
  
You'll ship features because you believe in them and the merchants need them, not because they cleared six rounds of approval. You'll talk to customers directly. You'll drive outcomes end to end, from the first line of code to the merchant going live.
  
We'll tell you what needs to be achieved. How you get there is on you.
  
What you'll be responsible for
  
Building and maintaining production-grade services across our Laravel monolith and Google Cloud Functions layer
  
Shipping merchant-facing React surfaces that turn complex logistics workflows into something a brand operator actually wants to use
  
Owning carrier, warehouse, and shop-system integrations end to end, from the first webhook to long-term reliability
  
Driving performance, cost, and reliability improvements through experiments, profiling, and pragmatic refactoring
  
Enabling the broader team with primitives, tooling, and shared infrastructure that make the next feature faster to build
  
  

Your hard skillset
  
5+ years of professional engineering experience overall
  
Strong experience in one backend language (PHP, Ruby, Python, Go, or Rust) with genuine willingness to go deep on PHP/Laravel OR strong experience in React
  
**Comfortable across the stack:** backend services, frontend, message queues, caches, search, infrastructure as code
  
Experience at product-focused startups using modern tooling and processes
  
**Bonus:** Shopify, multi-carrier shipping APIs, or e-commerce logistics experience
  
**Bigger bonus:** you've taken a product from 0 to 1 and watched real users depend on it
  
**Even bigger bonus:** you've integrated LLMs or agentic workflows into production, not just a demo
  
  

Your soft skillset
  
Comfortable being uncomfortable, making calls with incomplete data, and changing your mind when the data changes
  
Empathetic and curious. You build for the merchant, not for the benchmark
  
Highly collaborative across product, engineering, and go-to-market. No lone wolves
  
Detail-oriented but pragmatic. You know when accuracy matters and when to ship
  
You own your work and welcome the accountability that comes with it
  
  

Growth and levels
  
We operate on a transparent leveling framework. Each level reflects increasing ownership, impact, and scope, with real jumps in salary and equity. Promotions are based on output, not tenure.
  
This isn't a comfy engineering role. It's fast, focused, and merchant-obsessed. You will launch fast. You will learn fast. You will own what you ship.
  
The process
  
Intro call with the founders (30 minutes)
  
Technical walkthrough and async take-home task (approximately 60 minutes)
  
Final round with the team (half day, on-site if possible)
  
  

By the end, you'll be wanting access to the stack before your first day, because you'll see exactly what kind of company we're building, and exactly how fast your career can move inside it.
  
About Pango
  
Pango is building the agentic operating system for e-commerce logistics. We unify shipping, tracking, returns, and warehouse workflows into one platform powered by AI agents that handle operational work merchants currently do by hand. We're based in Stockholm at the SSE Business Lab (the same ecosystem that produced Klarna, Voi, and Budbee), backed by Wave Ventures, Heartfelt, Karaoke Club, and Stockholm-based angels, and trusted by leading Nordic and international brands including Understatement, BAMBAM, Kallpressen, Sundaze, and Switch Nails.
  
Apply at pango.ai/careers
  
Öppen för alla
  
Vi fokuserar på din kompetens, inte dina övriga förutsättningar. Vi är öppna för att anpassa rollen eller arbetsplatsen efter dina behov.

title: IT driftchef Tidaholms kommun
description:
Vill du leda och utveckla en modern, säker och stabil IT‑drift? Då kan du vara den vi söker!


**Om tjänsten**  

Vi söker nu en IT-driftchef som vill ta ett övergripande ansvar för kommunens Drift- och supportverksamhet. Din uppgift blir att säkerställa att kommunen har de tekniska förutsättningar som krävs för att möta verksamhetens framtida behov och erbjuda verksamheterna en serviceinriktad supportfunktion.



Som IT‑driftchef har du ett strategiskt och operativt ansvar för kommunens IT‑drift. Du leder och utvecklar IT‑drift och supportorganisationen och ansvarar för att IT‑tjänster levereras med hög kvalitet, god säkerhet och hög tillgänglighet. Till din hjälp har du 9 medarbetare och du rapporterar till kommunens digitaliseringschef.



Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med tillträde snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.


**Arbetsuppgifter**  

I rollen som IT‑driftchef ingår bland annat att:


* Ha övergripande ansvar för IT‑drift, inklusive servrar, nätverk, klienter, plattformar och tillhörande infrastrukturtjänster
* Leda, samordna och utveckla IT‑drift och supportenheten, inklusive personalansvar
* Driva utveckling av arbetssätt, processer och struktur inom drift, support och teknisk objektförvaltning
* Säkerställa hög tillgänglighet, stabilitet och säkerhet i IT‑miljön
* Bidra med din tekniska kompetens i det operativa arbetet


**Kvalifikationer**  

Vi söker dig som har:


* Du har relevant akademisk utbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet enligt arbetsgivarens bedömning
* Chefserfarenhet med personalansvar eller erfarenhet som teamledare
* Erfarenhet av IT-arkitektur, IT‑säkerhet, driftprocesser, support och incidenthantering
* Kunskap om relevanta ramverk och standarder, exempelvis ITIL eller ISO 27001
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom offentlig sektor eller annan politiskt styrd organisation


**Personliga egenskaper**  

Som person är du en trygg ledare som skapar struktur, engagemang och utveckling i din grupp. Du trivs i en roll där du leder människor men samtidigt aktivt deltar i det operativa arbetet för att driva verksamheten framåt. Omvärldsbevakning är en naturlig del för dig för att säkerställa att kommunen har en stabil, säker och framtidssäkrad driftmiljö.


**Vi erbjuder**  

Som arbetsgivare värdesätter vi på Tidaholms kommun en hälsofrämjande arbetsmiljö, bra arbetsvillkor och ett engagerat ledarskap som stöttar din utveckling.



Vi som arbetar här drivs av att skapa en positiv skillnad för våra invånare och vara stolta ambassadörer för vår kommun. Välkommen att bli en del av vår gemenskap och bidra till en hållbar och framåtblickande kommun.


**Ansökan**  

Urval kan komma att ske löpande så ansök idag, dock senast 260607. Intervjuer planeras att hållas 10–12 juni.



Den som väljs ut för anställning kommer att behöva uppvisa ett utdrag ur belastningsregistret, därför är det bra att beställa detta i god tid från Polismyndigheten.


Kontaktuppgifter till fackliga representanter hittar ni här: https://tidaholm.se/ledigajobb  

  

Vi tar endast emot ansökan via vår hemsida https://tidaholm.se/ledigajobb  

  

Livet i Skaraborg är en webbplats som visar möjligheterna som finns i Skaraborg. På https://www.livetiskaraborg.se kan du läsa mer om fritidsaktiviteter, boende och mycket annat.  

  

Välkommen med din ansökan!  

  

Vi undanber oss alla erbjudanden om annonserings- och rekryteringshjälp i samband med denna annons.


**Kontaktpersoner**


Magnus Danielsson


IT- och digitaliseringschef


0502-60 60 40


magnus.danielsson@tidaholm.se

title: Vi söker Domänarkitekt till verksamhetsområdet Data och Analys!
description:
Vill du vara med och bidra till att skapa Sveriges bästa hälso- och sjukvård och ett hållbart samhälle med tillväxt i hela Västra Götaland? Västra Götalandsregionen är Sveriges största offentliga arbetsgivare med ambitionen att bli Sveriges bästa offentliga arbetsgivare. Hos oss får du chansen att utföra ett meningsfullt arbete för samhället och bidra till Västra Götalandsregionens vision ”det goda livet”. På Koncernkontoret arbetar vi dagligen med att göra skillnad för patienter, medarbetare, besökare och invånare.


Vill du vara med och skapa en strategisk och robust miljö som möjliggör en datadriven organisation? Verksamhetsområdet Data och Analys ska vara en katalysator för att använda data som en strategisk resurs och stödja lösningar som främjar affärsmål på alla nivåer – nationellt, regionalt och lokalt.


Vi söker nu en domänarkitekt till verksamhetsområdet Data och Analys, med fokus på informations-, analys- och AI-domänen. Rollen omfattar både klinisk och administrativ information och är central för utvecklingen av Västra Götalandsregionens långsiktiga förmåga inom data, analys och AI.

**Ditt uppdrag**


I denna roll har du ett helhetsansvar för arkitekturen inom din domän – från målbild och strategi till styrning, förändring och realisering. Du arbetar utifrån perspektiven verksamhet, information, applikation och infrastruktur och säkerställer att lösningar utvecklas i linje med målarkitektur, principer och strategiska initiativ.


Du kommer att arbeta nära verksamhetsrepresentanter, strateger, systemförvaltare och lösningsarkitekter, för att bereda nya initiativ och projekt samt stötta pågående utvecklingsinsatser. Vi har även en enterprisearkitekt som stöttar och leder det övergripande arkitekturarbetet. Rollen innebär både strategiskt och operativt arbete där du dokumenterar förändringar, driver målarkitektur och säkerställer att lösningar kan realiseras på ett hållbart och återanvändbart sätt.


Som domänarkitekt inom Data och Analys blir du en del av VGR:s arkitekturstyrning och en nyckelperson i arbetet med målarkitektur och transitionsarkitektur. Du bidrar till att strukturera den långsiktiga förflyttningen inom data och information med fokus på kvalitet, standardisering, interoperabilitet och strategisk utveckling.


Du kommer att samarbeta med andra arkitekturdiscipliner, såsom lösningsarkitektur, integration och infrastruktur, för att möjliggöra och realisera mål- och konceptarkitektur.


Rollen innebär även nära samverkan med enterprisearkitekter kring verksamheternas analysbehov. Vi arbetar enligt agila arbetssätt, vilket även präglar arkitekturarbetet. I rollen arbetar du tillsammans med andra avdelningar inom agila utvecklingsvärdeströmmar och s.k. tåg (agile release trains).


Vi använder arkitekturramverket Varvet, som bygger på TOGAF, och dokumenterar arkitekturen i Orbus.

**Vad kan vi erbjuda dig?**


Vi erbjuder dig ett intressant arbete på en förändringsinriktad och dynamisk arbetsplats, där du som medarbetare har möjlighet att bidra till utvecklingen och skapa mervärde för verksamheten. Som en av Sveriges största arbetsgivare kan vi erbjuda dig goda karriär- och utvecklingsmöjligheter.


Vi eftersträvar en god balans mellan arbetsliv och privatliv och värnar om våra medarbetares hälsa. Läs om våra förmåner: Förmåner för medarbetare - Västra Götalandsregionen


Västra Götalandsregionen erbjuder flexibla arbetsformer utifrån verksamhetens förutsättningar och det finns möjlighet att kombinera arbete från våra kontor och på distans.

**För att lyckas i rollen behöver du:**

  

* Relevant högskoleutbildning, exempelvis inom systemvetenskap, datavetenskap, informatik eller annan relevant IT-utbildning på högskolenivå
* Minst fem års erfarenhet av arbete som IT-arkitekt i större organisationer där du definierat IT-lösningar inom komplexa verksamhetsområden


Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av:

* Verksamhets- och informationsarkitektur
* Arbete med komplexa data- och integrationsmiljöer
* Samarbete mellan verksamhet och IT
* Att omsätta informationsmodeller till systemkonfiguration och utveckling
* Att säkerställa återanvändbara arkitekturkomponenter och gemensamma ramverk
* Agila arbetssätt och tvärfunktionella team
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och i skrift


Meriterande:

* Arbete inom offentlig förvaltning
* Informationsarkitektur inom hälso- och sjukvård
* Standarder och modeller såsom FHIR, HL7, OpenEHR
* Arbete inom analys-, informations- eller AI-plattformar
* Data Governance och informationskvalitet
* TOGAF eller liknande arkitekturramverk


Vi söker dig som är lyhörd, flexibel och lösningsorienterad, med hög integritet och initiativkraft. Du kommunicerar förtroendefullt och arbetar prestigelöst i samarbete med andra. Stor vikt läggs vid personlig lämplighet.


Det är viktigt för oss att du kan arbeta utifrån vår värdegrund:

* Tillsammans gör vi varandra framgångsrika.
* Vi lyssnar in. Vi lyssnar av.
* Feedback bidrar till vår utveckling.

**Övrigt**  

Tjänsten kan komma att säkerhetsklassas.


Läs mer om vår verksamhet här: http://www.vgregion.se/om-vgr/


Om Västra GötalandsregionenHos oss blir du en del av en större helhet. Vi är 56 000 medarbetare i över 200 yrken som varje dag gör skillnad i människors liv i hela Västra Götaland. Du bidrar till en trygg och jämlik vård samt till ett hållbart samhälle där miljö, kultur och goda kommunikationer skapar livskvalitet. Vi är mitt i en digital utveckling där du får vara med och forma framtidens arbetssätt för att förbättra och förenkla vardagen för invånare och verksamheter. Som tillsvidareanställd blir du krigsplacerad som en del av vårt gemensamma ansvar för att samhällsviktiga funktioner ska fungera även i kris. Vill du veta mer om oss? På vår webb kan du läsa mer om våra förmåner och möta medarbetare som varje dag gör skillnad och utvecklas i sina yrken. https://www.vgregion.se/jobba-i-vgr/sa-ar-det-att-jobba-hos-oss/ AnsökanVästra Götalandsregionen ser helst att du registrerar din ansökan via rekryteringssystemet. Om du som sökande har frågor om den utannonserade tjänsten eller av särskilda och speciella skäl inte kan registrera dina uppgifter i ett offentligt system - kontakta kontaktperson för respektive annons. Till bemannings-, förmedlings- och rekryteringsföretag och till dig som är försäljare:Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt direktkontakt med bemannings-, förmedlings- och rekryteringsföretag samt andra externa aktörer och försäljare av ytterligare jobbannonser. Västra Götalandsregionen har upphandlade avtal.

title: Konsultuppdrag | Data Engineer (Azure & Databricks)
description:
**Start:** 1/6 2026  

**End:** 31/3 2027

 **L****ocation is;** Solna (Stockholm) - Remote work 2-3days per week


We are looking for a skilled Data Engineer, 6-9y of experience, to our clients department Asset Analytics Distribution.  

  

Design, develop, and maintain scalable data pipelines and ETL processes using Azure and Databricks.  

Ingest, transform, and model data from diverse sources to enable reliable analytics and reporting.  

Develop semantic models and create Power BI reports to support data-driven decision making.  

Perform data quality checks, ensuring data integrity and security.  

Document and communicate data engineering processes and outcomes.  

Support data awareness and training initiatives within the organization.  

Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and deliver effective data solutions.

 **Skills:**  

Minimum 5 years experience as Data engineer  

Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure, Databricks, SQL, Python and (including CICD)  

Experience with data ingestion, transformation, and semantic modeling.  

Hands-on experience and confident working with large data volumes is a plus (tables holding trillion of rows )  

Knowledge of data warehousing, data modeling, and ETL concepts.  

Familiarity with Power BI  

Familiarity with Azure DevOps, and Azure Storage Explorer  

Excellent communication skills Swedish and English  

  

**Personal Qualities**  

Collaborative, approachable, and open to new perspectives.  

Analytical and proactive problem-solver.  

Passionate about learning and continuous improvement.  

Experience working in agile (scrum) teams.

 **Education:**  

Master's or Bachelor's degree in Computational Engineering Science, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.

**Om oss**

*Senterprise är ett ledande rekryteringsbolag inom IT och en oberoende förmedlare av frilansande konsulter. Med aktiv headhunting, search och djup teknisk förståelse hjälper vi några av Sveriges främsta arbetsgivare att hitta rätt kandidater, både för anställning och konsultuppdrag.*

*Läs vidare på* *www.senterprise.se*

title: Systemtekniker till Arbetsmiljöverkets sektion för infrastruktur
description:
Solna


Referensnummer 2026/032873


På Arbetsmiljöverket jobbar vi tillsammans för att ingen ska bli sjuk, skadas eller dö av jobbet. Därför hjälper vi arbetsgivare att uppfylla de krav som finns och informerar om hur arbetsmiljöarbetet blir en naturlig del av vardagen. Med arbetsmiljölagen som grund tar vi fram regler, inspekterar arbetsplatser och sprider kunskap om arbetsmiljöfrågor. Uppdraget är allvarligt men vår vardag präglas av arbetsglädje och vi är omtänksamma och hjälpsamma kollegor.


**Ditt nya jobb**
-----------------



Arbetsmiljöverket har som målsättning att öka utvecklingstakten och bli mer datadrivna. IT-enheten har ett nära samarbete mellan sektionerna Infrastruktur, Utveckling, Digitalisering och Helpdesk för att leverera säker, stabil och modern IT till hela verksamheten. Enheten befinner sig på en utvecklingsresa där fokus ligger på att modernisera arbetssätt och plattformar, stärka säkerheten och skapa långsiktigt hållbara lösningar för framtiden.



Sektionen för infrastruktur består av ett tvärfunktionellt team på cirka 10 kompetenta och engagerade medarbetare. Tillsammans ansvarar sektionen för drift, utveckling och förvaltning av myndighetens centrala IT-miljö, it-arbetsplats och samarbetsverktyg. Gruppen präglas av samarbete, kunskapsdelning och ett gemensamt ansvarstagande där olika specialistområden samverkar för att skapa en trygg och välfungerande IT-infrastruktur.



Som systemtekniker blir du en viktig del av arbetet med att säkerställa stabila och säkra lösningar samtidigt som du bidrar till utveckling och förbättring av infrastrukturen.



Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter består av:


* Ansvar för drift och förvaltning av olika IT-miljöer
* Övervakning och underhåll av IT-infrastruktur
* Administration och hantering av Windows servrar, klientmiljöer och Active Directory (AD)
* Felsökning och incidenthantering för att snabbt och effektivt lösa tekniska problem och minimera störningar i verksamheten.
* Patchning, uppdateringar och säkerhetsarbete
* Dokumentation av system och rutiner
* Delta i tvärfunktionella projekt inom IT-enheten och andra delar av verksamheten.
* Arbeta med kontinuerlig förbättring av befintliga miljöer och införande av nya system och teknologier
* Sträva efter att bidra till och behålla en säker och stabil miljö med hög tillgänglighet

**Din bakgrund**
----------------



Rollen kräver att du har:


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom relevant område, exempelvis IT-teknik, alternativt motsvarande kompetens förvärvad genom relevant och aktuell arbetslivserfarenhet
* Flerårig, dokumenterad och aktuell erfarenhet av arbete som systemtekniker eller motsvarande arbete i komplexa IT-miljöer
* Aktuell erfarenhet av arbete med Windows server och Windows klient managering (ex. SSM eller Intune).
* Aktuell erfarenhet av Active Directory och gruppolicyer
* Aktuell erfarenhet av drift, underhåll och felsökning av komplexa IT-miljöer
* God förmåga att kommunicera på svenska och engelska både i tal och skrift


Det är meriterande om du har:


* Erfarenhet av Microsoft 365 och Microsoft 365 SAAS
* Erfarenhet av automatisering och scripting, exempelvis PowerShell
* Kunskaper av agila arbetsmetoder
* Kunskaper av Microsoft Azure och molnbaserade tjänster
* Erfarenhet av Mobile Device Management


Som person ser vi att du kommer lyckas i rollen om du är noggrann, strukturerad och har en förmåga att hantera situationer även när de är stressfyllda. Du drivs av att arbeta mot uppsatta mål och kan upprätthålla fokus även när problem uppstår. Dessutom är du en god kollega som samarbetar för att uppnå teamresultat. Du är en flexibel person som uppskattar att ta nya initiativ då du är bekväm med att agera självständigt och ta egna beslut.



En anställning hos oss kan innebära att befattningen placeras i säkerhetsklass. Säkerhetsprövning med eller utan registerkontroll kan därför komma att göras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Säkerhetsprövning genomförs enligt Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585).


**Vad vi erbjuder dig**
-----------------------



Arbetsmiljöverket är en trygg arbetsgivare och en myndighet som hela tiden förändras med samhället vi verkar i. Vi är stolta över att få använda vår kunskap och vårt förtroende i vårt viktiga samhällsuppdrag. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande kultur, som rymmer hjärta, mod och hjärna. Hos oss blir hela du en viktig del i något större.



Anställningen är en tillsvidareanställning, på heltid och är för närvarande placerad på vårt kontor i Solna. Vi tillämpar individuell lönesättning och provanställning på sex månader.



Vi strävar efter att alla medarbetare ska ha en hållbar arbetsmiljö och en balans mellan jobb och fritid. Därför har vi flexibla arbetstider eller tillämpar förtroendearbetstid och ger möjlighet till distansarbete där verksamheten så tillåter.



Möt våra medarbetare på IT och övriga

  


**Så rekryterar vi**
--------------------



Vi använder kompetensbaserad rekrytering, både för att kvalitetssäkra rekryteringen och för att motverka diskriminering. Vi ber dig därför att endast bifoga ett CV, och svara på några frågor istället för ett personligt brev när du registrerar din an. Eftersom vi arbetar kompetensbaserat använder vi oss också av arbetspsykologiska tester i den här rekryteringen. Intervjuer sker från vecka 25.



Vi tycker att det är viktigt att även du får göra din bedömning av oss. Därför välkomnar vi frågor före såväl som under rekryteringsprocessen. Fackliga kontaktpersoner är Adam Jansson för Saco, Eva Parissay för ST samt Jenny Bengtsson för Seko. Samtliga nås via Arbetsmiljöverkets växel: 010-730 90 00.



Vill du jobba tillsammans med oss för att ingen ska bli sjuk, skadas eller dö av jobbet?


**Välkommen med din an senast den 8 juni 2026!**



Rekryteringen sköts av Arbetsmiljöverkets rekryteringsfunktion varför vi undanber oss säljsamtal från rekryteringsföretag eller annonssäljare.


**Kontaktpersoner**
-------------------


Kevin Asgari


Sektionschef för infrastruktur


010-730 9340


kevin.asgari@av.se


Ella Littmarck


HR-partner


010-730 9674


ella.littmarck@av.se

  

  

Du er senast 2026-06-08 genom att klicka på knappen.

title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer - Vehicle Access Systems
description:
About Us:

Rivian is on a mission to keep the world adventurous forever. This goes for the emissions-free Electric Adventure Vehicles we build, and the curious, courageous souls we seek to attract.  

As a company, we constantly challenge what’s possible, never simply accepting what has always been done. We reframe old problems, seek new solutions and operate comfortably in areas that are unknown. Our backgrounds are diverse, but our team shares a love of the outdoors and a desire to protect it for future generations.
Responsibilities:
* Develop embedded features and components for Vehicle Access with focus on security, reliability, and performance within a defined scope.
* Design and implement embedded and system-integrated features within vehicle access areas like phone-as-key, ensuring high‑quality integration of your components into the broader access system.
* Develop and maintain embedded C/C++ (and optionally Rust) code for safety-critical applications.
* Work with UWB, NFC, networking, and security protocols to ensure secure and reliable vehicle access.
* Contribute to the technical roadmap and architectural decisions within the team by proposing, implementing, and improving solutions within the established architecture.
* Ensure high quality through automated testing, code reviews, and CI/CD pipelines.
* Mentor and support junior engineers, fostering knowledge sharing and best practices.
* Operate independently and take ownership of complex engineering challenges within your feature and component area.


Qualifications:
* 6+ years of professional experience in embedded system development.
* Strong expertise in C/C++ and preferably Rust.
* Experience with security-critical systems, networking, and protocol development.
* Strong understanding of system-level development, vehicle security and related standards.
* Self-sufficient, independent, and take ownership of projects within your area
* Excellent command of English, both written and spoken, for international collaboration.

  

Nice to have* Experience in automotive access systems and security protocols.
* Previous experience leading technical projects or coordinating and mentoring other engineers in embedded development.


Company Statements:
#### **Equal Opportunity**


Rivian is an equal opportunity employer and complies with all applicable federal, state, and local fair employment practices laws. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, genetic information or characteristics, physical or mental disability, marital/domestic partner status, age, military/veteran status, medical condition, or any other characteristic protected by law.  

Rivian is committed to ensuring that our hiring process is accessible for persons with disabilities. If you have a disability or limitation, such as those covered by the Americans with Disabilities Act, that requires accommodations to assist you in the search and application process, please email us at candidateaccommodations@rivian.com.#### **Candidate Data Privacy**


Rivian may collect, use and disclose your personal information or personal data (within the meaning of the applicable data protection laws) when you apply for employment and/or participate in our recruitment processes (“Candidate Personal Data”). This data includes contact, demographic, communications, educational, professional, employment, social media/website, network/device, recruiting system usage/interaction, security and preference information. Rivian may use your Candidate Personal Data for the purposes of (i) tracking interactions with our recruiting system; (ii) carrying out, analyzing and improving our application and recruitment process, including assessing you and your application and conducting employment, background and reference checks; (iii) establishing an employment relationship or entering into an employment contract with you; (iv) complying with our legal, regulatory and corporate governance obligations; (v) recordkeeping; (vi) ensuring network and information security and preventing fraud; and (vii) as otherwise required or permitted by applicable law.  

Rivian may share your Candidate Personal Data with (i) internal personnel who have a need to know such information in order to perform their duties, including individuals on our People Team, Finance, Legal, and the team(s) with the position(s) for which you are applying; (ii) Rivian affiliates; and (iii) Rivian’s service providers, including providers of background checks, staffing services, and cloud services.  

Rivian may transfer or store internationally your Candidate Personal Data, including to or in the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom, and the European Union and in the cloud, and this data may be subject to the laws and accessible to the courts, law enforcement and national security authorities of such jurisdictions. **Please note that we are currently not accepting applications from third party application services.**
company_description: Rivian is building vehicles and technology that inspire people to get out and explore the world. We focus on helping anyone transition into a career in EVs.

title: Sr Software Engineer
description:
**The Company**


PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.


We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.


We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.


Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.

**Job Summary:**


This job delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC). It involves advising management on project-level issues, guiding junior engineers, operating with little supervision, and applying knowledge of technical best practices.**Job Description:**

**Essential Responsibilities:**

* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions

**Minimum Qualifications:**

* 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.

**Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications****:**

**Subsidiary:**


PayPal**Travel Percent:**


0
PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.


For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.

**Our Benefits:**


At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.

**Who We Are:**

 **Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**

PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.

**Belonging at PayPal:**


Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.


Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.


We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.
company_description: We believe now is the time to revolutionize commerce globally to make moving money, selling and shopping simple, personalized and secure.

title: Cobolutvecklare till IT Liv och Pension
description:
På IT Liv och Pension jobbar vi för att skapa ett Folksam som är enklare, snabbare, mer lönsamt och kundorienterat.



Vill du arbeta med IT som stödjer vår livaffär? Här är utvecklingstakten hög för att förflytta oss mot framtiden, uppfylla partskrav och regelverk. Du får jobba tillsammans med många erfarna och högpresterande kollegor, i ett nära samarbete mellan IT och affärsverksamheten.



Vi söker nu en erfaren Cobolutvecklare till ett team där du jobbar mot KPA-affären. Vill du vara med på vår resa?


**Det här gör du som Cobolutvecklare på IT Liv och Pension**
------------------------------------------------------------



Som Cobolutvecklare hos oss jobbar du med förvaltning, livscykelhantering och en del nyutveckling av våra system. Du tillhör ett team som jobbar efter agila principer. Våra system finns på Mainframe. Vår vardag präglas av tät dialog med både verksamhet och IT. Vi behöver samverka med alla roller som behövs för innovativ problemlösning och utveckling. Där blir du en viktig lagspelare som stärker teamet och bidrar till att vi når resultat, kan fira framgångar och ha roligt tillsammans på jobbet! Vi värderar ditt engagemang, vilja att lära och utvecklas samt dina personliga egenskaper högt. Tillsammans med oss levererar du systemstöd till Folksams viktigaste processer - det gör arbetsdagarna varierande och spännande.



Läs gärna mer om hur Maria berättar om sin roll som Cobolutvecklare hos oss, Möt Maria, Cobolutvecklare - Folksam



Vår IT enhet består av cirka 750 personer i nio sektioner. Sektionen IT Liv och pension ansvarar för Folksams system för våra liv- och pensionsförsäkringar. Vi befinner oss i ett spännande skede då vi moderniserar och förflyttar vår affär till målplattformerna Lumera och vårt egenutvecklade KPP. Samtidigt behöver vi fortsätta att förvalta och utveckla våra stordatorsystem. Vi arbetar nära vår affärsverksamhet och vårt arbetsklimat kännetecknas av engagemang och stor drivkraft.


**Är du den vi söker?**
-----------------------



Vi söker dig som har minst fem års erfarenhet av Cobolutveckling och som trivs i en miljö där både förvaltning och problemlösning är en självklar del av vardagen. Du gillar att jobba agilt och vill vara med och påverka både teknik och affär. Har du dessutom erfarenhet från försäkringsbranschen – särskilt livförsäkring – är det ett stort plus.



För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har flerårig erfarenhet av:


* COBOL-utveckling på IBM Z Mainframe
* JCL – för batchhantering och styrning av jobb.
* DB2 och SQL – för databashantering och affärslogik.


Det är meriterande om du även behärskar följande:


* AQT (Advanced Query Tool) – för effektiv databasutveckling och felsökning.
* DL1 databaser - för databashantering och affärslogik.
* TSO/ISPF - utvecklingsmiljö/terminal interface


Du är ansvarstagande, nyfiken och gillar att driva saker framåt. Problemlösning är något som engagerar dig! För att trivas och lyckas i rollen behöver du ha god samarbetsförmåga, både inom ditt eget team och tillsammans med andra team och intressenter. Du har ett starkt teknikintresse, är självgående, nyfiken och har en vilja att ständigt lära och utvecklas för att skapa värde.


**Här kan du göra skillnad**
----------------------------



Välkommen till Folksam – här driver du viktiga frågor framåt. Från de avgörande detaljerna till de stora perspektiven, med fokus på att förenkla våra kunders vardag. Det gör att du bidrar till något större, oavsett roll. Här finns det många roliga, utvecklande jobb och du har goda chanser till en spännande karriär.  

  

Vi tror på ett hållbart arbetsliv och jobbar aktivt med inkludering och mångfald. Våra moderna kontor bjuder in till samarbete och lärande, här får vi saker att hända! Du har flexibiliteten att kunna varva arbete på kontoret med att jobba hemifrån, utifrån verksamhetens behov.



Läs mer och se filmer om livet hos oss på folksam.se/jobb-och-karriar


**Så söker du jobbet**
----------------------



Välkommen med din ansökan senast 3 juni 2026. Vi intervjuar löpande så skicka in din ansökan redan nu! För att söka tjänsten ber vi dig bifoga ditt CV och besvara ett antal frågor.



Vill du veta mer om tjänsten? Kontakta gruppchef Jenny Lagerqvist 072-582 64 69.



Fackliga representanter: Akademikerföreningen Per Hansson 070-831 60 67, Forena Mari Leppioja 070-831 54 29 och Handels Mikael Carlsson 070-831 51 32.

title: Senior Backend Engineer | Routing Team
description:
About the Team
  
The Routing Team is the engineering core of Instabee, tasked with solving one of logistics' greatest challenges: the "Traveling Salesman Problem" at scale. We build the systems that plan and optimize thousands of last-mile delivery routes in real time. As a Senior Backend Engineer, you’ll join a high-impact squad of three backend developers, a frontend specialist, and a Staff Engineer. This is a role for an engineer who wants to see their code have an immediate, measurable impact on global distribution costs and delivery accuracy.
  
Technical Environment
  
Our ecosystem is built for high-concurrency and reliability. While we are primarily a Golang shop, we value engineers who can navigate polyglot environments and lead the modernization of existing systems.
  
  

**Languages:** Golang, (Primary), with legacy components in Java and Node.js.
  
  

**️ Data & Storage:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB.
  
  

* ️ Infrastructure: GCP, Kubernetes (Helm), Terraform.


**CI/CD & Observability:** GitHub Actions, Grafana.
  
  

Core Responsibilities
  
You will take full ownership of the backend lifecycle, from initial design and requirement gathering to production delivery. A key part of your mission will be evolving our legacy services into modern, high-performance architectures that ensure long-term scalability. We expect you to write clean, maintainable code that sets the standard for the rest of the engineering organization.
  
Beyond the IDE, you will foster a strong engineering culture through technical mentorship and rigorous code reviews. You’ll act as a strategic partner to Product Managers, refining technical solutions that move the needle on our key KPIs. You will also play a critical role in system resilience, leading incident management and root-cause analysis to ensure our production environment remains world-class.
  
About You
  
We are looking for a seasoned backend engineer with deep expertise in Golang and a track record of scaling distributed systems in the cloud. You should have a sophisticated grasp of Kubernetes, Terraform, and SQL, and feel right at home within a Google Cloud environment.
  
The ideal candidate is a pragmatic architect who knows how to balance technical debt with the speed of business delivery. You are a proactive communicator who is comfortable navigating ambiguity and making firm technical decisions. Above all, you are driven by the intersection of high-level software engineering and physical operations—you want your work to result in real-world efficiency.
  
Culture and Professional Environment
  
We believe the best systems are built by engineers who truly understand the user experience. That’s why we offer the unique opportunity to visit our terminals and join delivery drivers on their routes to see your logic in action. To support your craft, we provide paid licenses for advanced development tools and AI-assisted coding agents, alongside regular "Hack Days" to turn your best ideas into production-ready solutions.
  
We operate with a hybrid work model that blends deep-focus remote work with collaborative office days. We’ve built an inclusive environment where professional growth is fueled by autonomy and constant knowledge exchange. Here, you’ll find a team that values your technical opinion and gives you the space to solve genuinely difficult problems.
  
What you’ll get
  
We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
  
  

**Sky-High Office:** Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
  
  

**Puppy Friendly:** Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
  
  

**Wednesdays Tech Breakfasts:** Fuel your midweek with tech talks and tasty bites.
  
  

**Tech Demos:** Dive into the latest innovations with our regular tech showcases.
  
  

**Modern Tech Stack:** Work with cutting-edge technology every day.
  
  

**Fun & Games:** Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
  
  

**⏰ Flexible Hours:** Hybrid setup with working hours that adapt to your lifestyle.
  
  

**Parental Pay for Six Months:** Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
  
  

**A Day Off on Your Birthday:** We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
  
  

Diversity and inclusion are very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
  
Our Recruitment Process
  
TA Interview — A first conversation to get to know each other
  
  

Hiring Manager Interview — A deeper dive into your experience and ways of working
  
  

Technical Case — A chance to show us how you think and solve problems
  
  

Grandfather Interview — A conversation with senior leadership
  
  

Reference Check — We'll speak to a couple of people who know your work
  
  

Background Control — A standard check for all hires in Sweden
  
  

Contract Signing — Welcome to Instabee!
  
  

This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.
  
If you're a seasoned backend engineer who wants to see your work make a real-world impact, we encourage you to apply!
