* Identify and engage with the Nordics tech community, attend regional events and meetups (Stockholm Tech Week, Copenhagen Tech Festival, Slush Helsinki, etc.)
* Position Bright Data's web data collection, SERP APIs, datasets, and proxy infrastructure for AI and data use cases
* Balance velocity motion for SMB/SME with multi-threaded enterprise cycles and AI-specific outreach


Requirements

* Net-new focus: Hunter mentality across SMB, SME, Enterprise, and AI; full ownership from prospecting to close
* Self-starter: Comfortable with cold outreach, outbound prospecting, account research, and self-sourced pipeline creation
* 3–5 years selling technical infrastructure: APIs, data tools, developer products, SaaS, or cloud services to technical buyers across multiple segments
* Technical fluency: Understanding of web scraping, APIs, proxies, data pipelines, plus emerging AI concepts (LLMs, RAG, agentic workflows, data for AI training/evaluation)
* Nordics tech ecosystem knowledge: Strong understanding of SMBs, scale-ups, enterprises, and AI startups across Sweden, Denmark, Norway, and Finland (Stockholm, Copenhagen, Oslo, Helsinki tech hubs)
* Languages: High-level English; Native Nordic languages a plus
company_description: Bright Data Inc is the world’s #1 web data platform.

title: 1st Line Support Agent (English and Spanish speaking)
description:
The company has developed a groundbreaking cloud service for transportation companies. They have customers all over the world.
  
They are experiencing strong demand of their product and because of that they need to strengthen their 1st line support team with a Spanish and English speaking support agent.
  
This position is in Linköping and you need to work from the office.
  
  

About you
  
* You have excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to think “outside the box”.
* You possess great computing skills and are interested in all things technical.
* You provide a high level of customer service and have a full understanding of its importance.
* You are a curious and fast learner.
* You communicate clearly in English and Spanish, both verbally and in writing.


This is considered an entry-level position and although we don’t believe that you need specific qualifications to succeed in this role, it is very important that you are interested in tech, and have a basic understanding of computing, cloud-based services, and mobile technology.
  
  

About the position
  
As a 1st line support agent, no two days will look the same.
  
Your daily focus will be to help our customers through phone, web chat and email.
  
You will help our customers solving their problems and making sure they have the correct settings on their account.
  
Over time, you will become an expert in the system and point of contact for anyone internally, you’ll be providing operational and technical support to teams across all of our departments.
  
The working hours will be normal office hours, Monday to Friday.
  
  

Your daily tasks will include
  
* Help the customers through phone, web chat and email, to make sure the customers can use the system the way they want it to work.
* Supporting the sales teams in sales demos and general technical support.


It will be considered an advantage if
  
* You speak additional languages, especially Swedish, Finnish, or French.
* You have experience in technical support, ideally in an international environment.


For this position you need to already have a Swedish work permit.

title: Senior TechOps Engineer
description:
Momentum Corporate Services is a leading entertainment group based in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates. Our portfolio includes mobile game development and publishing, virtual reality experiences, iGaming, esports management, and content platform services. We are dedicated to creating immersive and personalized entertainment experiences that push the boundaries of innovation in the industry.
   

  

 For more information about Momentum Group, please visit our website at www.mgh.ae.
   

  

**Job Overview**
 We are seeking a Senior TechOps Engineer to join the Technical Operations team at Momentum Corporate Services. This role is responsible for maintaining and operating our regulated platforms, working within a 24/7 NOC environment to ensure system reliability and rapid incident response while meeting compliance requirements.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Build, operate, and support UAT and production environments on Microsoft Azure
* Perform hands-on RHEL administration, including hardening, patching, tuning, and troubleshooting
* Act as senior escalation points for L2/L3 production incidents, driving root cause analysis and permanent fixes
* Support and troubleshoot Java microservices platforms built on Spring Boot
* Diagnosing JVM-level performance issues (memory, GC, threads, latency) using metrics and logs
* Support service-to-service communication frameworks (e.g. Dubbo), including service discovery and client-side load balancing
* Drive security vulnerability remediation across OS, middleware, and cloud infrastructure
* Collaborate with Security, SOC, and NOC teams on incident response and post-incident reviews
* Support and mentor L1 engineers, ensuring quality handover and resolution
* Participate in 24/7 on-call rotation
* Manage incidents, problems, and changes using Jira Service Management
* Build and maintain runbooks, dashboards, and operational documentation
* Improve platform reliability through automation, CI/CD pipelines, and scripting


**Requirements**
* 4+ years of experience in TechOps / Infrastructure / SRE / Production Operations
* Strong hands-on Azure and RHEL administration experience
* Proven experience supporting Java microservices and middleware platforms in production
* Advanced Elasticsearch and JVM observability experience
* Hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, automation, and Python scripting
* Strong incident management and root cause analysis capability
* Familiar with ITIL processes (Incident, Problem, Change)
* Comfortable operating in 24/7 production environments
* Management, development, and support of observability platforms (e.g., Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) to ensure system reliability and performance monitoring.
* Business-level proficiency in English is required
* Proficiency in Mandarin or Chinese is desirable for this role, though not a mandatory requirement.


 At Momentum, we’re proud to be a fair, transparent, and inclusive employer. We value diversity, collaboration, and innovation, and we’re committed to creating an environment where every team member can thrive. If you’re ready to grow your career and help us build Momentum, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Cloud Security Architect
description:
**We are seeking an experienced Cloud Security Architect with strong expertise in Azure Security Operations and multi-cloud security environments. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and governing secure cloud architectures across Azure and AWS platforms while ensuring compliance with industry security standards and frameworks.** 




**The candidate should possess deep technical expertise in cloud security, identity and access management, threat modeling, vulnerability management, and compliance-driven security practices.** 




**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design and implement secure cloud architectures across Azure and AWS environments.
* Lead cloud security initiatives aligned with Zero Trust Architecture principles.
* Define and enforce cloud security governance, policies, and standards.
* Implement and manage Identity & Access Management (IAM) controls.
* Conduct security risk assessments, threat modeling, and vulnerability analysis.
* Perform and coordinate penetration testing activities including SAST and DAST assessments.
* Secure cloud networking components and implement appropriate security controls.
* Support cloud migration and digital transformation programs with security best practices.
* Ensure compliance with industry frameworks and standards including NIST, OWASP, PCI-DSS, and CIS Benchmarks.
* Collaborate with engineering, infrastructure, and compliance teams to strengthen enterprise security posture.
* Implement data protection, encryption, and compliance controls across cloud platforms.
* Monitor, analyze, and improve Azure Security Operations capabilities.



**Required Skills & Experience** 



* 8+ years of experience in Cybersecurity.
* Minimum 3+ years of experience in Cloud Security Architecture.
* Hands-on expertise with AWS and Microsoft Azure security services.
* Strong understanding of:
* Zero Trust Architecture
* IAM (Identity & Access Management)
* Cloud networking and cloud security controls
* Experience with:
* Threat Modeling methodologies
* Penetration Testing (SAST & DAST)
* Security Risk Assessments
* Strong knowledge of:
* NIST Framework
* OWASP Top 10
* PCI-DSS
* CIS Benchmarks
* Experience in cloud migration and transformation projects.
* Strong understanding of data protection, encryption, and regulatory compliance.



**Competencies** 



* Cloud Security Management
* Microsoft Azure
* Cyber Security
* Azure Security Operations
* Risk & Compliance Management



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Relevant cloud security certifications such as:
* Azure Security Engineer Associate
* AWS Security Specialty
* CISSP
* CCSP
* Experience working in enterprise-scale cloud environments.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.

title: Cloud Security Architect-Zero Trust
description:
**Azure Security Operations** 




 Key Responsibilities:
 


* Design and implement secure cloud architectures in Azure and AWS
* Build and enforce Zero Trust security models
* Conduct cloud security assessments and threat modeling
* Implement IAM, RBAC, and privileged access controls
* Lead vulnerability management and penetration testing initiatives
* Ensure compliance with NIST, PCI-DSS, CIS, and OWASP standards
* Architect security controls for cloud migration projects
* Monitor and respond to security incidents using Azure security tools
* Collaborate with DevSecOps and infrastructure teams for secure deployments

title: Service Area Manager – bokningsplattform
description:
Vi på WeQuel söker en interim Service Area Manager till ett affärskritiskt uppdrag hos en av våra kunder i Stockholm.
   

  

 Området ansvarar för en central bokningsplattform som är direkt kopplad till kundens försäljning och kundupplevelse. Teamet är välestablerat med god teknisk kompetens – det du tillför är struktur, prioritering och riktning under en föräldraledighet.
   

  

**Uppdraget**
 Du leder ett team av application engineers och utvecklare och ansvarar för att vardagen fungerar: rätt saker prioriteras, leveransen är stabil och samarbetet med extern leverantör håller ihop. Du jobbar nära teknik, produkt och arkitektur i en modern agil miljö där grunden redan finns på plats.
   

  

 Du kommer att:
   

  

* Leda det dagliga arbetet och skapa tydlighet i ansvar och arbetssätt
* Säkerställa stabil leverans i dialog med produktledning
* Driva samarbetet med extern SaaS-leverantör kring kvalitet och incidenter
* Samverka med arkitektur, produkt och angränsande team


**Vad vi söker**
* 10+ års erfarenhet av att leda team, med eller utan formellt personalansvar
* Van vid komplexa systemmiljöer med externa beroenden
* Erfarenhet av leverantörsstyrning och affärskritiska plattformar
* Trygg i skalade agila organisationer
* Pragmatisk och hands-on – du trivs med att skapa ordning i pågående leverans


 Meriterande: erfarenhet av bokningssystem eller SaaS-lösningar där konfiguration och egenutveckling kombineras.

title: Penetration Tester
description:
**About Us**
 Integrity360 is a leading independent cybersecurity and PCI specialist operating across Europe, Africa, the Caribbean, and North America. The company has office locations in Ireland, the UK, Bulgaria, Italy, Sweden, Spain, Lithuania, Ukraine, Africa, the Caribbean, and Canada, supported by six Security Operations Centres (SOCs) located in Dublin, Sofia, Madrid, Stockholm, Rome, and Cape Town.
   

  

 With over 780 employees, including more than 585 dedicated cybersecurity professionals, Integrity360 delivers a full suite of professional, support, and managed security services. These span the complete cyber risk lifecycle, from identification and prevention to detection, response, and recovery. Integrity360 supports over 3000 mid-market and enterprise organisations across sectors including financial services, insurance, government, healthcare, retail, telecommunications, and utilities.
   

  

 At Integrity360, people come first. We invest heavily in learning, development and progression, fostering a dynamic culture where innovation, collaboration and continuous growth are at the heart of what we do. If you're ready to take your cyber security career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 As a Penetration Tester, you will perform hands-on technical security testing across a range of environments and technologies, working on complex and high-value projects. You will be expected to perform advanced manual testing (not just automated scans), exploit vulnerabilities, and deliver clear, actionable reports to clients.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who already has solid penetration testing experience and wants to take their technical skills to the next level, while also contributing to research and innovation within the team.
   

  

 What You Already Bring
   

  

* 2+ year of practical penetration testing experience (in labs, personal projects, or professionally)
* Strong understanding of core security concepts (e.g., OWASP Top 10, CVSS, MITRE ATT&CK)
* Solid grasp of networking fundamentals, ports/protocols, basic Windows/Linux internals
* Experience with common tools: Nmap, Burp Suite, Gobuster, Metasploit, BloodHound, etc.
* Manual testing exposure — not just automated scans
* Basic scripting or coding (e.g., Python, Bash, PowerShell)
* Good communication and documentation skills


 Nice to Have (But Not Required)
   

  

* Practical experience in one or more of:
* Active Directory attacks
* Cloud (AWS/Azure) testing basics
* Social engineering
* Source code review
* Certifications such as OSCP or similar
* Contributions to CTFs, Hack The Box, or bug bounty programs


 What We Offer
   

  

* A clear career path from Associate → Mid-Level → Senior → Red Team
* Support for certifications, lab access, and personal development
* Internal mentoring and hands-on training
* Exposure to real client projects and cutting-edge engagements
* A high-performing, international team where you can grow fast


 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Conduct penetration tests and technical security assessments on:
+ Web applications and APIs
+ Mobile applications
+ Network infrastructure (internal and external)
+ Cloud and hybrid environments
+ Social engineering scenarios (as needed)
+ Consultancy
+ Other offensive security services

* Review system architecture and application designs for security weaknesses.
* Exploit and escalate vulnerabilities to demonstrate real-world risk.
* Document technical findings and produce high-quality reports with remediation guidance.
* Stay current with the latest attack techniques, vulnerabilities, and tools.
* Participate in internal knowledge sharing, tool development, and security research.
* Support sales activities with technical insights when needed (e.g., scoping calls, workshops).
* Represent Integrity360 in client engagements, technical discussions, or industry forums.


**Required Skills / Experience**
* Hands-on experience as a penetration tester, with a proven track record of delivering quality security assessments.
* Industry experience working in Dev/Admin/Engineer field
* Industry experience working in the Information security field as a penetration tester
* Development and/or source code review experience in C/C++, C#, VB.NET, ASP, PHP, Java, Python or Ruby
* Unix, Windows and networking security skills
* Familiarity with general application and network security concepts
* Excellent communication skills
* Manual penetration testing experience above and beyond running automated tools
* Networking knowledge (ports, protocols, firewalls, routing, VPN)
* Understanding of Security Auditing tools
* Ethical hacking experience
* Report writing experience
* Presentation skills
* Scripting/coding, sys admin or networking experience
* Understanding of programming methodologies in one or more programming or scripting languages: Java, Python, C/C++, C#, .NET, ASP, PHP, etc.


 Personal Specification
   

  

* Urgent desire to learn with a passion for technology
* Motivated by being at the forefront of technology, and pushing technology boundaries
* Motivated by the thrill of being able to “break” systems
* Willingness to work late when required
* Willingness to travel when required, possibly abroad
* Analytical and critical thinker
* Good written English skills
* Problem-solving skills
* Efficient
* Analytical
* Persistence
* Attention to detail


**Certifications/Qualifications**
* One of the industry-leading qualifications (OSCP, CyberScheme, CREST, OSCE, OSWP)
* A degree in Computer Science, Cybersecurity, or related field is preferred, but practical experience and demonstrable skill are highly valued.

title: Systemansvarig
description:
**Institutionen för biokemi och biofysik.** 
 SciLifeLab (SciLifeLab) är ett nationellt center för molekylära biovetenskaper med fokus på forskning inom hälsa och miljö. Centret kombinerar ledande teknisk expertis med avancerat kunnande inom translationell medicin och molekylära biovetenskaper. SciLifelab är en nationell resurs som drivs av Karolinska Institutet, KTH, Stockholms universitet och Uppsala universitet. Centret samarbetar med flera andra lärosäten.
   

  

 Administrativt kommer anställningen att placeras vid Institutionen för biokemi och biofysik, Stockholms universitet. För mer information om vår verksamhet, se vår webbplats: www.dbb.su.se.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 SciLifeLab är en nationell plattform för molekylär biovetenskap i Sverige för att underlätta banbrytande, multidisciplinär biovetenskaplig forskning och främja till dess nytta för samhället.
   

  

 SciLifeLabs Cell and Kryo-EM facilitet erbjuder tillgång till avancerade avbildningsteknologier och genererar stora datamängder som kräver avancerad beräknings- och datainfrastruktur.
   

  

 Vi söker en
 **systemansvarig** 
 som ska stödja driften och vidareutvecklingen av vår avancerade beräknings- och datainfrastruktur, ta den till en nationell nivå i samarbete med stora nationella HPC infrastrukturen. Rollen innefattar att administrera Linux-baserade servrar och kluster, automatisera arbetsflöden samt bistå användare i en dynamisk forskningsmiljö.
   

  

 Read more
   

  

**Dina Arbetsuppgifter Kommer Vara**
* leda och vägleda systemadministratörer, att ge användarstöd och samarbeta med forskare
* samverka och utveckla kopplingar till den nationella HPC-infrastrukturen (NAISS)[MOU1]
* konfigurera och vidareutveckla Linux-servrar (hårdvara och mjukvara) som optimerar lokal och nationell användning
* hantera själv och leda systemadministratör om kluster, programvarumiljöer och automatiseringsverktyg (t.ex. Ansible)
* ansvara för hantering av stora datamängder
* kommunicera med andra datahanterare vid SciLifeLab och nationella grupper (b.l.a. SciLifeLab Data Center och SciLifeLabs Integrated Data Service)
* bidra till vidareutveckling av system och arbetsflöden i Kryo-EM på en nationell nivå.


 Kvalifikationer
   

  

* Mycket goda kunskaper i Linux-distributioner.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av installation och administration av servrar och kluster i HPC-miljö.
* Erfarenhet av arbete med nationella eller internationella HPC-infrastrukturer (t.ex. NAISS), inklusive förståelse för resursallokering, köhantering och användarmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet av beräkningsintensiva arbetsflöden och optimering av prestanda (CPU/GPU).
* God färdighet i Python eller andra skriptspråk för automatisering och datahantering.
* Kunskap om hantering av stora datamängder och dataflöden, inklusive parallella filsystem och lagringslösningar.
* Erfarenhet av dataintensiva analysmiljöer, gärna relaterade till bilddata eller kryo-EM.
* Förmåga att arbeta i gränssnittet mellan IT-infrastruktur och avancerad forskningsverksamhet.
* Starka kommunikationsfärdigheter och god förmåga att ge användarstöd för administration av distribuerade lagringssystem (t.ex. Ceph).
* Erfarenhet av stora datamängder (t.ex. bilddata).
* Kunskap om nätverksteknologier.
* Erfarenhet av container- och virtualiseringslösningar.
* Windows-systemadministration.


 Om anställningen
   

  

 Anställningen gäller tills vidare på deltid (20 %) med sex månaders provanställning. Stockholms universitet tillämpar individuell lönesättning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder
   

  

 Hos oss får du dynamiken i samspelet mellan högre utbildning och forskning som gör Stockholms universitet till en spännande och kreativ miljö. Du arbetar i en internationell miljö och får förmånliga villkor.
   

  

 Stockholms universitet värnar om att vara en arbetsplats som är fri från diskriminering och ger lika rättigheter och möjligheter för alla.
   

  

 Kontakt
   

  

 Ytterligare information lämnas av Dr. Marta Carroni, tfn 08-161013, marta.carroni@scilifelab.se.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Du söker anställningen via Stockholms universitets rekryteringssystem. Du som sökande ansvarar för att ansökan är komplett och att den är universitetet tillhanda senast sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Anvisningar för sökande finns på webbsidan: att söka en anställning.
   

  

 Stockholms universitet bidrar till det hållbara demokratiska samhällets utveckling genom kunskap, upplysning och sanningssökande.
   

  

 Anställningsform Tillsvidareanställning Anställningens omfattning Deltid Löneform Individuell lönesättning Antal lediga befattningar 1 Sysselsättningsgrad 20 % Ort Stockholm Län Stockholms län Land Sverige Referensnummer SU FV-1724-26 Facklig företrädare Saco-S Saco-S, 08162000, saco@saco.su.seSeko Seko, 0770457900, sekodirekt@seko.seST/OFR ST/OFR, 08162000, st@st.su.se Publicerat 2026-05-18 Sista ansökningsdag 2026-05-27

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
**Xensam: Join the Future of SAM**
 Xensam is the leader in AI-powered, cloud-based Software Asset Management. Our technology brings clarity to complex IT environments, helping users make smart, data-driven decisions and maximize software ROI.
   

  

 Recognized with the Highest Growth Award and ranked #3 Overall Champion at the Main Software 50 Awards Nordics, we’re scaling fast and looking for people who want to join the journey. At Xensam, you play a key role in a team built on energy, focus, and positivity. We value experience, but even more, the person behind it.
   

  

 Together, we build the future of SAM.
   

  

**About The Role**
 About the role As a Cyber Security Engineer, you will be responsible for strengthening and protecting the organization’s security foundation. You will design and implement security controls, identify and mitigate risks, and ensure that critical systems remain resilient against evolving threats. This role blends hands-on technical work with strategic guidance, supporting teams across the organization in building and maintaining secure architectures and workflows. Your expertise will help drive strong security practices, improve defenses, and uphold a reliable and secure operational environment.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will develop and maintain the security controls that protect the organization’s systems, infrastructure, and data. You will monitor for threats, address vulnerabilities, and ensure that risks are identified and mitigated effectively. You’ll lead the investigation and management of security incidents, driving timely remediation and long-term improvements. Collaboration with engineering and operations teams will be essential, helping embed secure practices into architectures, workflows, and deployments. You will also contribute to security automation, maintain clear documentation, and support the adoption of strong and consistent security standards across the organization. You will be working with supporting Sales in customer meetings, acting as a cybersecurity authority, and overseeing certifications and platform audits.
   

  

**Qualifications**
**Core experience**
* 5+ years in cybersecurity, application security, or security engineering
* Experience working with vulnerabilities in complex environments (cloud, infrastructure, or applications)
* Strong understanding of common vulnerability classes and attack techniques (e.g., OWASP Top 10)
* Ability to assess risk and make pragmatic security decisions in a business context


**Vulnerability management & ownership**
* Proven experience owning and driving a vulnerability management process end-to-end
* Strong ability to prioritize vulnerabilities based on risk, exploitability, and business impact
* Ability to define and improve processes, tooling, and workflows for vulnerability handling


**Developer & business collaboration**
* Acts as a trusted security partner for developers, supporting secure design and remediation
* Ability to support sales and customer-facing teams with security-related questions, questionnaires, and discussions
* Strong ability to translate technical findings into clear, business-relevant language


**Cloud, infrastructure, and AppSec**
* Experience securing cloud (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and on-prem environments with modern architectures
* Understanding of secure development practices, SDLC, and DevSecOps
* Familiarity with application security concepts and mitigation strategies
* Experience with threat modeling or security reviews is a plus


**Security operations & incident support**
* Understanding of security tooling such as vulnerability scanners, SIEM, or EDR/XDR
* Ability to support incident investigations by analyzing logs, identifying root cause, and contributing to remediation actions
* Experience helping drive improvements based on incidents and identified gaps


**Nice to have**
* Familiarity with frameworks such as ISO 27001, SOC 2, CIS, or similar
* Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CCSP, GIAC)


**What You Get**
* A generous work culture with free drinks and snacks, office massages, and more.
* Three days in-office (with remote work on Mondays and Fridays).
* An opportunity to shape your career growth while contributing to the company’s success.
* A dynamic position embracing "freedom under responsibility".
* If sales targets are met, all employees enjoy an annual destination trip.
* Other location-specific benefits.


**Our values at Xensam**
**Rebellious**
 We challenge the norm and act with initiative – always with responsibility.
   

  

**Humane**
 We foster a caring, inclusive environment that values diversity and respects individuality.
   

  

**Harmony**
 We value balance and create a supportive workplace where people thrive.
   

  

 As part of our recruitment process, we conduct background checks on final candidates to fulfill our commitments to customers and ensure a safe work environment.
   

  

 Xensam is the leading provider of AI-powered Software Asset Management technology. Designed to provide SAM Managers and IT Leaders with valuable data, our platform offers a wealth of features to simplify SAM workloads with built-in automation and advanced functionality. We prioritize ease of use and industry-leading security for both On-premise and Cloud software, putting organizations in total control of their hybrid IT environments.

* Kunskap om nätverksteknologier.
* Erfarenhet av container- och virtualiseringslösningar.
* Windows-systemadministration.



**Om anställningen**




 Anställningen gäller tills vidare på deltid (20 %) med sex månaders provanställning. Stockholms universitet tillämpar individuell lönesättning. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse.
   

  





**Vi erbjuder**




 Hos oss får du dynamiken i samspelet mellan högre utbildning och forskning som gör Stockholms universitet till en spännande och kreativ miljö. Du arbetar i en internationell miljö och får förmånliga villkor. 
   

  





 Stockholms universitet värnar om att vara en arbetsplats som är fri från diskriminering och ger lika rättigheter och möjligheter för alla.
   

  





**Kontakt**




 Ytterligare information lämnas av Dr. Marta Carroni, tfn 08-161013, marta.carroni@scilifelab.se.
   

  





**Ansökan**




 Du söker anställningen via Stockholms universitets rekryteringssystem. Du som sökande ansvarar för att ansökan är komplett och att den är universitetet tillhanda senast sista ansökningsdag.
   

  





 Anvisningar för sökande finns på webbsidan: att söka en anställning.
   

  





 Stockholms universitet bidrar till det hållbara demokratiska samhällets utveckling genom kunskap, upplysning och sanningssökande.

title: Head of AWM AI
description:
**Job ID: 4462**
 We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Head of AWM AI to join our Asset & Wealth Management (AWM) Chief Operating Office (COO). The ideal candidate will possess extensive practical experience in implementing AI use cases, with a strong preference for expertise in agentic AI solutions - especially experience enabling the private banking advisor flow end-to-end (from opportunity identification and client insights to meeting preparation, recommendations, and follow-up). This role is critical to advancing our AI strategy and delivering impactful solutions across AWM.
   

  

**About Our Team**
 The AWM COO is responsible for driving operational excellence, supporting business transformation, and fostering innovation within Asset & Wealth Management. We focus on optimizing processes, leveraging technology, and ensuring compliance to enable sustainable growth and superior client experiences. The COO team collaborates across functions to identify opportunities for improvement and implement strategic initiatives that enhance the overall performance of the organization.
   

  

**Main responsibilities in this role include, but are not limited to:**
* Own the AWM AI strategy, roadmap, and value realization - prioritizing a portfolio of high-impact AI/agentic AI use cases and delivering measurable outcomes (e.g., advisor capacity uplift, faster time-to-advice, improved client conversion/retention, reduced operational risk and cost).
* Accelerate advisor performance by deploying agentic AI that enables the private banking advisor flow end-to-end (research, client insights, meeting prep, next-best-actions, and follow-up), driving adoption and measurable productivity/quality gains with robust human-in-the-loop controls.
* Partner with Private Banking leadership, COO, Technology, and Control functions to identify, size, and execute AI-driven transformation opportunities across the advisor workflow and adjacent operations, ensuring clear accountability and rapid time-to-value.
* Lead cross-functional delivery from concept to production and scaled adoption – defining KPIs, running disciplined experimentation, and reporting quantified impact (e.g., revenue uplift, cost reduction, risk/control effectiveness, and advisor/client experience improvements) to senior leadership.
* Stay up-to-date with emerging AI technologies and best practices relevant to asset and wealth management.


 Location is Copenhagen or Stockholm.
   

  

**Who You Are**
 Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in being at our best – and that we imagine you share with us.
   

  

 This is the right role for you if you are a curious, innovative team player with a can-do attitude, always looking for ways on how we can unlock the next level for our customers.
   

  

**Your background and skills include:**
* Excellent leadership, communication, and program management skills, with a proven record of AI impact – shipping AI/GenAI solutions to production, driving sustained adoption, and delivering quantified business outcomes (e.g., advisor efficiency gains, improved time-to-advice, client conversion uplift, cost takeout, and control/risk improvements) in partnership with technology, risk, and compliance.
* Strong, hands-on experience delivering AI products from idea to production (problem framing, data, model selection, evaluation, deployment, and continuous improvement), including agentic AI, with tangible outcomes in advisor-facing workflows (ideally in private banking/wealth management).
* Strong understanding of asset and wealth management business processes, with demonstrated ability to translate front-office needs (advisor workflow) into AI use cases, product requirements, and measurable KPIs.
* Experience designing, testing, and operating agentic AI systems in a regulated environment (e.g., governance, privacy, model risk, auditability), including human-in-the-loop controls and guardrails appropriate for client-facing advisor enablement.
* Ability to work collaboratively with diverse teams.


**What We Offer**
**People** 
 come here when they want to get somewhere. For some, it’s to take their career to the next level. For others, it’s to break new ground within their area of expertise – in other words, with us, you will always move forward.
   

  

**A culture** 
 that fosters performance and growth in one of the largest Nordic banks, offering various opportunitiesQ to evolve, develop and learn from brilliant colleagues with diverse backgrounds in a vibrant working environment.
   

  

**Hybrid working model –** 
 we believe in the value of bringing people together and at the same time we embrace the freedom of flexibility.
   

  

**Diversity and inclusion** 
 are a natural part of our daily work. We know that an inclusive workplace is a sustainable one. We genuinely believe that our diverse backgrounds, experiences, characteristics and traits make us stronger together. Every day we strive to find new ways to improve diversity and inclusion within our community e.g. we have signed the European Diversity Charters in the countries where we operate to show our commitment and engage with others to continue learning and improving.
   

  

 If you are passionate about AI and eager to make a tangible impact in AWM, we invite you to apply and join our innovative COO team!
   

  

**Next steps**
 Submit your application no later than 31/05/2026. For more information, you’re welcome to contact Thomas Vedel Kristensen at thomas.v.kristensen@nordea.com.
   

  

**We enable dreams and aspirations for a greater good.**
**We build relationships.** 
 We add a personal touch to everything we do – when advising our customers, collaborating with colleagues, and meeting our potential candidates.
   

  

**We learn and develop.** 
 We take pride in being experts and thinking ahead. We use our expertise to meet our customers’ needs, from the simplest to the most complex. We bring a growth mindset to our work that enables us to focus on a broader perspective in our daily challenges.
   

  

**We lead change.** 
 We are responsible and aware of the impact of our decisions, both for our customers and for our local and global communities. Mindful of our responsibility towards current and future generations, we have made sustainability an integrated part of our business strategy.
   

  

**We are Nordea.** 
 We have a 200-year history of supporting and growing the Nordic economies and our values are deeply rooted in these open, progressive and collaborative societies. As one of the biggest employers in the Nordics, Poland and Estonia, you have excellent opportunities to evolve, develop and move forward with us.
   

  

**Only for candidates in Sweden:** 
 For union information, please contact finansforbundet@nordea.se or SACONordea@nordea.com.

title: Data Engineer
description:
*At* 
***Norrin***
*, we’re shaping the era of Enterprise Intelligence. Our vision is to transform business productivity through data & AI by creating solutions that deliver measurable impact. As a Microsoft technology partner, we are at the forefront of reshaping how businesses operate across the Nordics. What defines us is deep technical expertise, a creative engineering mindset, and a people-first culture. You’ll have the chance to grow in a direction that matters to you while building solutions that make a real difference. With a strong presence in Finland and growing operations in Sweden, the United States, Thailand and Vietnam, we continue to expand our Nordic roots internationally. Most recently, Swedish company* 
***BizOne***
*joined the Norrin Group, further strengthening our presence across the Nordics.*
 We’re looking for
 **Data Engineers** 
 to join our growing team in Stockholm. You might be a data enthusiast with a couple of years under your belt or already a more seasoned professional. What matters most to us is your willingness to keep learning, take ownership, and work on solutions that create clear business value.
   

  

 In this role, you will get to work on a variety of cloud-based customer projects, designing and building modern data platforms and analytics solutions using Azure Data Platform services, Databricks, and AI-enabled tools. Your work may include data modelling, integrations, and architectural design, always in close collaboration with customers and internal experts. You will also be part of Norrin’s Data Engineering Guild, a community where knowledge is shared, skills are developed together, and people actively support each other’s growth.
   

  

**🌱Why Norrin?**
* People-first culture: A workplace where you can be yourself. Our culture is built on openness, equality, and mutual respect
* Flexible working model: Our hybrid model offers the best of both worlds, flexibility in your daily life and in-person collaboration when it moves things forward
* Fair compensation: A competitive salary that reflects your skills and experience
* Grow with us: We encourage continuous learning and development in a direction that matters to you


**✨ We value**
* 2-5 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in analytics solution development
* Experience building Databricks and/or Fabric-based solutions in an Azure environment
* Understanding of data warehousing, data modelling, and integrations
* Good collaboration skills and a customer-oriented mindset
* Curiosity and initiative to keep learning new things and stay up to date
* Ability to communicate technical solutions clearly, also to non-technical stakeholders
* Fluent Swedish and English skills


**🛠️ Your technical toolkit**
* Strong skills in SQL and Python/PySpark
* Experience building data pipelines using Databricks, dbt, Microsoft Fabric or similar
* Solid understanding of data security and privacy principles
* Experience with dimensional modelling
* Knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD principles


**Experience With**
 ➕
 **What’s a plus (but not required)**
* Power BI and automated reporting
* GenAI or machine learning, including MLOps
* Cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake.


**📩 Could this be your next step?**
 We’re excited to hear from you. Please submit your application as soon as possible. We will move forward with the recruitment process as soon as we find the right candidate.

title: Sr Manager, Solutions Engineering
description:
**Your role at Dynatrace**
**Senior Manager, Solutions Engineering**
 We are looking for a Senior Manager, Solutions Engineering to direct the efforts of Solutions Engineering teams while driving measurable business outcomes—especially top-line expansion revenue within our current customer base. This leader will partner closely with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success/Customer Care, and other stakeholders to identify customer upgrades, design solutions that promote Dynatrace products and services, and deliver world-class technical and commercial outcomes.
   

  

 The Dynatrace Solutions Engineering organization champions our strategic direction and vision, while promoting and advocating new product direction to and on behalf of our customers. Solutions Engineering is both a trusted advisor and solution consultant, helping customers realize value through modern observability, automation, and security.
   

  

 The successful candidate brings a strong track record of building and developing high-performing technical presales organizations, leading Solution Engineers, scaling programs and processes, and engaging credibly with senior customer stakeholders. You will combine business acumen, technical depth, and hands-on leadership to help customers accelerate cloud adoption, digital transformation, and enterprise agility—while expanding Dynatrace value across the account base.
   

  

 Are you ready to be part of this extraordinary story and make a personal impact—helping the world deliver perfect software and delightful digital experiences, radically automate operations, and accelerate innovation with confidence?
   

  

**Required**
**What will help you succeed**
* 11+ years of technical pre-sales / Solutions Engineering experience, with 4+ years of people management experience.
* Strong track record of working in a customer-facing environment and driving initiatives to improve customer satisfaction and outcomes.
* Proven ability to drive expansion outcomes (upsell/cross-sell), build strategic account influence, and partner effectively with Sales leadership.
* Excellent communication, organizational, critical thinking, and analytical skills.
* Excellent presentation skills in small, large, and executive-level settings.
* Experience working for a SaaS vendor.
* Ability for regular travel across the assigned region (as applicable).
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent practical experience.


**Technical Background (Preferred/Strongly Desired)**
* Knowledge of modern architectures and methods (e.g., Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud-native patterns).
* Experience with public cloud providers (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
* Experience in Application Performance Management (APM), observability, and monitoring.
* Development experience in one or more of: Java, .NET, C/C++, Python, Node.js, PHP.
* Understanding of network and system management solutions.
* Understanding of IT Service Management (ITSM) practices and solutions.


**Why you will love being a Dynatracer**
* A one-product software company creating real value for the largest enterprises and millions of end customers globally, striving for a world where software works perfectly.
* Working with the latest technologies and at the forefront of innovation in tech on scale; but also, in other areas like marketing, design, or research.
* A team that thinks outside the box, welcomes unconventional ideas, and pushes boundaries.
* An environment that fosters innovation, enables creative collaboration, and allows you to grow
* A globally unique and tailor-made career development program recognizing your potential, promoting your strengths, and supporting you in achieving your career goals.
* A truly international mindset that is being shaped by the diverse personalities, expertise, and backgrounds of our global team.
* A relocation team that is eager to help you start your journey to a new country, always there to support and by your side.
* Attractive compensation packages and stock purchase options with numerous benefits and advantages.

title: Senior Data Scientist
description:
Mentimeter is an engagement tool with a clear goal in mind. To turn presentations into conversations. Through real-time interactivity and clear visualizations, we get people to participate, engage and become more productive. Transforming all those passive meetings, airless classrooms and drawn out trainings into valuable and memorable moments.
   

  

 We truly believe that you achieve the best results by doing things together. And that successful leaders need to adopt a curious and collaborative mindset in order to get there. So with you at Mentimeter, you’ll be a big part of the ambition to help over 1 billion people listen, learn and work better together.
   

  

 Are you passionate about leveraging data science to drive business impact and take analytics to the next level? Join Mentimeter as our
 **Senior** 
**Data Scientist** 
 , where you will set new standards for data science craft within the Data & Analytics (DNA) department and play a pivotal role in advancing our analytics capabilities to drive impactful, data-informed strategies for our SaaS-based business. Data is not only central, but crucial, to how Mentimeter will reach success.
   

  

 At Mentimeter, the DNA department is on a mission to catalyse our company strategy and drive innovation, growth and impact throughout our company and user journey by using data. We work at the intersection of analytics, data science, and business to deliver actionable insights and solutions that enable better decisions across departments, including Product, Marketing, Sales, and Revenue Operations. Your contributions will directly influence key business outcomes such as customer retention, engagement, and expansion.
   

  

 In this role, you’ll collaborate with and be supported by cross-functional teams of data scientists, data engineers, user researchers, product managers and company leaders who are passionate about Mentimeter’s mission and using data to achieve it.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design and deploy machine learning models, such as predictive scoring, clustering, and forecasting, with a strong focus on technical aspects of production deployment.
* Build and ship internal data products that activate models and insights in the right systems and tools to drive impact.
* Be a key part of our Analytics team to align priorities, partner with stakeholders and ensure solutions are relevant and impactful.
* Collaborate closely with our Data Platform Team, Analytics Engineering, and other sister teams to enable the business to proactively act on data and create business impact.
* Elevate the data science craft within the Data & Analytics department by setting new standards, implementing innovative approaches and best practices.
* Provide mentorship and technical guidance to team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and growth.
* Translate complex data analyses into compelling narratives and visualizations that resonate with diverse audiences.


**We believe you have**
* A minimum of 8 years of relevant work experience.
* Proven expertise in data science methodologies, with strong proficiency in machine learning techniques and programming languages (e.g. Python and SQL).
* Strong business acumen with a deep understanding of sales, marketing, and product analytics.
* Expertise in ML modeling with a focus on production deployment and ML engineering best practices (e.g. versioning, monitoring, testing).
* A builder mindset and interest to build internal products and systems that scale, leveraging automation, generative AI, and data to drive Mentimeter’s growth and efficiency.
* Solid software engineering practices, including git, code reviews, and writing performant, maintainable code.
* Experience collaborating with data engineers on data pipelines, model deployment, and monitoring.
* Demonstrated ability to deliver high-quality analyses and actionable insights aligned with business objectives.
* Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to convey complex concepts through clear narratives and visualizations.
* A track record of mentoring team members and fostering a culture of best practices and continuous improvement.


**Nice to have**
* Familiarity with modern data tools (e.g. Looker, Hex, Snowflake) and cloud platforms (e.g. AWS, Google Cloud).
* Experience working within a SaaS environment, with a strong understanding of the unique business challenges and opportunities it presents.


**Not Required**
* Swedish is not required (as daily work is carried out in English and the Mentimeter team currently boasts 50+ different nationalities)


**What Mentimeter Can Offer**
 At Mentimeter we can offer a diverse and inclusive work environment supported by smart and driven colleagues. We believe in continuous professional development for all of our colleagues and therefore offer access to a leadership program (including external personal coach) and relevant education to ensure that we continue to be state-of-the-art when it comes to innovating and building Mentimeter. Your place will be in a growing company with lots of career opportunities, working on a beloved product used by more than 300 million people. It’s not all about work though, we also offer a very healthy view on work-life balance.
   

  

 All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package, including pension contributions. Learn more about our benefits by visiting our Benefits & Perks page
   

  

**AI and Hiring at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter, we believe AI helps us work smarter - but it never replaces the human assessment, curiosity, and personal connection that define our culture and our hiring. We use AI as a sparring partner: to bounce ideas, bring new perspectives, support structure, and make our work more efficient. But the meaning, decisions, and interactions always come from people.
   

  

* AI does not screen or decide on candidates.
* There is no automated filtering, ranking, or decision-making in our recruitment process. Every application is reviewed by a person.
* Hiring teams may use AI to support their work - for example, to structure notes, prepare interview questions, or organize their thinking.


 AI strengthens our work, but it does not define it. At Mentimeter, we’re not building an AI-driven hiring process - we’re building a people-first culture, where technology helps us listen, learn, and grow together.
   

  

**Culture at Mentimeter**
 At Mentimeter we believe in giving everyone a voice - regardless of who you are. So we build a platform that does just that. Our platform is not only our product but also our organization. A platform where people feel safe, where differences are embraced, a place where you can have fun. We strongly encourage applicants who are people of color, LGBTQ+, women, people with disabilities, and/or formerly incarcerated people, and a college degree is not strictly required. In order to give everyone a voice, we need to be as diverse as our users.
   

  

 Learn more about our culture by visiting our Culture page.
   

  

 Review our Privacy Policy for more information.

title: Senior Cloud Engineer | Saab | Stockholm
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtiden för cloud-plattformar inom en av Sveriges ledande teknikorganisationer? Brinner du för att bygga robust, skalbar och säker cloud-infrastruktur som möjliggör innovation inom försvar och säkerhet? Trivs du i en roll där du kombinerar hands-on cloud engineering med tekniskt ledarskap och arkitekturansvar? Då kan detta vara nästa steg för dig!* 




  





**Din roll** 




 Som Senior Cloud Engineer på Saab spelar du en nyckelroll i företagets fortsatta cloud-resa. Du blir en av de tekniska nyckelpersonerna bakom de plattformar och lösningar som möjliggör utveckling av avancerade system inom bland annat flygteknik, sensorer och undervattenssystem.
 



  





 Rollen är tydligt engineering-driven och hands-on. Du arbetar dagligen med design, implementation och vidareutveckling av cloud-infrastruktur, samtidigt som du bidrar med arkitekturperspektiv, sätter tekniska riktlinjer och hjälper team att göra rätt val över tid.
 



  





**Du kommer att:** 



* Designa, bygga och vidareutveckla cloud-plattformar i AWS och Azure
* Arbeta med Infrastructure as Code, automation och standardisering för att skapa stabila och återanvändbara lösningar
* Bidra till och etablera guardrails, principer och best practices för hur molntjänster används inom organisationen
* Stötta och vägleda utvecklings- och plattformsteam i deras cloud-arbete
* Arbeta nära andra seniora tekniker, DevOps- och plattformsteam samt bidra i tekniska diskussioner och roadmap-arbete



  





 Arkitektur är en viktig del av rollen, men inte hela jobbet - fokus ligger på att få saker att fungera i praktiken, inte att producera presentationer eller teoretiska modeller.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har en stark bakgrund inom cloud engineering och som vill ta ett bredare tekniskt ansvar. Du är trygg i att arbeta hands-on med molnplattformar, men har också förmågan att lyfta blicken, se helheten och bidra med teknisk riktning.
 



  





 Du har erfarenhet av att arbeta i större, komplexa och gärna reglerade miljöer, där krav på säkerhet, tillgänglighet och kvalitet är höga. Du trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik, plattform och verksamhet och tycker om att stötta andra genom kunskapsdelning och tekniskt ledarskap.
 



  





**För att lyckas i denna roll, bör du ha följande kvalifikationer:** 




  




* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av arbete med AWS och/eller Azure inom cloud engineering
* Praktisk erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code och containerplattformar (Terraform, CDK, ARM, Docker, Kubernetes/AKS)
* Erfarenhet av monitoring, logging, backup-lösningar, CI/CD och cloud automation
* God förståelse för nätverk, säkerhet, identitet och grundläggande cloud-tjänster
* Erfarenhet av att bidra till eller delta i en cloud transformation journey
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i större, komplexa och gärna reglerade miljöer
* Förmågan att lyfta blicken, se helheten och bidra med teknisk riktning
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Möjlighet att genomgå och bli godkänd i säkerhetsprövning enligt gällande regelverk



  





**Meriterande:** 




  




* Erfarenhet av att bygga eller vägleda cloud-plattformar, inklusive guardrails och tekniska standarder
* Erfarenhet från reglerade industrier, stora organisationer eller konsultroller
* Förmåga att översätta verksamhetsbehov till konkret teknisk lösning
* Cloud-certifieringar (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Bakgrund inom produktutveckling, FoU, DevSecOps eller utvecklarfokuserade plattformar
* Erfarenhet från fordonsindustri, försvar, FoU eller tekniskt avancerad produktutveckling



  





**Vad du blir en del av** 




  





**Common Tech** 
 har i uppdrag att skapa gemensamma tekniska förutsättningar för hela Saab. Genom att utveckla och förvalta gemensamma plattformar, tekniska ramverk och arbetssätt möjliggör Common Tech ett effektivt, enhetligt och långsiktigt teknikutvecklingsarbete över hela organisationen. Målet är att ge Saabs team rätt tekniska grund för att kunna utveckla avancerade produkter med hög kvalitet, säkerhet och tillförlitlighet.
 



  





**Enablement Tech** 
 är en av flera avdelningar inom Common Tech och ansvarar för att bygga, vidareutveckla och förvalta de gemensamma tekniska plattformar som möjliggör Saabs utvecklingsarbete i praktiken. Här skapas förutsättningarna för att utveckling ska kunna ske snabbt, säkert och kontrollerat - i stor skala - genom stabila plattformar, verktyg och tekniska tjänster som används brett över organisationen.
 



  





 Fokus inom Enablement Tech ligger på att möjliggöra och accelerera. Genom välarkitekturerade lösningar inom bland annat cloud, utvecklingsmiljöer, plattformsautomation och gemensam infrastruktur görs det möjligt för produkt- och utvecklingsteam att fokusera på att bygga funktionalitet och affärsvärde, snarare än att hantera grundläggande tekniska förutsättningar. Arbetet handlar om att skapa återanvändbara, skalbara och långsiktigt hållbara plattformar som andra team kan lita på och bygga vidare på.
 



  





**Saab** 
 är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med ett tydligt uppdrag: att bidra till att skydda människor och samhällen. Med omkring 20 000 medarbetare världen över utvecklar Saab avancerad teknik i nära samarbete mellan människor, kompetenser och discipliner. Företaget präglas av en inkluderande kultur där samarbete, lärande och långsiktig utveckling står i centrum.
 



  





*Dessa positioner kräver godkänd säkerhetsprövning enligt den svenska säkerhetsskyddslagen.* 




  





**Ansökan** 




 Den här rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av Jefferson Wells för SAABS räkning, vilket innebär att du kommer att bli anställd direkt av SAAB.
 



  





 Vi tar ej emot ansökningar via email pga GDPR.
 



  





**Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Azure Data & AI Engineer
description:
**Sammanfattning**
 Vill du arbeta med modern data engineering och avancerad analys för att hjälpa organisationer fatta bättre och mer datadrivna beslut? Hos Avanade får du möjlighet att arbeta med moderna dataplattformar i Azure och leverera lösningar som gör verklig affärsnytta för våra kunder!
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett starkt community av Azure Data- och AI-specialister där kunskapsdelning, samarbete och mentorskap är en självklar del av kulturen. Vi investerar aktivt i din utveckling och ger dig möjlighet att arbeta med varierande kundprojekt, modern teknik och några av branschens mest spännande datalösningar.
   

  

 Här får du både utvecklas tekniskt och växa i din konsultroll samtidigt som du är med och formar framtiden inom AI, analys och datadriven innovation.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **Azure Data & AI Engineer på Avanade** 
 arbetar du nära våra kunder för att omvandla affärsbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar. Du analyserar nuvarande arbetssätt, identifierar möjligheter där data kan skapa värde och är med och designar moderna dataplattformar i Azure.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta med utveckling av datapipelines, API:er och datalager samt bidra till att göra data tillgänglig och användbar för verksamheten genom analys och visualisering. I rollen samarbetar du tätt med både kollegor och kunder i olika projekt, vilket ger dig möjlighet att bredda din erfarenhet och utvecklas i din karriär som konsult. Hos oss arbetar du i en kultur där vi stöttar varandra, delar kunskap och utvecklas tillsammans
   

  

**Together We Do What Matters.**
**Arbetsuppgifter**
**I Rollen Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Designa och utveckla moderna, datadrivna lösningar i Azure för våra kunder.
* Arbeta nära kunder för att förstå deras behov och omvandla dem till tekniska lösningar som skapar affärsvärde.
* Fördjupa din kompetens inom datamodellering, ETL och orkestrering av dataplattformar.
* Utveckla och hantera dataflöden med verktyg som SQL, Python, Azure Data Factory och Airflow.
* Delta i hela leveransprocessen – från krav och design till implementation och uppföljning.
* Ta ansvar för din egen kompetensutveckling och samarbeta med både tekniska specialister och affärsroller i teamet.


**Qualifications**
**Kompetenser och erfarenheter**
* God förståelse för data och dess roll i organisationer, både inom enterprise- och mid-market-segmentet.
* Erfarenhet av programmering i SQL och Python, alternativt relevant utbildning med fokus på analytiskt tänkande och problemlösning.
* Erfarenhet av Azure Data Factory (ADF) och Airflow.
* Kunskap om Azure Data Factory, Azure Data Lake, Azure SQL Data Warehouse och Azure SQL.
* Grundläggande kunskap inom och ett genuint intresse för Data Science och Machine Learning.
* Erfarenhet av nära samarbete i team och av att arbeta i distribuerade eller internationella team.
* Du har mycket god kommunikativ förmåga och kan samarbeta med kunder och kollegor på både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.
* Erfarenhet av andra programmeringsspråk eller mjukvaruutveckling är meriterande.


**Om Dig**
* Du är analytisk och nyfiken – och drivs av att ställa frågor som “varför?” och “vad händer om?”.
* Du är en lagspelare som trivs i samarbeten över olika roller och kompetensområden.
* Du brinner för att lösa verkliga problem med hjälp av data och för att ständigt utvecklas och lära dig nytt.
* Du är anpassningsbar och trivs i dynamiska projektmiljöer där förutsättningarna kan förändras.
* Du är nyfiken på innovation, molnteknologi och framtiden inom AI.

title: Senior Linux Infrastrukturkonsult
description:
**Vill du arbeta hands-on i en stabil, säker och tekniskt avancerad datacentermiljö där tillgänglighet och kvalitet verkligen spelar roll?**
**Vi söker nu en senior Linux Infrastrukturkonsult till ICW för uppdrag inom samhällsviktig IT.**
**Om rollen**
 Vill du arbeta med modern Linux-infrastruktur i samhällskritiska och säkerhetsfokuserade miljöer?
   

  

 ICW söker nu en Senior Linux Infrastrukturkonsult för konsultuppdrag hos kund där du blir en viktig del i att bygga upp och vidareutveckla nästa generations säkra och skalbara IT-miljöer.
   

  

 I rollen arbetar du med design, implementation, drift och vidareutveckling av avancerade Linux- och infrastrukturlösningar med höga krav på säkerhet, tillgänglighet och automation. Du kommer att arbeta nära verksamheten och vara med och skapa robusta plattformar som möjliggör säkra och effektiva leveranser av samhällsviktiga tjänster.
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett kompetent team med stort eget ansvar och möjlighet att påverka tekniska vägval och arkitektur.
   

  

**Teknik & arbetsområden**
 Du arbetar praktiskt och operativt med bland annat:
   

  

* Linux servermiljöer (Ubuntu & RHEL)
* Containerplattformar och Kubernetes
* Automation via Ansible och AWX
* Virtualisering och infrastrukturtjänster
* DNS, DHCP, NTP och andra centrala stödtjänster
* Jumphost / Bastion-lösningar
* Zero Trust-koncept för åtkomst och publicering av tjänster
* Identitetshantering (IAM), LDAP, PKI och certifikatshantering
* Backup och återställning
* Övervakning och säkerhetsövervakning
* CI/CD-pipelines och versionshantering (Git)


 Vidare kan arbetet även innefatta:
   

  

* Webbservrar (Nginx / Apache / Caddy)
* Databaser (PostgreSQL / MySQL)
* Reverse proxy och lastbalansering
* OpenStack, KVM och VMware
* MAAS (Metal-as-a-Service)
* Lagring via S3, NFS och SAN
* PXE och automatiserad provisionering
* Logghantering via exempelvis Syslog, SNMP och OpenTelemetry
* Nätverk, switching och routing


**Meriterande** 
 :
   

  

* Erfarenhet av säkerhetskritiska eller samhällsviktiga verksamheter
* Erfarenhet av Zero Trust-arkitektur
* Erfarenhet av OpenStack och större Linuxplattformar
* Kunskap inom säkerhetsövervakning och logganalys
* Erfarenhet av PKI, EJBCA eller ADCS
* Erfarenhet av automatiserad infrastruktur och Infrastructure as Code


 Bakgrund- och registerkontroll kommer att utföras på kandidat, flytande svenska i tal och skrift är ett krav för tjänsten.
   

  

 Arbetet ska utföras av konsult i kunds lokaler, med viss möjlighet till arbete på distans enligt ö.k.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som är senior och trygg i rollen, med:
   

  

* Minst 10 års erfarenhet av Linux och infrastrukturd drift
* Flerårig erfarenhet av Docker och Kubernetes
* Erfarenhet av CI/CD, Git och automatiserade leveransflöden
* Erfarenhet av Ansible och automationsplattformar som AWX
* Stark förståelse för IT-säkerhet, sårbarhetshantering och stabil drift
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och ta tekniskt ansvar
* Ett strukturerat arbetssätt och hög ansvarskänsla
* Förmåga att dokumentera och överföra kunskap till drift- och förvaltningsorganisationer


 Du är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och vågar utmana befintliga arbetssätt med nya idéer och förbättringsförslag. Du trivs i miljöer där teknik, säkerhet och kvalitet står i fokus.
   

  

**Varför ICW?**
 Hos ICW blir du del av ett bolag som arbetar med kritisk IT-infrastruktur där det du gör verkligen betyder något. Vi kombinerar hög teknisk kompetens med ett prestigelöst arbetssätt och långsiktiga kundrelationer.
   

  

 Passar dig som gillar stabil drift, djup teknik och tydligt ansvar, utan onödig byråkrati.
   

  

**Om ICW – mer än ett konsultbolag**
 Vill du arbeta i ett IT-konsultbolag där du har verkligt inflytande över din vardag, dina uppdrag och din utveckling? Hos ICW kombinerar vi frihet under ansvar med stark lagkänsla och teknisk spets.
   

  

 Vi hjälper samhällsviktiga verksamheter och näringsliv att bygga, drifta och utveckla modern och säker IT-infrastruktur. Våra uppdrag är långsiktiga, tekniskt krävande och meningsfulla , ofta där stabilitet, säkerhet och tillgänglighet är affärskritiskt.
   

  

**Så är det att arbeta hos oss**
 Du arbetar självständigt i kvalificerade konsultuppdrag, med stöd av ett erfaret och engagerat team
   

  

 Vi är en platt organisation med korta beslutsvägar, hos oss blir din röst hörd
   

  

 Vi tror på lagarbete, kunskapsdelning och personlig utveckling. Du får stor frihet att påverka dina uppdrag, arbetssätt och balans mellan arbete och privatliv
   

  

**Utveckling & trygghet**
 Individuell utbildningsbudget och överenskommen utvecklingsplan. Trygg och flexibel lönemodell med individuella förmåner. Återkommande gemensamma aktiviteter, konferenser och erfarenhetsutbyten.
   

  

 Gillar du tekniskt djup, frihet under ansvar och att arbeta med IT som faktiskt spelar roll, då kommer du trivas på ICW.

title: Territory Systems Engineer
description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.
 



  





 This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
 



 We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry. This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.
 



  





 As a Territory Systems Engineer, you will be the trusted technical partner to the Territory Account Executive and our valued Channel Partners. Your role is critical in translating Everpure’s vision and innovative solutions into tangible, value-driven technical proposals for a broad and dynamic set of customers. You will play a pivotal part in accelerating growth by ensuring our partners and customers have the technical resources, validation, and support needed to successfully adopt Everpure solutions.
 



  





 At Everpure, you'll join a culture built on curiosity, innovation, and integrity. We celebrate diverse perspectives, challenge convention, and empower our people to think big, take bold action, and make a measurable impact. This is your opportunity to grow your technical and sales career with one of the most innovative technology companies in the world and do work that truly changes how businesses use data to compete and win.
 



  





**The Role** 




 The Territory Systems Engineer (TSE) is a key growth role, focusing on providing essential pre-sales technical support across accounts within a given territory. This position requires a blend of technical acumen, partnership enablement, and a proactive approach to supporting high-volume, transactional sales motions. You will act as the primary technical coach for our partners, empowering them to drive new business and expansion opportunities independently. This TSE role is a strategic position where you will immediately leverage your existing technical expertise and channel knowledge to drive high-volume, transactional sales motions. This role offers accelerated career growth into an Enterprise Systems Engineer (SE) position, taking ownership of our most complex and strategic customer engagements.
 



 You won't be in this alone. You'll be joining a highly collaborative Nordics SE team known for sharing knowledge and celebrating successes together. Your contributions will be immediately recognized and valued.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* **Serve as the Technical Brand Ambassador:** 
 Act as the primary technical contact alongside the TAE in customer engagements, guiding discussions and showcasing the power and simplicity of Everpure's solutions.
* **Empower Partner Technical Teams:** 
 Guide and activate elite and preferred Partner Systems Engineers (SEs), providing coaching and resources to help them effectively sell, compete, and scale their business with Everpure.
* **Facilitate Technical Validation:** 
 Review and validate sizing, quotes, and technical architectures for various solutions, ensuring accuracy and alignment with customer needs and product capabilities.
* **Drive Tool & Resource Adoption:** 
 Increase awareness and usage of Everpure's sales and technical tools across the partner ecosystem, ensuring they are leveraged effectively at the appropriate stages of the sales cycle.
* **Coordinate Technical Enablement:** 
 Organize and coordinate technical resources (e.g., specialists, training teams) for partner bootcamps, technical events, and workshops to continuously upskill our channel.
* **Resource Management & Escalation:** 
 Function as a technical "go-to" advisor for partners, efficiently linking them to virtual resources or properly escalating complex technical inquiries to dedicated Systems Engineers (SEs), the help desk, or Product Technical Marketing (PTM).
* **Support Collaborative Growth:** 
 Build and maintain strong, productive relationships with both the TAE and Channel Partners to ensure seamless technical support, shared goal achievement, and ultimately, closed deals.



  





**What You'll Bring** 



* **Proven Technical Experience:** 
 Minimum of 3–4 years of professional experience in a customer-facing or pre-sales technical role (e.g., SE, Technical Consultant) within the B2B IT infrastructure market. Direct experience working in the channel for a storage vendor or partner is highly advantageous.
* **Deep Domain Expertise:** 
 Demonstrated hands-on experience (3–4 years) with data storage, virtualization, or cloud infrastructure solutions. A comprehensive understanding of key competitor solutions and channel sales processes is highly valued.
* **Collaborative Mindset:** 
 Demonstrated success working closely with a sales counterpart (like a TAE) and channel partners to achieve shared business and technical objectives.
* **Autonomy and Deal Ownership:** 
 A high degree of self-motivation and initiative with a proven ability to independently manage technical sales cycles, apply complex technical concepts effectively, and drive outcomes in a fast-paced environment.
* **Strong Communication & Coaching Skills:** 
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills with the ability to clearly articulate technical value to diverse audiences, from partner SEs to business decision-makers. Fluency in both Swedish and English is required.
* **Organizational Resilience:** 
 Excellent organizational and time management skills necessary to juggle multiple partner engagements, technical validations, and training support activities in a dynamic territory.



  





 #LI-ONSITE
 



  





**WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:** 



* **Innovation** 
 : We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
* **Growth** 
 : We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
* **Team** 
 : We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.



 And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company-sponsored team events. Check out
 
 purebenefits.com
 
 for more information.
 



  





**ACCOMMODATIONS AND ACCESSIBILITY:** 




 Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at
 
 TA-Ops@purestorage.com
 
 if you’re invited to an interview.
 



  





**OUR COMMITMENT TO A STRONG AND INCLUSIVE TEAM:** 




 We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.
 



 Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based upon race, religion, color, national origin, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, gender expression, transgender status, sexual stereotypes, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or any other characteristic legally protected by the laws of the jurisdiction in which you are being considered for hire.
 



**Join us and bring your best.** 




**Bring your bold.** 




**Pure and simple.**

title: Senior Strategic Martech Advisor
description:
**About The Job**
 As
 *Senior Strategic Martech Advisor* 
 , you will join IMPACT's Martech practice – contributing to the long-term vision, standardising methodology, and driving innovation. You enter the room deeply prepared on trends, emerging technology, and each client's business reality. Clients invest in complex, high-value solutions and expect to see revenue impact quickly - your job is to bridge technical depth and strategic clarity so every engagement delivers measurable commercial outcomes. You will shape go-to-market strategies, secure vendor partnerships, and mentor senior consultants to build internal expertise.
   

  

**The Position Is For You, Who Thrives To**
* Define and execute data strategies aligned with client business objectives - from martech stack selection to measurement frameworks and personalisation maturity
* Serve as the trusted advisor and translator for C-suite stakeholders (CMOs, CDOs, CTOs) - turning complex data and martech landscapes into clear commercial roadmaps that demonstrate concrete revenue impact
* Shape and oversee delivery of complex technical projects across cross-functional teams, owning quality from kick-off to handover
* Identify and develop new business within existing accounts and define value propositions for enterprise prospects
* Partner with technology vendors to build strategic alliances and co-marketing opportunities
* Explore and find answers to how martech converges with AI
* Design go-to-market strategies that position IMPACT as a premier digital transformation partner
* Contribute strongly to IMPACT's point of view on Data & Martech - through reusable frameworks, thought leadership, events, and vendor relationships
* Collaborate across practices (Commerce, Experience, Strategy) to create integrated cross-department solutions
* Mentor colleagues to build internal expertise


 YOUR PROFILE
   

  

**We imagine you bring**
* 8–10+ years in digital advisory, management consulting, or senior in-house roles focused on data strategy and marketing technology
* Deep knowledge of CDPs, marketing automation, personalisation platforms, and cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Databricks)
* Hands-on experience with marketing and loyalty platforms such as Bloomreach, Salesforce, Adobe, TalonOne, Braze, Iterable, Klaviyo, and Voyado
* Proficiency in designing data architectures for omnichannel environments, including web analytics and server-side tracking
* Experience with AI integration (bespoke and commercial) into business processes and martech workflows
* Strong financial acumen - practice P&L management, business cases, and TCO translation
* Excellent communication skills - able to present complex technical roadmaps to C-suite executives with confidence and clarity
* A track record of scaling data practices within a consultancy and driving measurable commercial outcomes for enterprise clients


 LIFE AT IMPACT
   

  

 Commerce has never stood still. Neither have we. For more than 25 years, we have helped ambitious businesses turn change into growth by taking the time to understand what truly moves their business. What started in Aarhus, Denmark has grown into a European powerhouse with offices across the world.
   

  

 From strategy and experience to technology, data, and execution, every capability sits under one roof. That’s how we move faster, align better, and build solutions that hold over time. We work close by. We think long-term. And we take responsibility for bringing technology, strategy, and execution together - helping brands grow with clarity and confidence in the
 *next era of commerce.*
 IMPACT is built by specialists who care deeply about what they do, and take responsibility for what they deliver. Wherever commerce happens, we show up with the same standards, the same accountability, and the same ambition. Because consistency is what builds trust, across borders and over time.
   

  

 CONTACT
   

  

 Send your CV via the link below. Interviews are held on an ongoing basis, as the position is to be filled as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, you are welcome to contact Christian Kerrn-Jespersen at +45 23299249
   

  

 We are looking forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 Commerce has never stood still. Neither have we.
   

  

 For more than 25 years, we’ve helped ambitious businesses turn change into growth by taking the time to understand what truly moves their business.
   

  

 From strategy and experience to technology, data, and execution, every capability sits under one roof. That’s how we move faster, align better, and build solutions that hold over time.
   

  

 We work close by. We think long-term. And we take responsibility for bringing technology, strategy, and execution together – helping brands grow with clarity and confidence in the
 *next era of commerce.*

title: Superfly Front Office Quants
emails: msei@danskebank.dk, otf@danskebank.dk, hyd@danskebank.dk, nelb@danskebank.dk, lahel@danskebank.dk, pekaj@danskebank.dk
description:
**Job Description**
*To reinforce our position as the Nordic Markets Powerhouse, Danske Bank is making a major investment in quantitative analytics and technology. As part of this, we are expanding our Markets Quant Center of Excellence.*
**Superfly Front Office Quants**
 Our cross-asset quantitative infrastructure, anchored by the award-winning Superfly analytics platform, powers real-time front-office pricing, trading and risk management across asset classes. We are now expanding this platform further into electronic trading, automated execution and AI-enabled market intelligence, building the most advanced and integrated quant environment in the Nordics.
   

  

 To support this expansion, we look for a wide range of profiles, from classical model developers and desk quants to candidates combining traditional financial engineering with the latest machine learning, AI and data-driven analytics.
   

  

**Markets Quant Center of Excellence**
 At the core of this initiative is our Markets Quant Center of Excellence - the central quant team serving all asset classes and functionalities across Markets as well as XVA, Market Risk, Regulatory, Loans, Treasury and Post-Trade functions.
