 We are a growing team of highly skilled quants developing quantitative models, numerical algorithms and analytics supporting Markets front-office Trading & Sales, with end-to-end ownership from model and application development to production deployment.
   

  

**What We Look For**
 We seek driven individuals with high ambition, strong problem-solving mindset, and a drive and ability to build quantitative solutions that make a difference in practice. We are looking for candidates who match either of the below bullet points, and who are willing to dive into the other:
   

  

* Strong quantitative foundations in mathematics, statistics, physics or quantitative finance, typically supported by an MSc or PhD in a STEM discipline from a leading university and an outstanding academic record.
* Excellent programming and engineering discipline, including experience with Python and/or C++, numerical methods, and the development of reliable production systems.


 Some roles extend into data-driven methods, machine learning and AI, but the work remains firmly grounded in quantitative market modelling. A financial background is an advantage but not essential - what matters is your curiosity about financial markets and your willingness to learn. Applications are welcome across all levels of seniority.
   

  

 We value intellectual rigor, ownership and the ability to translate quantitative ideas into robust production-grade systems in close cooperation with Markets Trading & Sales and software engineers.
   

  

**Current Opportunities**
 The expansion spans several complementary teams across quantitative modelling, trading analytics and development, working closely with dedicated software engineering teams.
   

  

**Model Analytics - Quantitative Modelling**
 This is a classical quant role focused on developing the core models and analytics used in pricing, risk management, and trading. The role requires a profound background in mathematics, probability, statistics, or physics. You are expected to develop thorough expertise in mathematical finance concepts, stochastic calculus, and implementation of numerical algorithms in C++ and Python. Commensurate with your experience, you are ideally already familiar with some of these aspects.
   

  

 Beyond derivatives pricing and risk modelling, the work may also extend into trade execution analytics and market microstructure modelling.
   

  

 Contact: Maximillian Seifert, Head of Model Analytics,
 **msei@danskebank.dk**
**Trade Analytics - Financial Product Modelling**
 The team is responsible for modelling the financial logic behind trades and term sheets, resulting in an analytical representation of trade cashflows. As such, the team works very closely with Desk and Model Analytics Quants, effectively acting as the bridge between customer deals and collateral agreements and the underlying modelling and valuation.
   

  

 This covers every trade, instrument, and index within Markets - from basic to exotic and structured products. It further integrates beyond Markets, connecting to Loans and other products, enabling Superfly as the central calculation engine in the bank, across a vast set of financial metrics.
   

  

 This role requires solid skills in C++ and a detailed understanding of financial products and how various features impact modelling and valuation.
   

  

 Contact: Otto Friedrichsen, Head of Trade Analytics,
 **otf@danskebank.dk**
**Desk Quants - Front-Office Trading Analytics**
 As a Desk Quant, you work closely with the trading desks and act as a key bridge between trading, quantitative analytics and technology. You will develop tools, analytics and applications supporting both voice and electronic trading workflows, in close collaboration with Trading and Sales.
   

  

 You have a strong scientific background, are ideally familiar with standard mathematical finance concepts, and have the ability and desire to develop analytics and tools in a fast-paced trading environment. Strong Python skills are essential, basic C++ understanding required, and advanced proficiency a plus.
   

  

 This role may also involve working on low-latency electronic trading, execution analytics and automation, as well as building AI-driven analysis, tools and agents on top of our quantitative analytics platform.
   

  

 Contacts:
   

  

 Johan Hyden, Head of FI Quant Applications,
 **hyd@danskebank.dk**
 Nele Boelaert, Head of Equity Quant Applications,
 **nelb@danskebank.dk**
**Core Quant Applications - Quant Developers**
 In the Core Quant Applications team, you build the analytics, data, technology, and computing infrastructure that powers Superfly-based applications across asset classes. The team works at the intersection of quantitative research and software engineering, combining strong financial modelling expertise with advanced engineering to turn quantitative analytics into robust production systems.
   

  

 Candidates should have advanced proficiency in Python and C++, and experience and/or interest in building reliable quantitative systems in both Windows and Linux environments using containerized deployments on cloud infrastructure.
   

  

 Experience and/or interest in AI agents, model orchestration, and intelligent analytics systems are highly relevant.
   

  

 Contact: Lasse Helsted, Head of Core Quant Applications,
 **lahel@danskebank.dk**
**Further Information**
 This is a rare opportunity to join as the platform and team continue to scale, helping shape how quantitative analytics, trading systems and AI-enabled capabilities evolve across Markets. We offer a high‑energy, collaborative and inclusive workplace where your growth and impact matter. As we significantly expand the team, you will start with a structured onboarding and training program that equips you to make an early impact.
   

  

 Copenhagen is the primary location, though Stockholm may also be considered.
   

  

 In your cover letter, please indicate which role(s) you are most interested in and highlight and evaluate three strengths you personally bring that are most relevant for the role. Please also upload your CV together with relevant university transcripts.
   

  

 Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
   

  

**General contact:** 
 Linus Kaisajuntti, Head of Quant,
 **pekaj@danskebank.dk**
**We look forward to receiving your application!**
**About Us**
 Danske Bank is a Nordic bank with bridges to the world around us. For 150 years, we have supported people and businesses in releasing their potential. A career with us is an opportunity to join a community of 22,000 colleagues in a culture where we are committed to Teaming Up, Owning It and Being Open. Together, we are on a journey to transform Danske Bank into a better bank. For our customers, our employees and the societies around us.

title: Systems Engineer - Platform & Problem Solving | Saab
description:
*Do you want to help bridge the gap between today and the future - and play a key role in driving Saab's digital transformation? This role is perfect for someone who loves system thinking, enjoys connecting dots and wants to build technology with real-world impact.* 




  





**Your role** 




 As a Systems Engineer, you'll work at the intersection of software, architecture and system design. You'll help us understand how complex systems behave, how they scale and how we can make them better.
 



  





  





**What you'll do** 



* Design and evolve shared software platforms used across Saab
* Analyse system behaviour, performance and interactions
* Work with technologies like AI, cloud, distributed systems and real-time environments
* Collaborate with architects, developers and domain experts
* Turn system-level insights into practical improvements
* Contribute to long-term technical direction and platform strategy



  





**About you** 




 You think in systems, patterns and interactions. You enjoy understanding the whole picture - not just one component. You're curious, analytical and comfortable navigating complexity. Your background might be in software engineering, systems engineering, embedded systems, data engineering or similar.
 



  





  





**You bring** 



* Solid programming experience
* Hands-on use of AI to understand and improve systems
* Ability to reason about system behaviour and architecture
* Curiosity and willingness to learn new technologies
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
* Experience working with technical systems in any form



  





**Bonus if you have** 



* Experience with distributed systems, cloud or real-time environments
* Interest in architecture or platform engineering
* Experience from safety-critical or high-reliability systems



  





*Some of our roles require security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation. For roles where Saab has requirements for security classification, this may in some cases entail requirements for a certain citizenship.* 




  





**What you become part of** 




**Common Tech** 
 's mission is to create shared technical capabilities for all of Saab. By developing and managing shared platforms, technical frameworks and ways of working, Common Tech enables efficient, consistent and long-term technology development across the entire organisation. The goal is to give Saab's teams the right technical foundation to develop advanced products with high quality, safety and reliability.
 



  





**Product Tech** 
 is one of several departments within Common Tech and focuses on developing and evolving technical solutions used across multiple products and systems. Here, reusable components, shared functionality and technical solutions are built that help product teams work faster and more structured, while maintaining high standards for stability and quality.
 



  





**Saab** 
 is a leading defence and security company with a clear mission: to help protect people and societies. With around 20,000 employees worldwide, Saab develops advanced technology through close collaboration between people, competencies and disciplines. The company is characterised by an inclusive culture where collaboration, learning and long-term development are central.
 



  





*These positions require approved security clearance under Swedish security protection legislation.* 




  





**Application** 




 This recruitment process is managed by Jefferson Wells on behalf of Saab, meaning you will be directly employed by Saab. For questions about the position, please contact recruiter Mark Ferrer.
 



  





 We do not accept applications by email due to GDPR.
 



  





**Selection and interviews are ongoing. We warmly welcome your application!**

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description:
Build the practice, not just the model.
   

  

 Imagine not just building advanced ML solutions, but seeing them drive real business impact across global brands like Polestar and Samsung. At Curamando, you won’t be coding in a silo. You’ll connect the dots between deep technical work and strategic business goals, ensuring what you build truly makes a difference. This is your chance to step into a role where you’ll mentor a talented team, collaborate with experts across diverse domains, and gain the organizational context that many ML roles lack.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior ML Engineer who wants to help build that practice with us, not just deliver projects within it.
   

  

 What this role actually is.
   

  

 You’ll be our lead ML engineer, and you’ll be one of the people shaping what we offer, how we sell it, and how we develop the next layer of ML talent at Curamando. That’s not a footnote. It’s a big part of the job.
   

  

 Our work is applied and embedded. We don’t ship models over a wall. We sit inside our clients teams and help drive the transformation with them. You will work alongside our change consultants who lead the transformation while you build the AI & ML that puts the strategy into motion.
   

  

 What you’ll do.
   

  

* Lead the engineering work. Design, build, and ship ML solutions for our clients, from first scoping conversations through production. Pick the right tool for the job, not the most exciting one.
* Build the offering. You'll play a crucial part in shaping what Curamando's AI and ML offerings look like, methodology and points of view. The pace of change is relentless, so we need someone curious by nature, who reads, experiments, and tells signal from hype to keep the offering sharp.
* Mentor the team. You’ll be the most senior ML voice in the room. Coach more junior engineers and analysts on solution architecture, code quality, and structured thinking. That work matters as much as the code you write.
* Collaborate across Eidra. This isn’t a Curamando-only role. You’ll work closely with other parts of Eidra enabling their offering with AI and ML. We genuinely believe in cross-collaboration, and the relationships you build and the work you share across the collective are core to how we grow this practice.
* Sit close to the business. Join sales conversations with our commercial team, and help translate client needs into real engagements. Push back when something doesn’t make sense.


 Who we think will love this role.
   

  

 You have a strong core in traditional ML, supervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation and MLOps. You’ve also worked with LLMs, agents, and RAG enough to know where they shine and where they don’t.
   

  

 Pragmatism is your default mode. You’ve shipped models in environments that weren’t perfect, with data that wasn’t clean, on timelines that weren’t generous, and you got something useful into production anyway.
   

  

 Applied AI in growth, marketing, sales, commerce, and operations is genuinely interesting to you. The mission here is to make AI useful inside real organizations, not to always advance the state of the art AI.
   

  

 What we’d expect you to bring.
   

  

* Hands-on experience across the ML lifecycle in Python and the usual stack: PyTorch, scikit-learn, pandas, SQL, PySpark.
* Working knowledge of at least one cloud platform: AWS, Azure, or GCP; Snowflake, Databricks, or similar.
* Comfort with modern GenAI and agent patterns (RAG, tool-using agents), even if your core is traditional ML.
* A track record of mentoring more junior engineers or data profesionals.
* Enough business sense to hold your own in a client conversation.


 Nice to have.
   

  

* Experience in consulting, agency, or another client-facing setting.
* A point of view on AI ethics, governance, or the EU AI Act in practice.
* Some product or front-end instincts: enough to ship a working demo when the moment calls for it.
* Familiarity with orchestration tools like Airflow or Dagster.


**About Curamando.**
 We're part of Eidra, a collective of 1,400 specialists across 16 companies, from Stockholm to New York. We offer a steep growth trajectory, challenging projects, and a culture that values drive and results over prestige. We believe in the power of being together in person, which is why we've invested in brand-new offices in central Östermalm.
   

  

 Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Enterprise Account Executive (Insurance)
description:
**About Braive** 




  





 Braive is the AI-powered mental health care platform that supports clinicians and patients through the full treatment journey, from first assessment to measurable outcomes. We are MDR Class IIA certified, clinically validated, and built in the Nordics. Insurers and healthcare providers trust us because we bring clinical depth and one continuous experience together in a way point solutions cannot. Our mission is to scale access and improve outcomes for the people who need them, and the proof points back it up: around 50% average symptom reduction and 80% patient improvement within six weeks.
 



  





**Why this role matters** 




  





 Mental health is now one of the largest cost and outcome drivers across Swedish health insurance, and one of the biggest opportunities for insurers willing to act early. This role shapes how Braive shows up in that conversation. You design partnerships that move insurers from reactive claims handling to genuine prevention and early intervention, and your work directly determines how quickly mental health support reaches policyholders. Insurers want a clinically validated, MDR-certified product their customers will actually use, alongside a partner who can prove its value. That is the case you build.
 



  





**The role** 




  





 You drive growth and strategic partnerships with Swedish insurance companies, underwriters, and insurance brokers by identifying needs, shaping opportunities, and tailoring Braive's mental health offering to specific insurance products and claims journeys. You map insurer, underwriter, and broker needs, decision-makers, product gaps, and commercial opportunities, and you identify where Braive can create measurable value across claims, prevention, and early intervention. You build trusted relationships with senior product owners, claims and benefits teams, network managers, underwriters, brokers, and innovation leaders, translating their priorities into clear value cases around access, quality, prevention, cost, and outcomes. You lead discovery, proposals, pilots, procurement, and long-term partnership processes, and you use pilots as structured proof points that convert into signed, scaling agreements.
 



  





**What success looks like** 




  





 Since you'll already have the Swedish insurance landscape mapped with precision and an established network across insurers, underwriters, and brokers, your first six months will be spent deepening and expanding those relationships with senior stakeholders across the major players, with at least three structured pilot or partnership in motion. Within a year, Braive has won new, meaningful insurance partnerships in Sweden, and pilots under your ownership are converting into long-term agreements with measurable ROI for the insurer.
 



  





**About you** 




  




* Deep, current understanding of the Swedish insurance market, including its products, players, and how decisions actually get made
* Track record selling into or partnering with insurance, employee benefits, or other complex enterprise environments where decisions involve multiple senior stakeholders
* Able to identify customer needs and translate them into credible value cases that combine clinical, operational, and financial logic
* Comfortable navigating complex, multi-stakeholder buying processes and steady when they run long
* Credible with senior medical, operational, and commercial stakeholders alike
* Commercially driven, structured, persistent, and relationship-oriented



  





**What we offer** 




  





 🏝️ 25 days vacation
 



 🧘🏻 Mental health days off (every last Friday of the month, we take a day to recharge)
 



 🚴 Annual Friskvård allowance
 



 🫱🏼 🫲🏾 Shareholder options program
 



 💸 Additional pension
 



 🌱 An environment built for growth. We're tackling one of the most complex challenges of our time, and we want you to evolve alongside it. Stretch projects, real ownership, and space to develop.

title: Growth Analytics Lead
description:
*Natural Cycles° is a leading women’s health company that developed the world’s first birth control app, used by millions globally. We are a fast growing startup, and we promote an international working environment filled with smart and ambitious colleagues based in Stockholm, Geneva, New York, and remotely. Our mission is to pioneer women’s health through research and passion, empowering every woman with the knowledge she needs to take charge of her health.* 




  





 We’re looking for a
 **Growth Analytics Lead** 
 to help us scale user growth and revenue growth across our international markets. In this role, you will own and evolve how we measure, understand and optimize performance across the entire growth funnel – from acquisition and activation to retention and monetization.
 



 Sitting at the intersection of growth, marketing, product and data, you will play a key role in shaping our growth strategy by turning complex data into actionable insights. Your work will directly impact how we invest across paid, owned and organic channels, ensuring we drive efficient and scalable growth with a strong focus on CAC, LTV and unit economics.
 



  





**Please note that this role is based in Stockholm, Sweden.** 




  





**What you will be doing:** 



* Owning and developing Natural Cycles’ growth analytics framework across all markets, covering the full funnel from acquisition and activation to retention and revenue.
* Definining, monitoring and analyzing key performance metrics such as CAC, LTV, payback periods and overall unit economics across paid, owned and organic channels.
* Leading attribution and incrementality efforts, including designing experiments and evaluating channel effectiveness to guide investment decisions.
* Partnering closely with growth, marketing and product teams to identify opportunities, inform strategy and prioritize high-impact initiatives.
* Building and maintaining scalable dashboards, reporting and analytical models using tools such as Snowflake, Mixpanel and Tableau to provide visibility into performance and key growth drivers.
* Analyzing user behavior across app and web to uncover insights that improve conversion, engagement and retention.
* Acting as a strategic thought partner to leadership, translating complex analyses into clear, actionable recommendations that drive business impact.
* This role requires a highly hands-on operator who can work end-to-end – from deep-dive analysis to shaping strategy and influencing decision-making across the organization.



  





**What skills and experience we think you have** 



* 5+ years of experience in growth analytics, marketing analytics or a similar role in a subscription, app or digital product environment.
* Strong experience analyzing performance across the full funnel, with a deep understanding of acquisition, activation, retention and monetization dynamics.
* Proven expertise in attribution modeling and incrementality testing (e.g. geo experiments, lift studies, MMM or similar approaches).
* Strong understanding of key growth metrics such as CAC, LTV, payback periods and overall unit economics, and how to use them to guide decision-making.
* Advanced analytical skills with strong SQL proficiency and experience working with large-scale datasets in cloud data warehouse environments such as Snowflake, BigQuery or similar technologies.
* Experience working with product analytics and BI tools such as Mixpanel, Tableau, Looker, Amplitude or similar platforms.
* Experience working with product and marketing data across mobile apps and web environments.
* Experience working with mobile apps and/or subscription-based business models is a plus.
* Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to translate complex analyses into clear, actionable insights.
* Ability to communicate effectively and collaborate with both technical and non-technical stakeholders



  





**What we offer** 



* Flexible work arrangement - you will be part of a team based in and around Stockholm that values effective collaboration and transparent communication, irrespective of work location
* Professional development - you will work alongside knowledgeable colleagues in the continuous growth and skill enhancement environment
* Modern technology - you will leverage innovative technologies and tools, within an environment that empowers you to contribute ideas and take ownership of your work
* Impactful projects - you will contribute to groundbreaking projects that redefine industry standards and create tangible value
* Commitment to quality - you will join a dynamic and progressive organization that prioritizes profitable, long-term product development



  





**Location** 




 We are remote-friendly, but we find great value in being able to connect with our teams in person. Most of the international marketing team you will work with is located in Stockholm, and the team occasionally meets in the office for collaboration and face-to-face time.
 



  





**Sounds interesting?** 




 If you want to be part of a successful team, we encourage you to apply for this position as soon as possible. We look forward to hearing from you!
 



  





**How to apply** 




 To apply, just upload your CV and answer the questions on the application form. Keep in mind that we can't accept applications through email because of GDPR, and only applications submitted via the career site (and in English) will be considered.
 



  





 At Natural Cycles we value diversity and inclusion because we know that teams with people from different backgrounds and experiences are stronger. We welcome candidates from all walks of life and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees and candidates.
 



  





  





**Note: We are not looking for consultants or help from recruitment agencies**

title: Senior IAM Architect - SailPoint
description:
Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior IAM Architect with a focus on SailPoint to join our Identity & Access Management domain and team up with some of the most dedicated cyber specialists in the industry.
   

  

**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ more than 400 employees – and as the demand for cybersecurity grows, we need to grow too. We are looking for a Senior IAM Architect – Sailpoint to join our Identity & Access Management (IAM) team operating in Denmark.
   

  

**The IAM team**
 Identity & Access Management (IAM) is a strategically important service area at Truesec, where we help our customers design, implement, and operate secure and scalable identity solutions across complex hybrid and cloud environments.
   

  

 We work closely with our customers’ security, IT, and business teams, delivering IAM services spanning Identity Governance & Administration (IGA), Privileged Access Management (PAM), and Zero Trust architectures.
   

  

**The Role**
 You act as a trusted advisor to customers, support delivery teams with architectural guidance, and contribute to the continuous evolution of Truesecs IAM services.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Own and design end-to-end IAM architectures across cloud, hybrid, and on-prem environments
* Define architecture principles, standards, and best practices within IAM
* Lead and support implementations within Identity Governance & Administration (IGA), Privileged Access Management (PAM), and modern authentication/authorization and federation
* Translate business and security requirements into practical, secure technical designs
* Facilitate customer dialogue, workshops, and architectural decision-making
* Mentor and coach IAM engineers through knowledge sharing, reviews, and hands-on guidance
* Contribute to presales activities, solution scoping, and architectural input in proposals
* Collaborate with Information Security on risk assessments, controls, and compliance
* Stay on top of IAM trends, vendors, and emerging technologies to evolve our services


**Your Potential Background**
* Extensive experience in IAM engineering and architecture (typically 7-10+ years)
* Proven experience designing complex IAM solutions in enterprise environments
* Strong expertise in IGA platforms such as SailPoint, Omada, or similar
* Experience with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) and related identity services
* Strong understanding of authentication and authorization (OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, SAML)
* Knowledge of role and access models (RBAC/ABAC) and identity lifecycle (joiner/mover/leaver)
* Experience working with compliance and regulatory requirements (e.g., GDPR, ISO 27001, NIS2)
* Ability to balance hands-on technical work with architectural and strategic responsibilities
* Strong communication skills and confidence working with both technical teams and senior stakeholders
* Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CCSP, CISM) are a plus, but not required


*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: AI & Data Lead Architect | Saab
description:
*Är du redo att sätta den tekniska kompassen för Saabs AI-transformation?* 




  





 Behovet av en sammanhållen teknisk vision för AI och data inom försvarssektorn har aldrig varit större. På Saab pågår en storskalig satsning där artificiell intelligens och moderna dataplattformar omdefinierar hur vi bygger framtidens försvarssystem. Men innovation utan riktning leder ingenstans - det krävs en arkitekt som ser helheten, sätter standarden och gör de tekniska vägvalen som håller över tid.
 



  





 Vi söker en
 **AI & Data Lead Architect** 
 - den högsta tekniska auktoriteten för vår AI & Data-avdelning. Som Lead Architect är du bryggan mellan Saabs strategiska ambitioner och det dagliga tekniska genomförandet. Dina beslut kommer att direkt påverka system som Gripen, autonoma undervattensfarkoster och avancerade ledningssystem.
 



  





**Din roll** 




 I rollen som Lead Architect är du den tekniska sparringpartnern för hela organisationen. Du designar inte bara system; du bygger det enhetliga, framtidssäkra arkitekturlandskap som krävs för att skala AI & data i en av världens mest krävande miljöer.
 



  





**Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden:** 



* **Teknisk Vision & Strategi:** 
 Definiera den långsiktiga tekniska strategin för AI-modellering, dataarkitektur och molninfrastruktur. Du ser till att vår stack är optimerad för både snabb innovation och extrem säkerhet.
* **AI-Native Architecture:** 
 Du leder genom exempel och använder moderna verktyg för att snabbt bygga arkitekturer, dokumentera systemdesign och validera tekniska mönster. Du driver införandet av AI-drivna arbetsflöden i hela ingenjörsorganisationen.
* **Standardisering & Excellens:** 
 Fastställa arkitektoniska principer och standarder som förhindrar tekniska silos. Du bygger ramverken som möjliggör för våra team att leverera snabbare och säkrare.
* **Arkitekturforum:** 
 Leda och moderera avdelningens arkitekturforum där Tech Leads från alla team samverkar. Du är den sammanhållande kraften i stora designbeslut och teknikval.
* **Strategisk Rådgivning:** 
 Agera teknisk rådgivare till produktledning och ledning. Du navigerar komplexa investeringsbeslut, utvärderar nya teknikstackar och säkerställer att vi gör rätt val för framtiden.



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker en arkitekt med en unik kombination av djup teknisk bredd och strategisk mognad. Du är en naturlig auktoritet som inspirerar genom expertis och inspiration snarare än titel. Du kan förklara komplex arkitektur på ett sätt som gör den begriplig för både utvecklare och beslutsfattare.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer:** 



* Omfattande erfarenhet av systemarkitektur och infrastrukturdesign i stor skala, gärna inom AI/ML eller dataplattformar
* Djup kunskap om MLOps, Kubernetes, molnarkitektur (AWS/Azure) och moderna datastackar
* Etablerat arbetssätt där du nyttjar AI-verktyg för att accelerera arkitekturarbete och systemdesign
* Dokumenterad förmåga att leda genom inflytande och att driva teknisk förändring i komplexa organisationer
* Civilingenjörsexamen (MSc) eller motsvarande inom Datateknik, Teknisk Fysik eller liknande
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska



  





**Meriterande:** 




  




* Erfarenhet av Data Mesh-arkitektur och decentraliserat dataägande
* Kunskap om säkerhet och regelefterlevnad i högt regulerade miljöer
* Bakgrund inom HPC (High-Performance Computing) och GPU-optimering



  





 Denna position kräver att du blir godkänd i en säkerhetsprövning i enlighet med den svenska säkerhetsskyddslagen.
 



  





*Placering: Stockholm eller Göteborg.* 




  





**Vad du blir en del av** 




**Common Tech** 
 har i uppdrag att skapa gemensamma tekniska förutsättningar för hela Saab. Genom att utveckla och förvalta gemensamma plattformar, tekniska ramverk och arbetssätt möjliggör Common Tech ett effektivt, enhetligt och långsiktigt teknikutvecklingsarbete över hela organisationen. Målet är att ge Saabs team rätt tekniska grund för att kunna utveckla avancerade produkter med hög kvalitet, säkerhet och tillförlitlighet.
 



  





**AI & Data** 
 är en av flera avdelningar inom Common Tech och ansvarar för att bygga och vidareutveckla Saabs gemensamma förmåga inom data, analys och artificiell intelligens. Här skapas plattformar, verktyg och tekniska lösningar som möjliggör storskalig datahantering, avancerad analys och användning av AI i verksamhetskritiska miljöer. Fokus ligger på att bygga robusta, skalbara och återanvändbara AI- och datakapabiliteter som kan användas brett över flera produkter, system och affärsområden.
 



  





 Inom AI & Data kombineras djup teknisk kompetens med ett långsiktigt och strategiskt perspektiv. Arbetet handlar inte om enskilda applikationer, utan om att skapa gemensamma tekniska förutsättningar - från dataplattformar och AI-infrastruktur till modeller, pipelines och arbetssätt - som andra team kan lita på och bygga vidare på.
 



  





**Saab** 
 är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med ett tydligt uppdrag: att bidra till att skydda människor och samhällen. Med omkring 20 000 medarbetare världen över utvecklar Saab avancerad teknik i nära samarbete mellan människor, kompetenser och discipliner. Företaget präglas av en inkluderande kultur där samarbete, lärande och långsiktig utveckling står i centrum.
 



  





*Dessa positioner kräver godkänd säkerhetsprövning enligt den svenska säkerhetsskyddslagen.* 




  





**Ansökan** 




 Den här rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av Jefferson Wells för SAABS räkning, vilket innebär att du kommer att bli anställd direkt av SAAB.
 



  





 Vi tar ej emot ansökningar via email pga GDPR.
 



**Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Network Portfolio Manager
description:
**Network Portfolio Manager – CTO Office** 
***.***
 Are you interested in embarking on a new career journey where you can make a real impact? I'm Viktor Wåhlberg, Head of CTO Office, and I'm searching for a exceptional individual, ready to leave a lasting mark. Join our team, where your skills will thrive, and together – let's make better happen!
   

  

 In this role, you’ll sit at the heart of the Networks CTO Office, driving portfolio management across planning, execution, and simplification. You’ll connect strategy, finance, and delivery, while exploring how data, analytics, and AI can strengthen prioritization, improve decision‑making, and enable smarter ways of working. Join our team, where your skills will thrive – and together, let’s make better happen
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
* As a Network Portfolio Manager, you will drive end‑to‑end Network prioritization for portfolio planning, balancing country needs, life‑cycle management, and strategic commitments.
* You will own and follow up on our most vital Network deliveries, securing financial control, on‑time execution, and roadmap alignment towards our 2030 ambitions.
* Acting as the main portfolio contact from the Network side, you will lead, clarify responsibilities, and manage incoming local demands. Working closely with Technology and Infrastructure, you will help shape strategies, financial plans, and a more data‑driven, simplified way of working.
* You will also have a leading role in defining AI implementation for Networks unit broad processes such as investment planning and portfolio management.


**Who We're Looking For**
 The ideal candidate possesses strong problem-solving & organizational skills paired with business acumen and a growth mindset. Focusing on creating value and drive increased clarity the ideal candidate excels in communication and interpersonal interactions.
   

  

 Professional Experience:
   

  

* Minimum of 5 years of experience focused on portfolio management, management consulting or similar - telecom experience is a strong advantage.
* Experience in technology strategy, digital transformation and Network domain skills such as 5G, IP, and cloud-based technologies.
* Understanding and interest of AI technologies, use cases, and value drivers.
* Experience in agile methodologies (such as SAFe agile practices)
* Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with the ability to translate complexity into clarity.
* A master’s degree in engineering or a related field.
* English language requirement


**Join us to shape smarter living for people, businesses, and the planet**
 At Telia, we’re a team of 15 000 colleagues across the Nordics and Baltics, passionate about technology and connectivity. As a Leading Telecommunications Operator & Climate Leader, we drive change with large-scale, impactful projects while building a sustainable, inclusive world.
   

  

 Here, you can grow your skills, lead meaningful projects, and thrive in a supportive, diverse environment. Whether you’re taking your first step or your next, Telia is a place to grow, belong, and make a real impact.
   

  

**What We Offer**
 When you join us, you'll receive a comprehensive benefits package tailored to your local market, opportunities for remote work, and more. You'll also have the chance to earn a bonus based on your performance and Telia's results.
   

  

**Ready to make better happen?**
 We look forward to receiving your application by
 **07** 
****.** 
 06.2026** 
 . Please note that we might close the position earlier if we find the right candidate, so don’t wait too long to apply!
   

  

 If you’re selected for the next stage, you’ll be contacted by our
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Background and reference checks will be part of the process.
   

  

 Want to know more about this role? Please reach out to Viktor Wåhlberg, Head of CTO Office at viktor.wahlberg@teliacompany.com.
   

  

**Equal opportunities**
 At Telia, we recognize talent by
 **professional skills and growth potential.** 
 We champion diversity, ensuring every individual’s needs are met, regardless of disability, gender, age, nationality, sexual orientation, or social status. Together, we’re dedicated to fostering an inclusive work environment where
 **your uniqueness is our strength.**
**Join us and let’s make better happen - together!**

title: Senior Software Engineer – AI Product Experience
description:
**Why This Role Matters**
 This team is central to how we deliver AI to our customers. From the infrastructure and RAG pipelines that power intelligence behind the scenes to the conversational UI that brings it to life, this team owns the entire experience. As a senior engineer, your impact will be immediate and highly visible you’ll help define how customers interact with Funnel’s AI capabilities and shape the future of AI-driven marketing insights.
   

  

**About The Engineering Team & Your Role**
 Our engineering teams have deep ownership of their product areas, making daily decisions in close collaboration across teams and with stakeholders. We work in small, iterative cycles- experimenting, learning, and deploying to production multiple times a day. We work closely with AI agents to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning.
   

  

 As a senior engineer on this team, you will drive technical direction across the full AI feature stack: infrastructure, RAG pipelines, Amazon Bedrock integrations, and the web UI that delivers the experience. You’ll play a key role in making architectural decisions, improving systems, and ensuring our AI features are robust, scalable, and intuitive.
   

  

 We primarily use
 **Python and TypeScript, and our entire platform runs in AWS** 
 .
   

  

 At Funnel, engineers own the full lifecycle from architecture and design to implementation, deployment, and monitoring. Senior engineers also mentor others, elevate engineering quality, and help shape product strategy through technical insight.
   

  

**Skills & Experience We’re Looking For**
* Experience building applications with LLMs, including techniques such as RAG, embeddings, vector search, and prompt engineering
* Hands-on experience setting up and maintaining cloud-based AI workloads
* Strong backend engineering skills in TypeScript, Python, or similar languages
* AI mindset: leveraging AI agents to to accelerate the full engineering lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to production development and continuous learning
* Experience designing and operating scalable infrastructure, including APIs, data pipelines, and observability
* Comfortable working with web technologies and building user-facing features (e.g., React, Next.js, or similar frameworks)
* Comfortable working in agile, collaborative teams, partnering closely with fellow engineers and keeping initiatives moving smoothly
* Experience leading or steering projects involving multiple stakeholders
* Strong communication skills and fluency in English


**Why You Should Join Us**
* Build meaningful tech that powers millions of daily jobs for customers around the world.
* Help shape our next-gen platform as we grow and move toward an AI-first future.
* Enjoy real ownership with the freedom to design, build, and ship every day.
* Work with friendly, collaborative teams who care about quality and each other.
* Grow with us in a company that invests in learning, innovation, and people.


**Location & Eligibility**
 At This Time, We Can Only Consider Applicants Who Are Already Based In Stockholm And Meet One Of The Following Criteria
   

  

* Hold Swedish citizenship
* Hold EU/EEA citizenship and are currently living in Stockholm
* Have a valid Swedish work permit


**Office-first**
 At Funnel, we have an office-first approach, and we work from the office a minimum of four days a week. We have lots of flexibility for when life happens, during the summer, through the holidays. We just like to avoid having standing remote days.
   

  

**About Funnel**
 Funnel is a leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 600 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by more than 3,000 customers worldwide—including globally recognized brands such as Adidas, The Home Depot, Uber, Gong, Skechers, and Sony, as well as leading agencies like Havas, Power Digital, and Publicis—Funnel generated over $57M in ARR in 2024.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney. Funnel continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Funnel is the leading Marketing Intelligence platform that empowers marketers to automatically integrate, attribute, measure, and report on data from over 500 marketing platforms.
   

  

 Trusted by almost 3,000 businesses worldwide, including globally recognized brands such as Adidas and Sony, Funnel generated over $70M in ARR in 2025 and continues to feature in the FT 1000 list of Europe’s fastest-growing companies.
   

  

 Since its founding in 2014, Funnel has grown into a global team of over 300 employees, with offices in Stockholm, Boston, Hamburg, and Sydney.

title: SAP BTP Consultant
description:
Are you ready for the next step in your SAP career? Do you want to work in a flexible environment with exciting assignments. We are now looking for an SAP BTP Consultant who wants to help shape the solutions of the future. Welcome to CGI!
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

 As an SAP BTP Consultant, you will play a key role in our deliveries to clients across various industries such as Retail, Manufacturing, and Distribution. Your responsibilities will include:
   

  

* Design and develop applications on SAP BTP (Cloud Foundry, ABAP Environment)
* Build side-by-side extensions using CAP and in-app extensions using ABAP (RAP)
* Develop and enhance backend logic using ABAP, CDS Views, AMDP, and OData services
* Work with ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) for modern service development
* Integrate SAP and non-SAP systems using SAP Integration Suite (CPI, APIs, Event Mesh)
* Develop and customize SAP Fiori/UI5 applications
* Work with SAP HANA Cloud for data modeling and persistence
* Ensure clean core principles by decoupling custom logic from S/4HANA
* Handle authentication, authorization, and security (IAS, OAuth, XSUAA)
* Collaborate with functional teams to convert business requirements into scalable solutions
* Troubleshoot and optimize application performance across BTP and ABAP stack


**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
* 4+ years of experience in SAP development
* Exposure to SAP Build, Workflow, or Automation tools
* Knowledge of Clean Core strategy
* Strong hands-on experience in:
* ABAP (OO ABAP, RAP, CDS Views, OData)
* SAP BTP services (Cloud Foundry, ABAP Environment)
* Experience with SAP Fiori/UI5
* Knowledge of SAP Integration Suite (CPI)
* Understanding of RESTful services and API-based architecture
* Experience with Git and CI/CD pipelines


 You are great at building strong relationships and quickly understanding new situations. You enjoy working with others, are attentive and supportive, and like to challenge yourself. With both an analytical mindset and creative problem-solving skills, you handle complex tasks with precision and confidence.
   

  

 Why CGI?
   

  

 At CGI, you become part of a global organization with a strong local presence, where collaboration, long-term commitment, and an entrepreneurial spirit are at the core of everything we do. We offer an environment with significant personal responsibility, the opportunity to influence our SAP journey, and the chance to work alongside highly engaged and skilled colleagues.
   

  

**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: Substrate Supplier Quality Engineer
description:
**Join our diverse team at Crane Currency as a Substrate Supplier Quality Engineer in Tumba and be a part of our journey towards innovation and excellence.**

**Who we are:**


Crane Currency is a premier industrial technology company and a pioneer in currency manufacturing and advanced micro-optics technology for securing physical products. Yes, chances are you have our product in your wallet right now! Our sophisticated equipment and software leverage proprietary core capabilities with detection and sensing technologies. Around the world, our customers trust us to anticipate their needs with innovative, reliable, and high-quality currency & authentication solutions and services—just as they have for generations. Learn more at www.cranecurrency.com

**How you will make an impact:**


Be part of a team that ensures world-class banknote and substrate production consistently meets the highest customer expectations. As the key quality interface between Crane and external partners, you will translate customer requirements into clear, controlled standards and oversee that all outsourced production fully aligns with Crane’s commitments, quality standards, and customer needs. Working closely with Supply Chain and Sales, you’ll play a vital role in driving customer satisfaction while fostering a strong, quality-focused culture across partner sites. This is an exciting opportunity to make a direct impact on product excellence and help maintain Crane’s trusted global reputation.

**In your role as a Substrate Supply Quality Engineer you will:**

* Participate in bid, quotation, and contract management processes to ensure customer quality expectations are clearly defined
* Ensure accurate and complete transfer of product and quality requirements to partners
* Coordinate with Crane OPS and cross-functional teams as required
* Plan and conduct quality approvals and audits at partner manufacturing sites
* Drive root cause analysis and corrective/preventive actions using tools such as 8D, 5-Why, DMAIC, PFMEA, MSA, control plans, and QIP
* Monitor supplier performance and product conformity
* Escalate quality or risk concerns through appropriate leadership channels
* Promote collaborative relationships with internal teams, partner sites, and other Crane Currency locations

 **Knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:**

**Required:**

* Master’s degree in Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Quality Management, or similar discipline.
* Minimum of five (5) years’ experience in manufacturing or quality management

***Strong understanding of quality engineering disciplines, including:***

* Quality data collection and analysis
* Statistical methods (SPC, DOE, Gage R&R, sampling techniques)
* Measurement and inspection methods
* Documentation of product properties and requirements
* Experience in global, cross-cultural, multi-site environments

***Language:***

* Strong communication, documentation, and teamwork skills
* Strong verbal and written skills in English
* Fluent in spoken and written English
* Additional languages are an advantage

***IT:***

* Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint)
* Experience with SharePoint and ERP systems (e.g., JDE, IFS, SAP)

 **Preferred:**

* Specialized training in quality engineering or supplier quality management.
* Experience in banknote substrate, printing, or high-security document industries

  



**The role is expected to be a skilled project manager and have technical substance matter expertise. Travelling is expected up to 40-60%.**  

**Tumba-Benefits**

**How we will care for you:**


We offer top-notch medical benefits including a wellness allowance and reimbursement for medicines and medical care, opportunities for personal development, community engagement activities, competitive compensation, vacation, parental leave, and multiple tiers of retirement plans. Discover more about our benefits here **https://www.cranecurrency.com/careers/benefits/**

**What drives our team:**


We are a passionate team of 1,200 creators and problem solvers, united by our purpose, we give people confidence every day in moments that matter. This comes to life through our Shared Values:

* People Matter
* Do the Right Thing
* Trusted Partner
* Innovate for Growth
* Always Improving

  

Learn more about our values and culture: **https://www.cranecurrency.com/careers/life-at-crane-currency/**


You can also check us out at: **https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Crane-Currency-Reviews-E1187198.htm**

**Where we are:**


Your role is in Tumba, Stockholm, located in the historic Tumba Bruk area, ten-minute walking distance from the train station, 30 km south of Stockholm, and about 20 minutes from Stockholm Central Station. Check out what makes Tumba a great place to live and work here: **https://www.cranecurrency.com/media/12rbruyv/0133-ex55-crane-currency-tumba-sweden-site-location-package-october-2024-lr.pdf**


Crane Currency is a drug free workplace.


Crane NXT is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, age, disability, or national origin or any other characteristic protected under applicable local law.

**#ONSITE or #HYBRID**

**#LI-KP1**

title: Lead Engineer
description:
Embedded Software Developer – Automotive C/C++
  
  

**Role Overview:**  

We are looking for a Mid‑Senior Embedded Software Developer to work on new‑age automotive platforms including software‑defined vehicles (SDV), EVs, ADAS, and connected car systems. The role involves developing robust embedded software using C/C++ and Python, with strong hands‑on experience in AUTOSAR within an automotive product development environment.
  
  

**Key Responsibilities:**  

Design, develop, and maintain embedded software for modern vehicle platforms
  
Implement and integrate software using C/C++ in resource‑constrained environments
  
Develop automation, testing, and tooling using Python
  
Work extensively with AUTOSAR (Classic and/or Adaptive) architectures
  
Collaborate with system, hardware, integration, and validation teams
  
Debug complex issues at ECU and system level
  
Contribute to software quality, performance, and reusability
  
Support continuous improvement in an Agile development setup
  
  

**Required Skills & Experience:**  

6–10 years of experience in Embedded Software Development
  
Strong expertise in C/C++
  
Good hands‑on experience with Python
  
Solid experience with AUTOSAR
  
Proven Automotive domain experience (ECUs, vehicle networks, in‑vehicle systems)
  
Experience working with version control (Git) and embedded debugging tools
  
  

**Nice to Have:**  

**Experience with new‑age car technologies:** SDV, EV, ADAS, Connectivity
  
Knowledge of CAN, LIN, FlexRay, Ethernet
  
Exposure to ASPICE, ISO 26262, or Automotive Cybersecurity
  
Experience in Agile/Scrum environments

title: Experienced Flight Dynamics Engineer (SSA)
description:
**About the role:**  

We are building software that tracks what moves in orbit and flags what matters. You will be working with orbit determination in the intersection between orbital mechanics, mission operations, and intelligence.
  
  

While you will touch upon many of our projects, your primary work will be to lead the technical work on our LSSA-Pilot project, developing the algorithms, data pipelines, and operational framing that make space situational awareness usable for non-engineers. You will work with our flight dynamicsists, who know the orbital mechanics. Your job is to translate sensor data into orbit knowledge and on to Space Situational Awareness. This role grows naturally toward technical leadership.
  
  

**What you will work on:**  

Orbit determination, object tracking, and proximity analysis algorithms
  
Integration of external space object catalogs and data sources
  
Conjunction screening, collision avoidance computation, and launch safety analysis
  
**Defining CONOPS-level requirements:** what operational users need to see, when, and why
  
Collaboration with research and industry partners in the SSA domain
  
  

**What we are looking for:**  

Mid-to-senior candidate, 5–8 years of experience. Operational instinct comes from years in mission rooms; we need seniority here.
  
  

Experience with how real missions are operated — not just the physics, but the process
  
Background in controls engineering, preferably applied to orbital mechanics and flight dynamics
  
Ability to bridge the gap between rigorous analysis and what decision-makers need to act on
  
Strong programming skills in Python
  
Understanding of orbit determination or propagation techniques
  
MSc or PhD in control engineering, aerospace engineering, physics, applied mathematics, or equivalent
  
  

Useful but not required
  
Experience with space object catalogs, TLE formats, or conjunction data messages
  
Familiarity with CCSDS standards
  
Interest in defense applications
  
Background in mission control, flight operations, or CONOPS development
  
  

Requirements
  
Fluent in English; Swedish is a plus
  
EU or EES citizen
  
  

About Vinterstellar
  
Vinterstellar is a Stockholm-based aerospace company doing mission analysis and flight dynamics for satellite operators and space agencies — from GEO telecommunications to Earth observation to deep-space trajectory design. Founded in 2018, we are five people and growing, with multiple funded development projects running and a product evolving into a decision-oriented mission analysis platform for the European market.
  
  

At Vinterstellar you will have real ownership from day one. Together we work hybrid and have a lot of freedom when it comes to structuring our time and the way we want to work.
  
  

How to apply
  
  

**Send your CV and a short note about yourself to:**  

**Applications:** careers@vinterstellar.se
  
**Role questions:** Emil Vinterhav, CEO — emil.vinterhav@vinterstellar.se
  
**Process questions:** Andreas Thorell Berchtold — andreas.thorell@vinterstellar.se
  
  

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. We hire as soon as we find the right person.

title: Senior Test Lead
description:
Automotive Test Engineer – HIL / VIL Rig / Software Testing
  
  

Job Summary
  
We are looking for an Automotive Test Engineer to support and execute testing activities across HIL rigs, VIL rigs, boxcars, and vehicle environments. The role focuses on test execution, test system operation, automation, and fault tracing for automotive embedded software and systems, working closely with development and test teams.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
Execute and develop test cases for HIL, VIL boxcar, and vehicle testing
  
Operate, support, and maintain HIL and test systems
  
Perform integration and system-level testing of automotive software and hardware
  
Analyze logs and troubleshoot issues using tools such as CANoe, CANalyzer, Wireshark, DLT
  
Support test automation and integration into CI/CD pipelines
  
Collaborate with developers to identify, report, and resolve defects
  
Contribute to continuous improvement of test processes and methodologies
  
  

Required Skills & Experience
  
Experience in automotive software testing (HIL / VIL / vehicle testing)
  
Strong knowledge of CAN, LIN, Ethernet automotive communication protocols
  
Hands‑on experience with Vector tools (CANoe / CANalyzer)
  
Basic electrical and mechanical fault‑tracing skills in test environments
  
Experience with log analysis and debugging
  
Familiarity with test automation and scripting (Python, CAPL, or similar)
  
Strong analytical skills and a collaborative mindset
  
Valid driving license
  
  

Nice to Have
  
Experience with CI/CD, baseline or binary management
  
Knowledge of ISO 26262 / AUTOSAR
  
Experience working in fast‑paced automotive test environments

title: Sr Software Engineer
description:
**The Company**
 PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. Creating innovative experiences that make moving money, selling, and shopping simple, personalized, and secure, PayPal empowers consumers and businesses in approximately 200 markets to join and thrive in the global economy.
   

  

 We operate a global, two-sided network at scale that connects hundreds of millions of merchants and consumers. We help merchants and consumers connect, transact, and complete payments, whether they are online or in person. PayPal is more than a connection to third-party payment networks. We provide proprietary payment solutions accepted by merchants that enable the completion of payments on our platform on behalf of our customers.
   

  

 We offer our customers the flexibility to use their accounts to purchase and receive payments for goods and services, as well as the ability to transfer and withdraw funds. We enable consumers to exchange funds more safely with merchants using a variety of funding sources, which may include a bank account, a PayPal or Venmo account balance, PayPal and Venmo branded credit products, a credit card, a debit card, certain cryptocurrencies, or other stored value products such as gift cards, and eligible credit card rewards. Our PayPal, Venmo, and Xoom products also make it safer and simpler for friends and family to transfer funds to each other. We offer merchants an end-to-end payments solution that provides authorization and settlement capabilities, as well as instant access to funds and payouts. We also help merchants connect with their customers, process exchanges and returns, and manage risk. We enable consumers to engage in cross-border shopping and merchants to extend their global reach while reducing the complexity and friction involved in enabling cross-border trade.
   

  

 Our beliefs are the foundation for how we conduct business every day. We live each day guided by our core values of Inclusion, Innovation, Collaboration, and Wellness. Together, our values ensure that we work together as one global team with our customers at the center of everything we do – and they push us to ensure we take care of ourselves, each other, and our communities.
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 This job delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC). It involves advising management on project-level issues, guiding junior engineers, operating with little supervision, and applying knowledge of technical best practices.
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Essential Responsibilities:**
* Delivers complete solutions spanning all phases of the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC) (design, implementation, testing, delivery and operations), based on definitions from more senior roles.
* Advises immediate management on project-level issues
* Guides junior engineers
* Operates with little day-to-day supervision, making technical decisions based on knowledge of internal conventions and industry best practices
* Applies knowledge of technical best practices in making decisions


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor’s degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience.


**Additional Responsibilities & Preferred Qualifications:**
**Subsidiary:**
 PayPal
   

  

**Travel Percent:**
 0
   

  

 PayPal does not charge candidates any fees for courses, applications, resume reviews, interviews, background checks, or onboarding. When making an application directly, we will never ask you to share passwords, one-time passcodes (OTP), or verification codes. Any such request is a red flag and likely part of a scam. All communication regarding your application will come from official PayPal email domains. If you suspect fraudulent activity, please report it immediately. To learn more about how to identify and avoid recruitment fraud please visit https://careers.pypl.com/contact-us.
   

  

 For the majority of employees, PayPal's balanced hybrid work model offers 3 days in the office for effective in-person collaboration and 2 days at your choice of either the PayPal office or your home workspace, ensuring that you equally have the benefits and conveniences of both locations.
   

  

**Our Benefits:**
 At PayPal, we’re committed to building an equitable and inclusive global economy. And we can’t do this without our most important asset-you. That’s why we offer comprehensive, choice-based programs, to support all aspects of personal wellbeing—physical, emotional, and financial—delivering meaningful value where it matters most. We strive to create a flexible, balanced work culture with a holistic approach to benefits, including generous paid time off, healthcare coverage for you and your family, and resources to create financial security and support your mental health.
   

  

**Who We Are:**
 Click Here to learn more about our culture and community.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 PayPal provides equal employment opportunity (EEO) to all persons regardless of age, color, national origin, citizenship status, physical or mental disability, race, religion, creed, gender, sex, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression, genetic information, marital status, status with regard to public assistance, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law. In addition, PayPal will provide reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities. If you are unable to submit an application because of incompatible assistive technology or a disability, please contact us at paypalglobaltalentacquisition@paypal.com.
   

  

**Belonging at PayPal:**
 Our employees are central to advancing our mission, and we strive to create an environment where everyone can do their best work with a sense of purpose and belonging. Belonging at PayPal means creating a workplace with a sense of acceptance and security where all employees feel included and valued. We are proud to have a diverse workforce reflective of the merchants, consumers, and communities that we serve, and we continue to take tangible actions to cultivate inclusivity and belonging at PayPal.
   

  

 Any general requests for consideration of your skills, please Join our Talent Community.
   

  

 We know the confidence gap and imposter syndrome can get in the way of meeting spectacular candidates. Please don’t hesitate to apply.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
**Build the future of open finance!** 




 We believe people deserve real transparency around their finances. As a leader in open finance, Insurely gives consumers easy access to data from banks and insurers, helping them make better financial decisions. We make complex financial data simple and useful and that’s where you come in.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We’re looking for a senior engineer to join our French product mission. This is the team building the bridge between Insurely and the French financial market. You’ll work across our stack, but you don’t need to be fullstack today. You might be stronger in backend or frontend right now. What matters is that you’re curious, want to grow into broader work, and enjoy solving problems end to end.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Design, build, and deploy features that make financial data more transparent and accessible
* Integrate and experiment with the latest AI models and tools to improve both our products and how we work
* Contribute to architecture and tech decisions. We value pragmatic engineering over fancy solutions
* Help shape how we work as we grow our team and platform



  





**Qualifications** 




 Our core is Node.js + TypeScript on the backend and React + TypeScript on the frontend. Most days you’ll be working in those environments. We run on AWS and manage infrastructure with Terraform. We also work with modern Java and Spring Boot, so if you have experience with these, it’s a plus.
 



  





**Required Skills** 




 AI is a core part of how we build at Insurely. We actively integrate the latest models and tools both in our internal workflows and directly in our products. That means you'll work hands-on with cutting-edge AI as a natural part of your day-to-day, not as a side project. What matters most is your curiosity and ability to pick the right tool for the job. We think it's important to care about writing clean, maintainable code and designing systems that scale.
 



  





**Why join us?** 




 Work on problems that matter! We’re building infrastructure that changes how people understand their finances. Stay at the forefront of AI. We don't just follow trends, we actively shape how AI fits into our product and engineering culture. J
 



 oin a small, skilled team that values autonomy, curiosity, and simplicity. Influence our tech direction and culture as we scale. Be part of a supportive culture where we get things done and have fun along the way.
 



  





 We’re based at Kungsgatan 9, Stockholm. We can’t wait to meet you!
 



  





*Insurely is part of the Top 100 Rising European Startups selected by VivaTech 2026.*
